props.acid-etched-altar:
name: Acid-Etched Altar
category: Religious
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 1.0
placement: center
room_types: slime-pit, ritual-chamber-dark, ooze-shrine, dungeon, cave
typical_count: single
clusters_with: ooze-pool, ooze-puddle, dissolved-skeleton, slime-trail
notes: Stone altar being eaten away by acid — irregular pits dissolved into the slab with sickly green slime residue dripping off every edge
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.18,0.14 1.64,1.72 z 0-1.0

# Outer slime halo — thin green wet ring where acid has pooled around the base
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.94,0.94 fill #4a7020 0.18
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.88,0.88 fill #8ab030 0.12

# Main stone slab (irregular — edges eaten away)
poly 0.22,0.18 0.56,0.14 1.10,0.12 1.54,0.16 1.82,0.26 1.86,0.62 1.84,1.06 1.88,1.48 1.78,1.80 1.42,1.88 0.96,1.86 0.54,1.84 0.22,1.76 0.14,1.42 0.16,0.94 0.12,0.56 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.85
poly 0.22,0.18 0.56,0.14 1.10,0.12 1.54,0.16 1.82,0.26 1.86,0.62 1.84,1.06 1.88,1.48 1.78,1.80 1.42,1.88 0.96,1.86 0.54,1.84 0.22,1.76 0.14,1.42 0.16,0.94 0.12,0.56 stroke #2a2420 width 2

# Inner recessed panel
rect 0.34,0.30 1.32,1.40 stroke #3a3028 width 1

# Acid-eaten pits (dark cutouts where the stone has been dissolved through)
cutout ellipse 0.62,0.58 0.14,0.10
cutout ellipse 1.38,0.82 0.12,0.16
cutout ellipse 0.86,1.32 0.18,0.12
cutout circle 1.54,1.44 0.08

# Slime residue ringing each eaten pit (sickly yellow-green)
ellipse 0.62,0.58 0.18,0.13 stroke #8ab030 width 2
ellipse 1.38,0.82 0.16,0.20 stroke #8ab030 width 2
ellipse 0.86,1.32 0.22,0.15 stroke #8ab030 width 2
circle 1.54,1.44 0.11 stroke #8ab030 width 2

# Pool of pale slime collected in the largest pit
ellipse 0.86,1.32 0.12,0.07 fill #a8c060 0.7

# Surface pitting (small shallow bite marks not all the way through)
circle 0.48,0.30 0.03 fill #4a5020 0.6
circle 1.22,0.38 0.028 fill #4a5020 0.55
circle 0.42,1.04 0.026 fill #4a5020 0.5
circle 1.10,1.62 0.03 fill #4a5020 0.55
circle 1.66,0.46 0.024 fill #4a5020 0.5

# Slime drip running off south edge
poly 0.72,1.82 0.80,1.92 0.78,1.98 0.70,1.96 0.68,1.88 fill #8ab030 0.85
poly 0.72,1.82 0.80,1.92 0.78,1.98 0.70,1.96 0.68,1.88 stroke #4a7020

# Slime drip running off east edge
poly 1.84,1.10 1.94,1.16 1.98,1.24 1.92,1.28 1.86,1.22 fill #a8c060 0.85
poly 1.84,1.10 1.94,1.16 1.98,1.24 1.92,1.28 1.86,1.22 stroke #4a7020

# Slime drip running off west edge
poly 0.16,0.70 0.06,0.76 0.02,0.84 0.08,0.88 0.14,0.82 fill #8ab030 0.85
poly 0.16,0.70 0.06,0.76 0.02,0.84 0.08,0.88 0.14,0.82 stroke #4a7020

# Wet highlight on slime residue
arc 0.62,0.58 0.16 200 300 stroke #c8e080 0.6 width 1
arc 1.38,0.82 0.18 160 260 stroke #c8e080 0.6 width 1
props.adze:
name: Adze
category: Workshop
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: cooperage, carpenter, workshop, lumberyard
typical_count: single
clusters_with: stave-horse, cooper-mallet, stave-pile, chopping-block
notes: Cooper's adze tool (curved blade on a short handle) lying on a workbench or floor; used for shaping barrel staves
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: adze lying flat, handle running SW-NE, curved blade at NE end

# Handle shaft (short, thick)
line 0.22,0.72 0.58,0.40 stroke #6b4e2e width 4
# Handle wood grain
line 0.22,0.72 0.58,0.40 stroke #5c3a1e 0.4 width 1

# Handle grip end (slight flare at SW)
ellipse 0.20,0.74 0.04,0.03 fill #5c3a1e 0.8
ellipse 0.20,0.74 0.04,0.03 stroke #3a1f00

# Socket — where handle meets blade (iron ferrule)
ellipse 0.58,0.40 0.05,0.04 fill #555555 0.8
ellipse 0.58,0.40 0.05,0.04 stroke #333333

# Blade — curved cutting edge (adze blade is perpendicular to handle)
# From above: a short curved wedge shape
poly 0.56,0.28 0.74,0.24 0.78,0.30 0.76,0.40 0.60,0.42 fill #888888 0.85
poly 0.56,0.28 0.74,0.24 0.78,0.30 0.76,0.40 0.60,0.42 stroke #333333
# Blade bevel highlight
line 0.58,0.30 0.76,0.28 stroke #8899aa 0.4 width 1

# Cutting edge (bright steel line along the curved front)
qbezier 0.74,0.24 0.82,0.32 0.76,0.40 stroke #aabbcc width 2

# Iron patina on blade
ellipse 0.68,0.34 0.06,0.05 fill #555555 0.15

# Wood shaving near the tool
poly 0.38,0.56 0.42,0.52 0.46,0.56 0.44,0.60 fill #c8b898 0.3
poly 0.38,0.56 0.42,0.52 0.46,0.56 0.44,0.60 stroke #8b7355 0.2
props.air-node-vortex:
name: Air Node Vortex
category: Magical
footprint: 3x3
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: center
room_types: elemental-air-node, elemental-node, storm-spire
typical_count: single
clusters_with: cloud-pillar, djinn-pavilion, feather-drift, wind-chime-giant
notes: Primal vortex of wind — place as centerpiece of an air node. Swirling silver/white wisps funnel inward toward a bright core.
lights:
  - type: candle
    x: 1.5
    y: 1.5
    radius: 12
    color: "#d0e0ff"
    intensity: 0.8
---
# Outer luminous halo
circle 1.5,1.5 1.4 gradient-radial #8090b0 #0a0814 0.35
# Soft mid-glow
circle 1.5,1.5 1.0 fill #a0b0d0 0.18
circle 1.5,1.5 0.7 fill #c0d0f0 0.22

# Spiral arms — bezier wisps curling inward clockwise
bezier 0.3,0.6 1.2,0.2 1.8,1.0 1.5,1.5 stroke #d0e0ff width 3
bezier 2.7,0.6 2.4,1.6 1.4,1.4 1.5,1.5 stroke #d0e0ff width 3
bezier 2.7,2.4 1.8,2.8 1.2,2.0 1.5,1.5 stroke #d0e0ff width 3
bezier 0.3,2.4 0.6,1.4 1.6,1.6 1.5,1.5 stroke #d0e0ff width 3

# Thinner inner spiral wisps
bezier 0.9,0.8 1.5,0.7 1.7,1.2 1.5,1.5 stroke #e0e0f0 width 2
bezier 2.1,0.8 2.0,1.3 1.3,1.3 1.5,1.5 stroke #e0e0f0 width 2
bezier 2.1,2.2 1.5,2.3 1.3,1.7 1.5,1.5 stroke #e0e0f0 width 2
bezier 0.9,2.2 1.0,1.7 1.7,1.7 1.5,1.5 stroke #e0e0f0 width 2

# Bright inner ring
circle 1.5,1.5 0.35 fill #e0e8ff 0.35
circle 1.5,1.5 0.35 stroke #ffffff 0.5

# Hot white core
circle 1.5,1.5 0.15 fill #ffffff 0.75
circle 1.5,1.5 0.08 fill #ffffff 0.95

# Floating sparkles
circle 0.6,1.2 0.03 fill #ffffff 0.8
circle 2.3,0.8 0.025 fill #ffffff 0.75
circle 2.4,2.2 0.03 fill #ffffff 0.8
circle 0.7,2.3 0.025 fill #ffffff 0.7
props.air-node-wisp:
name: Air Wisp
category: Magical
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: elemental-air-node, elemental-node, storm-spire, genie-court
typical_count: many
clusters_with: air-node-vortex, feather-drift, seed-float
notes: Small floating vapor wisp — scatter around larger air features. Curled tendrils evoke animate air.
---
# Soft glow halo
circle 0.5,0.5 0.38 gradient-radial #d0e0ff #0a0814 0.25

# Main curled tendril (S-curve)
bezier 0.2,0.7 0.35,0.3 0.6,0.4 0.75,0.3 stroke #d0e0ff width 3
bezier 0.75,0.3 0.85,0.5 0.7,0.65 0.55,0.6 stroke #d0e0ff width 3

# Secondary tendril
bezier 0.25,0.55 0.4,0.55 0.45,0.7 0.35,0.8 stroke #e0e8ff width 2

# Inner bright wisp
bezier 0.35,0.55 0.45,0.4 0.6,0.45 0.65,0.4 stroke #ffffff width 2

# Tiny core highlights
circle 0.55,0.45 0.04 fill #ffffff 0.85
circle 0.4,0.6 0.025 fill #ffffff 0.7

# Stray sparkle
circle 0.72,0.55 0.02 fill #e0e8ff 0.7
circle 0.28,0.38 0.018 fill #e0e8ff 0.6

props.algae-bloom:
name: Algae Bloom
category: Features

notes: A patch of green-brown algae floating on standing water. Scatter multiple across flooded areas for a stagnant-water atmosphere. Flat on the water surface.
---
# Base algae mass (irregular green-brown blob)
poly 0.18,0.40 0.30,0.28 0.48,0.24 0.65,0.30 0.78,0.42 0.82,0.56 0.74,0.68 0.58,0.76 0.40,0.74 0.22,0.64 0.14,0.52 fill #3a5828 0.55

# Brown decay patches

circle 0.34,0.60 0.04 fill #5a4a20 0.3

circle 0.66,0.48 0.035 fill #4a7828 0.3

props.altar-sacrificial:
name: Sacrificial Altar
category: Religious
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 1.0
placement: center
room_types: temple-nave, temple, shrine, crypt, ritual-chamber
typical_count: single
clusters_with: censer, candelabra, bloodstain, ash-pile
notes: Bloodstained stone altar with channel grooves leading to a bronze catch-bowl at the south edge; wrist-strap rings near the corners
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.12,0.12 1.76,0.76 z 0-1.0

# Stone slab base (dark marble with bloodstain tint)
rect 0.12,0.12 1.76,0.76 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.85
rect 0.12,0.12 1.76,0.76 fill #4a0000 0.18
rect 0.12,0.12 1.76,0.76 stroke #2a0808 width 2

# Inner recessed panel
rect 0.24,0.22 1.52,0.56 stroke #5a1a1a width 1

# Bloodstain soaked into the slab
ellipse 1.0,0.46 0.48,0.22 fill #4a0000 0.55
ellipse 1.0,0.46 0.30,0.14 fill #2a0000 0.6

# Channel grooves flowing south toward the bowl
bezier 0.60,0.30 0.72,0.42 0.84,0.54 1.00,0.70 stroke #2a0000 width 3
bezier 1.40,0.30 1.28,0.42 1.16,0.54 1.00,0.70 stroke #2a0000 width 3
line 0.30,0.50 0.60,0.50 stroke #2a0000 width 2
line 1.70,0.50 1.40,0.50 stroke #2a0000 width 2

# Bronze catch-bowl at front (south edge)
circle 1.0,0.82 0.11 texfill polyhaven/rusty_metal 0.85
circle 1.0,0.82 0.11 stroke #5a3a00 width 2
circle 1.0,0.82 0.07 fill #2a0000 0.85
circle 1.0,0.82 0.07 stroke #5a3a00

# Bronze rim highlight on bowl
arc 1.0,0.82 0.11 200 340 stroke #daa520 0.7 width 1

# Wrist-strap rings (bronze mount points) — near corners
circle 0.22,0.22 0.04 fill #8b6914 0.9
circle 0.22,0.22 0.04 stroke #5a3a00
circle 1.78,0.22 0.04 fill #8b6914 0.9
circle 1.78,0.22 0.04 stroke #5a3a00
circle 0.22,0.78 0.04 fill #8b6914 0.9
circle 0.22,0.78 0.04 stroke #5a3a00
circle 1.78,0.78 0.04 fill #8b6914 0.9
circle 1.78,0.78 0.04 stroke #5a3a00

# Dried splatters radiating from center
circle 0.42,0.34 0.025 fill #4a0000 0.7
circle 1.58,0.36 0.022 fill #4a0000 0.65
circle 0.50,0.66 0.02 fill #4a0000 0.6
circle 1.46,0.68 0.02 fill #4a0000 0.6
props.altar-stone-flat:
name: Flat Stone Altar
category: Religious
footprint: 2x2
facing: no

# Worn top surface (lighter stone, central worship area)
poly 0.30,0.40 0.80,0.36 1.20,0.38 1.60,0.40 1.66,0.80 1.64,1.20 1.60,1.58 1.20,1.62 0.80,1.60 0.30,1.56 0.26,1.20 0.28,0.80 fill #8a8078 0.7

bezier 0.40,1.10 0.80,1.00 1.20,1.20 1.60,1.10 stroke #2a2420 0.7 width 1
line 0.60,0.40 0.70,1.58 stroke #2a2420 0.5
# Dark channels (blood grooves carved into surface)
bezier 0.60,0.80 0.80,0.90 1.20,0.90 1.40,0.80 stroke #3a1808 0.7 width 2
bezier 1.00,0.50 0.90,0.80 0.90,1.20 1.00,1.50 stroke #3a1808 0.6 width 2
# Moss patches (greenish)
poly 0.20,0.32 0.34,0.28 0.40,0.40 0.30,0.48 0.22,0.44 fill #3a5028 0.75

# Footprint 2x1: x 0-1, y 0-2. No facing.
# Top-down view: classic anchor silhouette — bold, chunky shape.

# === SHADOW ===
ellipse 0.5,1.05 0.48,0.94 fill #000000 0.06

# === RING/SHACKLE at top ===
ring 0.5,0.18 0.15 0.07 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.75

category: Decor
footprint: 1x1

# === HITBOX ===

# Cranium (rounded dome — back of skull north)

line 0.44,0.30 0.50,0.24 stroke #8a7040 width 1
line 0.50,0.24 0.56,0.30 stroke #8a7040 width 1
line 0.56,0.30 0.62,0.24 stroke #8a7040 width 1

line 0.58,0.48 0.66,0.42 stroke #8a7040 0.65 width 1

ellipse 0.38,0.44 0.08,0.09 stroke #5a4028
ellipse 0.62,0.44 0.08,0.09 fill #0a0604 0.95
ellipse 0.62,0.44 0.08,0.09 stroke #5a4028

arc 0.62,0.44 0.08 200 340 stroke #d4c4a8 0.55 width 1

poly 0.46,0.68 0.54,0.68 0.52,0.84 0.50,0.88 0.48,0.84 stroke #5a4028

props.annealing-oven:
name: Annealing Oven
category: Workshop
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.5
placement: wall
room_types: glassworks, workshop
typical_count: single
clusters_with: gaffer-bench, sand-bin, color-rod-bundle, forge
notes: Large brick annealing oven for slow-cooling glass. Place against a wall with front (south) facing into the workshop.
lights:
  - type: candle
    x: 1.0
    y: 1.6
    radius: 4
    color: "#ffaa00"
    intensity: 0.15
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.1,0.1 1.8,1.55 z 0-2.5

# footprint 2x2: x 0-2, y 0-2. Wall at north, mouth at south.

# === Brick body (rectangular industrial oven) ===
rect 0.1,0.1 1.8,1.6 texfill polyhaven/brick_4 0.85
rect 0.1,0.1 1.8,1.6 stroke #2a1400

# === Iron strapping bands running across top of oven ===
rect 0.1,0.35 1.8,0.07 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.7
rect 0.1,0.35 1.8,0.07 stroke #222222
rect 0.1,0.95 1.8,0.07 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.7
rect 0.1,0.95 1.8,0.07 stroke #222222

# === Iron corner plates (riveted hardware) ===
rect 0.12,0.12 0.18,0.18 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.75
rect 0.12,0.12 0.18,0.18 stroke #222222
rect 1.70,0.12 0.18,0.18 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.75
rect 1.70,0.12 0.18,0.18 stroke #222222

# === Rivets on straps ===
circle 0.22,0.385 0.018 fill #555555 0.9
circle 0.95,0.385 0.018 fill #555555 0.9
circle 1.78,0.385 0.018 fill #555555 0.9
circle 0.22,0.985 0.018 fill #555555 0.9
circle 0.95,0.985 0.018 fill #555555 0.9
circle 1.78,0.985 0.018 fill #555555 0.9

# === Brick joint lines (mortar texture hint) ===
line 0.1,0.65 1.9,0.65 stroke #1a0a00 0.4
line 0.1,1.35 1.9,1.35 stroke #1a0a00 0.4

# === Oven mouth — dark elliptical opening at south, residual heat (NOT flame) ===
ellipse 1.0,1.52 0.42,0.18 fill #1a0800 0.85
ellipse 1.0,1.52 0.42,0.18 stroke #2a1400 width 2
# Faint warm tint inside (residual heat, low opacity — no bright flame)
ellipse 1.0,1.52 0.34,0.13 fill #6a2200 0.25
ellipse 1.0,1.52 0.22,0.08 fill #aa5500 0.18
# Brick lintel above the mouth
rect 0.5,1.30 1.0,0.08 texfill polyhaven/brick_4 0.88
rect 0.5,1.30 1.0,0.08 stroke #1a0a00

bezier 0.70,0.44 0.74,0.30 0.76,0.20 0.74,0.10 stroke #8a7040 width 1

bezier 0.80,0.42 0.86,0.54 0.88,0.62 0.86,0.72 stroke #8a7040 width 1

# Cutting edge (bright along south)
bezier 0.18,0.58 0.28,0.70 0.50,0.74 0.72,0.70 stroke #cccccc width 2
bezier 0.18,0.58 0.28,0.70 0.50,0.74 0.72,0.70 stroke #ffffff 0.7 width 1

rect 0.40,0.28 0.20,0.08 fill #555555 0.95
rect 0.40,0.28 0.20,0.08 stroke #222222

ellipse 0.50,0.44 0.12,0.08 stroke #333333

circle 0.36,0.48 0.02 fill #222222 0.85
# Small hammer scars
line 0.34,0.38 0.38,0.40 stroke #1a1008 0.6
line 0.60,0.60 0.64,0.62 stroke #1a1008 0.6
# Rust patch (orange-brown)

# Nick on cutting edge

line 0.28,0.66 0.72,0.68 stroke #e0e0e0 0.5

props.ballista:
name: Ballista
category: Combat
footprint: 3x3
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: yes
height: 4
placement: center
room_types: fortification, guard-room, battlements
typical_count: single
notes: Siege weapon; needs clear line of sight and operating space
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 1.3,0.35 0.4,2.45 z 0-4
hitbox rect 0.15,0.15 0.65,0.7 z 0-4
hitbox rect 2.2,0.15 0.65,0.7 z 0-4

# === FRONT CROSSBAR (north) — torsion housings + arms ===
# Crossbar beam spanning width
rect 0.2,0.35 2.6,0.3 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 0.2,0.35 2.6,0.3 stroke #2a1400
# Left torsion housing
rect 0.15,0.15 0.65,0.7 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.15,0.15 0.65,0.7 stroke #2a1400
# Left torsion metal plate
rect 0.2,0.2 0.55,0.6 fill #555555 0.45
rect 0.2,0.2 0.55,0.6 stroke #444444
# Left torsion spool
circle 0.47,0.5 0.16 fill #666666 0.7
circle 0.47,0.5 0.16 stroke #333333
# Right torsion housing
rect 2.2,0.15 0.65,0.7 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 2.2,0.15 0.65,0.7 stroke #2a1400
# Right torsion metal plate
rect 2.25,0.2 0.55,0.6 fill #555555 0.45
rect 2.25,0.2 0.55,0.6 stroke #444444
# Right torsion spool
circle 2.53,0.5 0.16 fill #666666 0.7
circle 2.53,0.5 0.16 stroke #333333
# === ARMS — extend from torsion spool centers, angling outward ===
# Left arm (centered on spool at 0.47,0.5)
poly 0.39,0.42 0.55,0.42 0.1,1.1 0.0,1.0 fill #4a2800 0.8
poly 0.39,0.42 0.55,0.42 0.1,1.1 0.0,1.0 stroke #2a1400
# Right arm (centered on spool at 2.53,0.5)
poly 2.45,0.42 2.61,0.42 3.0,1.0 2.9,1.1 fill #4a2800 0.8
poly 2.45,0.42 2.61,0.42 3.0,1.0 2.9,1.1 stroke #2a1400
# === CENTRAL STOCK — long beam extending south from crossbar ===
rect 1.3,0.35 0.4,2.45 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 1.3,0.35 0.4,2.45 stroke #2a1400
# Stock center groove (bolt channel)
rect 1.38,0.5 0.24,1.8 fill #333333 0.35
# === BOWSTRING — locked back at south end, ready to fire ===
# Rope from left arm tip, pulled back to trigger on stock
line 0.05,1.05 1.5,2.3 stroke #8b7355
# Rope from right arm tip, pulled back to trigger on stock
line 2.95,1.05 1.5,2.3 stroke #8b7355
# Trigger / latch mechanism holding the string
rect 1.3,2.2 0.4,0.25 fill #555555 0.6
rect 1.3,2.2 0.4,0.25 stroke #444444
circle 1.5,2.32 0.06 fill #888888 0.7
# === BOLT — metal shaft on the stock, fires north, rests against trigger ===
rect 1.42,0.3 0.16,1.9 fill #888888 0.7
rect 1.42,0.3 0.16,1.9 stroke #555555
# Bolt arrowhead pointing north (firing direction)
poly 1.35,0.3 1.5,0.0 1.65,0.3 fill #999999 0.8
poly 1.35,0.3 1.5,0.0 1.65,0.3 stroke #555555
# Bolt fletching (south end, at trigger)
poly 1.37,2.2 1.5,2.3 1.63,2.2 fill #666666 0.5
# === REAR FRAME — winch at south end ===
rect 0.9,2.6 1.2,0.25 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 0.9,2.6 1.2,0.25 stroke #2a1400
# Winch handle
rect 1.35,2.85 0.3,0.12 fill #555555 0.6
rect 1.35,2.85 0.3,0.12 stroke #333333
circle 1.5,2.91 0.04 fill #888888 0.7

props.basalt-pillar:
name: Basalt Pillar
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.2
placement: corner
room_types: elemental-fire-node, elemental-node, volcano-caldera, fire-plane
typical_count: few
clusters_with: ember-pit, flame-pillar, ember-drift, fire-node-core
notes: Hexagonal basalt column seen from above — dark volcanic rock with glowing magma cracks radiating from the center
lights:
  - type: candle
    x: 0.5
    y: 0.5
    radius: 6
    color: "#ff4400"
    intensity: 0.5
---
# Hitbox — hexagonal column blocks light
hitbox poly 0.22,0.32 0.22,0.68 0.50,0.88 0.78,0.68 0.78,0.32 0.50,0.12 z 0-2.2
# Faint heat halo
circle 0.5,0.5 0.48 gradient-radial #e85500 #0a0400 0.22
# Hexagonal basalt column cross-section
poly 0.22,0.32 0.22,0.68 0.50,0.88 0.78,0.68 0.78,0.32 0.50,0.12 texfill polyhaven/volcanic_rock_tiles 0.85
poly 0.22,0.32 0.22,0.68 0.50,0.88 0.78,0.68 0.78,0.32 0.50,0.12 stroke #0a0400 width 2
# Darker basalt core

poly 0.32,0.40 0.32,0.60 0.50,0.72 0.68,0.60 0.68,0.40 0.50,0.28 stroke #0a0400 width 1
# Glowing magma cracks radiating from the core
line 0.50,0.50 0.22,0.36 stroke #ff6020 width 2
line 0.50,0.50 0.22,0.64 stroke #ff6020 width 2
line 0.50,0.50 0.78,0.36 stroke #ff4020 width 2
line 0.50,0.50 0.78,0.64 stroke #ff6020 width 2
line 0.50,0.50 0.50,0.15 stroke #ff4020 width 2
line 0.50,0.50 0.50,0.85 stroke #ff6020 width 2
# Secondary branching cracks

line 0.64,0.56 0.72,0.58 stroke #ffaa30 width 1
line 0.44,0.62 0.40,0.74 stroke #ffaa30 width 1
line 0.56,0.38 0.60,0.26 stroke #ffaa30 width 1
# Glowing crack junction — the hottest spot
circle 0.50,0.50 0.08 fill #ff6020 0.75
circle 0.50,0.50 0.05 fill #ffaa30 0.85
circle 0.50,0.50 0.025 fill #ffcc60 0.95
# Basalt edge highlights
line 0.22,0.32 0.50,0.12 stroke #555555 width 1
line 0.50,0.12 0.78,0.32 stroke #555555 width 1

circle 0.50,0.50 0.38 stroke #3a1f00

line 0.18,0.70 0.82,0.30 stroke #4a2800 0.3
line 0.12,0.50 0.88,0.50 stroke #4a2800 0.3

ellipse 0.50,0.48 0.30,0.28 stroke #b8b0a0 0.5

circle 0.60,0.42 0.11 fill #e0d8cc 0.8
circle 0.48,0.54 0.09 fill #e4dcd0 0.85
circle 0.54,0.38 0.08 fill #dcd4c4 0.7

# Grey-toned deeper wool tufts

circle 0.58,0.50 0.05 fill #b8b0a0 0.45

# Stray wisps poking over the rim

bezier 0.78,0.42 0.84,0.38 0.86,0.34 0.88,0.30 stroke #d8d0c0 0.65 width 2

props.bath-pool:
name: Bath Pool
category: Features
footprint: 3x3
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.3
placement: center
room_types: bath-house, mansion-bathroom, noble-estate
typical_count: single

notes: Large rectangular sunken bathing pool with mosaic tile floor and warm steam wisps. Place as a bath-house centerpiece.
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.2,0.2 2.6,2.6 z 0-0.3

# === Marble stone rim (outer border) ===
rect 0.15,0.15 2.70,2.70 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.88
rect 0.15,0.15 2.70,2.70 stroke #5a5a5a width 2
# Inner rim edge (pool lip)
rect 0.40,0.40 2.20,2.20 stroke #777777 width 1

# === Water surface (base) ===
rect 0.42,0.42 2.16,2.16 fill #8ab0d0 0.88
rect 0.42,0.42 2.16,2.16 stroke #4a6a80

# === Mosaic tile pattern visible through water ===
# Tile grid — alternating darker and lighter squares
rect 0.50,0.50 0.45,0.45 fill #6a8aa0 0.55
rect 1.05,0.50 0.45,0.45 fill #4a6a80 0.55
rect 1.60,0.50 0.45,0.45 fill #6a8aa0 0.55
rect 2.15,0.50 0.40,0.45 fill #4a6a80 0.55
rect 0.50,1.05 0.45,0.45 fill #4a6a80 0.55
rect 1.05,1.05 0.45,0.45 fill #6a8aa0 0.55
rect 1.60,1.05 0.45,0.45 fill #4a6a80 0.55
rect 2.15,1.05 0.40,0.45 fill #6a8aa0 0.55
rect 0.50,1.60 0.45,0.45 fill #6a8aa0 0.55
rect 1.05,1.60 0.45,0.45 fill #4a6a80 0.55
rect 1.60,1.60 0.45,0.45 fill #6a8aa0 0.55
rect 2.15,1.60 0.40,0.45 fill #4a6a80 0.55
rect 0.50,2.15 0.45,0.40 fill #4a6a80 0.55
rect 1.05,2.15 0.45,0.40 fill #6a8aa0 0.55
rect 1.60,2.15 0.45,0.40 fill #4a6a80 0.55
rect 2.15,2.15 0.40,0.40 fill #6a8aa0 0.55
# Grout lines (horizontal + vertical)
line 0.42,1.05 2.58,1.05 stroke #2a3a4a 0.5
line 0.42,1.60 2.58,1.60 stroke #2a3a4a 0.5
line 0.42,2.15 2.58,2.15 stroke #2a3a4a 0.5
line 1.05,0.42 1.05,2.58 stroke #2a3a4a 0.5
line 1.60,0.42 1.60,2.58 stroke #2a3a4a 0.5
line 2.15,0.42 2.15,2.58 stroke #2a3a4a 0.5

# === Water overlay / ripple hint ===
rect 0.42,0.42 2.16,2.16 fill #a0c8e0 0.20
# Ripple curves on water surface
bezier 0.60,0.80 1.10,0.65 1.90,0.95 2.40,0.78 stroke #a0c8e0 0.55 width 2
bezier 0.60,1.55 1.20,1.40 1.80,1.70 2.40,1.52 stroke #a0c8e0 0.50 width 2
bezier 0.60,2.25 1.15,2.10 1.85,2.40 2.40,2.22 stroke #a0c8e0 0.45 width 2

# === Steam wisps (warm pale ellipses) ===
ellipse 0.90,0.70 0.30,0.14 fill #e8f0f4 0.22
ellipse 1.70,1.20 0.34,0.16 fill #e8f0f4 0.22
ellipse 2.20,2.00 0.28,0.14 fill #e0e8ec 0.22
ellipse 0.85,2.10 0.32,0.15 fill #e8f0f4 0.20

props.blast-furnace:
name: Blast Furnace
category: Workshop
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 4
placement: center
room_types: foundry-great, infernal-forge, smithy-large
typical_count: single
clusters_with: ladle-iron, casting-pit, ingot-stack, slag-heap, overhead-crane
lights:
  - type: brazier
    x: 1.0
    y: 1.0
    radius: 10
    color: "#ff5520"
    intensity: 0.85
    falloff: linear
notes: Towering industrial blast furnace — outer brick ring, iron band, molten fire core looking straight down the stack. Tuyère on one side, slag runnel opposite. Cluster with ladle-iron, casting-pit and overhead-crane.
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 1.0,1.0 0.88 z 0-4

# === Outer heat halo on floor (drawn first) ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.98 fill #e85500 0.15

# === Outer brick shell (widest ring — structural masonry) ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.90 texfill polyhaven/brick_4 0.88
circle 1.0,1.0 0.90 stroke #0a0400 width 2
# Weathered soot edge
circle 1.0,1.0 0.90 fill #1a0a04 0.2

# === Radial brick seams across outer ring ===
line 1.00,0.10 1.00,0.36 stroke #0a0400 0.7
line 1.00,1.64 1.00,1.90 stroke #0a0400 0.7
line 0.10,1.00 0.36,1.00 stroke #0a0400 0.7
line 1.64,1.00 1.90,1.00 stroke #0a0400 0.7
line 0.36,0.36 0.52,0.52 stroke #0a0400 0.6
line 1.64,0.36 1.48,0.52 stroke #0a0400 0.6
line 0.36,1.64 0.52,1.48 stroke #0a0400 0.6
line 1.64,1.64 1.48,1.48 stroke #0a0400 0.6

# === Middle iron reinforcement band ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.72 texfill polyhaven/rusty_metal 0.8
circle 1.0,1.0 0.72 fill #3a2818 0.45
circle 1.0,1.0 0.72 stroke #1a1a1a width 3
# Rivet studs around the band
circle 1.0,0.30 0.035 fill #222222 0.95
circle 1.0,0.30 0.035 stroke #050505
circle 1.0,1.70 0.035 fill #222222 0.95
circle 1.0,1.70 0.035 stroke #050505
circle 0.30,1.0 0.035 fill #222222 0.95
circle 0.30,1.0 0.035 stroke #050505
circle 1.70,1.0 0.035 fill #222222 0.95
circle 1.70,1.0 0.035 stroke #050505
circle 0.50,0.50 0.028 fill #222222 0.95
circle 1.50,0.50 0.028 fill #222222 0.95
circle 0.50,1.50 0.028 fill #222222 0.95
circle 1.50,1.50 0.028 fill #222222 0.95

# === Inner refractory lining ring (dark heat-scarred stone) ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.58 fill #2a1408 0.95
circle 1.0,1.0 0.58 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.55
circle 1.0,1.0 0.58 stroke #0a0400 width 2

# === Fire core — concentric rings looking straight down the stack ===
# Outer heat halo in the throat
circle 1.0,1.0 0.50 fill #cc3300 0.7
# Outer flame ring — deep orange with ragged edge
poly 1.00,0.56 1.14,0.62 1.28,0.66 1.36,0.78 1.44,1.00 1.36,1.22 1.28,1.34 1.14,1.38 1.00,1.44 0.86,1.38 0.72,1.34 0.64,1.22 0.56,1.00 0.64,0.78 0.72,0.66 0.86,0.62 fill #ff6020 0.85
# Mid flame ring — bright orange
circle 1.0,1.0 0.32 fill #ff8030 0.9
# Flame tongues licking outward
poly 1.00,0.54 0.94,0.66 1.06,0.66 fill #ffaa30 0.85
poly 1.00,1.46 0.94,1.34 1.06,1.34 fill #ff8030 0.8
poly 0.54,1.00 0.66,0.94 0.66,1.06 fill #ffaa30 0.8
poly 1.46,1.00 1.34,0.94 1.34,1.06 fill #ff8030 0.8
# Inner yellow ring
circle 1.0,1.0 0.22 fill #ffcc60 0.9
# Hot yellow-white core
circle 1.0,1.0 0.14 fill #ffe890 0.95
# Hottest white center (looking down the furnace axis)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.07 fill #ffffff 1.0
# Dark updraft soot specks near the core
circle 0.86,0.82 0.02 fill #1a0800 0.6
circle 1.14,0.84 0.02 fill #1a0800 0.6
circle 0.84,1.16 0.02 fill #1a0800 0.6
circle 1.16,1.14 0.02 fill #1a0800 0.6
# Bright ember sparks
circle 0.78,0.76 0.015 fill #ffcc60 0.9
circle 1.22,0.78 0.015 fill #ffcc60 0.9

# === Tuyère (air-blast pipe) jutting out west side ===
rect 0.00,0.92 0.22,0.16 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.88
rect 0.00,0.92 0.22,0.16 stroke #1a1a1a width 2
# Flange collar where pipe meets shell
rect 0.14,0.84 0.10,0.32 fill #1a1a1a 0.95
rect 0.14,0.84 0.10,0.32 stroke #050505
circle 0.19,0.90 0.022 fill #050505
circle 0.19,1.10 0.022 fill #050505

# === Slag runnel (drip channel) opposite side — east ===
rect 1.78,0.96 0.22,0.08 texfill polyhaven/rusty_metal 0.85
rect 1.78,0.96 0.22,0.08 stroke #1a0a04
# Glowing slag dribble inside runnel
rect 1.80,0.98 0.18,0.04 fill #ff6020 0.8
line 1.80,1.00 1.98,1.00 stroke #ffcc60 0.9 width 1
# Slag pool splatter at end
ellipse 1.96,1.00 0.05,0.04 fill #cc3300 0.8
circle 1.94,1.00 0.02 fill #ffaa30 0.9

category: Features
footprint: 2x2

---
# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2

# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 1.0,1.0 0.60 z 0-2.5

# === Stone ring at base ===

# Bottom log NW-SE

circle 1.58,1.00 0.07 fill #1a0800 0.9
circle 1.00,0.42 0.07 fill #1a0800 0.9
circle 1.00,1.58 0.07 fill #1a0800 0.9

# === Flames (top-down — concentric rings of fire climbing the log pyramid) ===
# Outer heat halo
circle 1.0,1.0 0.70 fill #e85500 0.30
# Outer flame ring (ragged edge)
poly 1.00,0.32 1.20,0.42 1.42,0.48 1.58,0.66 1.68,1.00 1.58,1.34 1.42,1.52 1.20,1.58 1.00,1.68 0.80,1.58 0.58,1.52 0.42,1.34 0.32,1.00 0.42,0.66 0.58,0.48 0.80,0.42 fill #ff6020 0.80

poly 1.00,1.70 0.92,1.50 1.08,1.50 fill #ff8030 0.80

poly 0.48,1.52 0.62,1.36 0.64,1.38 fill #ff8030 0.75
poly 1.52,1.52 1.36,1.36 1.38,1.38 fill #ff8030 0.75
# Inner yellow ring
circle 1.0,1.0 0.32 fill #ffcc60 0.88
# Hot white-yellow core
circle 1.0,1.0 0.20 fill #ffe890 0.92
# Hottest white center (looking down the flame's axis)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.10 fill #ffffff 0.95
# Dark updraft specks (rising soot caught in the fire)

circle 1.24,0.76 0.020 fill #1a0800 0.55
circle 0.74,1.24 0.020 fill #1a0800 0.55
circle 1.22,1.26 0.020 fill #1a0800 0.55

# === Ember sparks floating around ===
circle 0.65,0.40 0.025 fill #ffaa00 0.85
circle 1.40,0.55 0.022 fill #ff8800 0.8
circle 1.50,1.35 0.03 fill #ffcc00 0.85
circle 0.55,1.45 0.025 fill #ff8800 0.8
circle 1.25,0.25 0.02 fill #ffaa00 0.75
circle 0.30,0.85 0.02 fill #ff6600 0.7
circle 1.75,0.80 0.022 fill #ffcc00 0.8
circle 0.70,1.75 0.02 fill #ff8800 0.75

# === Glowing embers on charred logs ===

circle 1.04,0.12 0.07 fill #2a2a2a 0.2

props.bookmark:
name: Bookmark
category: Library & Study

placement: floor

notes: Small ribbon bookmark — scatter on desks, near book piles, or on reading surfaces. Burgundy or navy fabric with gold thread edge and a tasseled end.
---
# === HITBOX === (very small, flat — negligible occluder)
hitbox rect 0.30,0.25 0.42,0.10 z 0-0.05

# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# A thin strip of ribbon with a tassel at the south end.

# Faint scuff/rumple shadow under the ribbon for depth
rect 0.32,0.28 0.40,0.40 fill #1a1208 0.12

# Main ribbon body — burgundy, slightly angled along the cell
rect 0.30,0.26 0.12,0.48 fill #8b2233 0.92

# Gold thread edge stripes running along the ribbon length

# Subtle inner satin highlight
line 0.36,0.30 0.36,0.70 stroke #b0324a 0.55 width 1

line 0.34,0.80 0.33,0.90 stroke #8b2233 width 1
line 0.36,0.80 0.36,0.91 stroke #8b2233 width 1
line 0.38,0.80 0.39,0.90 stroke #8b2233 width 1
line 0.40,0.80 0.42,0.88 stroke #8b2233 width 1
# A couple of gold threads in the fringe

line 0.37,0.80 0.375,0.89 stroke #daa520 width 1

circle 1.50,0.44 0.09 stroke #5a3a00

circle 2.55,0.44 0.06 stroke #12182a
circle 2.55,0.40 0.025 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
circle 2.55,0.40 0.025 stroke #2a1400

props.boot-worn:

props.boots-drying:
name: Boots Drying
category: Clutter
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.4
placement: floor
room_types: campsite-traveler, ranger-camp, cabin-hunters
typical_count: few
clusters_with: worn-shoes, campfire, bedroll, gear-pack
notes: Pair of travel boots propped upside-down on sticks to dry; place near a campfire or hearth
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: boots are inverted, so what you see is the flat sole upward with a dark oval opening at the base (north end, where the ankle cuff faces down to the ground). Two short drying sticks poke up through each boot.

# === LEFT BOOT (west) — inverted, sole facing up ===
# Drying stick poking through (north end, small twig)
line 0.28,0.12 0.28,0.30 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
# Dark ankle opening (boot is inverted, so the opening is at the north end facing us)
ellipse 0.28,0.30 0.10,0.06 fill #1a0808 0.9
ellipse 0.28,0.30 0.10,0.06 stroke #0a0404
# Boot body — elongated sole shape (narrower at heel/north, wider at toe/south)
poly 0.18,0.32 0.38,0.32 0.40,0.62 0.38,0.82 0.32,0.88 0.22,0.86 0.17,0.70 0.16,0.50 texfill polyhaven/brown_leather 0.85
poly 0.18,0.32 0.38,0.32 0.40,0.62 0.38,0.82 0.32,0.88 0.22,0.86 0.17,0.70 0.16,0.50 fill #4a2a10 0.45
poly 0.18,0.32 0.38,0.32 0.40,0.62 0.38,0.82 0.32,0.88 0.22,0.86 0.17,0.70 0.16,0.50 stroke #2a1400
# Sole heel/toe divider (worn groove across the arch)
line 0.18,0.58 0.40,0.58 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1
# Lighter scuff on toe
ellipse 0.28,0.80 0.08,0.04 fill #6b4020 0.55
# Wear mark on sole center
ellipse 0.28,0.68 0.06,0.08 fill #2a1400 0.4
# Steam curl rising
bezier 0.28,0.10 0.22,0.05 0.34,0.02 0.28,-0.02 stroke #c8c0b8 0.4 width 2

# === RIGHT BOOT (east) — inverted, sole facing up ===
# Drying stick poking through
line 0.72,0.12 0.72,0.30 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
# Dark ankle opening
ellipse 0.72,0.30 0.10,0.06 fill #1a0808 0.9
ellipse 0.72,0.30 0.10,0.06 stroke #0a0404
# Boot body — mirrored shape
poly 0.62,0.32 0.82,0.32 0.84,0.50 0.83,0.70 0.78,0.86 0.68,0.88 0.62,0.82 0.60,0.62 texfill polyhaven/brown_leather 0.85
poly 0.62,0.32 0.82,0.32 0.84,0.50 0.83,0.70 0.78,0.86 0.68,0.88 0.62,0.82 0.60,0.62 fill #4a2a10 0.45

ellipse 0.2,0.7 0.1,0.16 stroke #2a1400

ellipse 1.8,0.7 0.1,0.16 stroke #2a1400
ellipse 1.8,0.7 0.07,0.12 fill #3a2000 0.5

ellipse 0.2,2.6 0.1,0.2 stroke #2a1400
ellipse 0.2,2.6 0.07,0.16 fill #3a2000 0.5
ellipse 1.8,2.6 0.1,0.2 fill #4a2800 0.8
ellipse 1.8,2.6 0.1,0.2 stroke #2a1400
ellipse 1.8,2.6 0.07,0.16 fill #3a2000 0.5

rect 0.76,1.1 0.48,0.06 fill #444444 0.7
rect 0.76,1.1 0.48,0.06 stroke #333333

ellipse 1.0,0.28 0.15,0.08 stroke #333333

rect 1.44,0.28 0.20,1.60 fill #c82020 0.85

line 1.75,0.28 1.60,1.86 stroke #8b7355 0.4
line 1.00,0.28 1.00,1.92 stroke #8b7355 0.35

# Scalloped south hem trim (wavy edge suggestion)
arc 0.50,1.86 0.08 0 180 stroke #8b7355 0.6 width 1
arc 1.00,1.90 0.08 0 180 stroke #8b7355 0.6 width 1
arc 1.50,1.86 0.08 0 180 stroke #8b7355 0.6 width 1

props.cargo-hatch:
name: Cargo Hatch
category: Nautical
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.5
placement: center
room_types: ship-main-deck, ship-deck, galleon, ship-cargo-hold
typical_count: single
clusters_with: mast-main, mast-fore, cannon, longboat-cradle
notes: Square wooden hatch cover set flush in the deck over the cargo hold; iron ring pull and strap bands. Ship's main cargo access.
---
# Footprint 2x2: x 0-2, y 0-2. No facing — symmetric.

# === Coaming recess shadow (hatch sits in a raised frame) ===
rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,1.84 fill #1a0f00 0.35

# === Coaming frame (raised lip around the hatch) ===
rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,1.84 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,1.84 stroke #1a0f00

# Inner recess shadow where cover drops in
rect 0.18,0.18 1.64,1.64 fill #1a0800 0.55

# === Hatch cover (weathered planks laid across) ===
rect 0.20,0.20 1.60,1.60 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.9
rect 0.20,0.20 1.60,1.60 stroke #2a1400

# Plank seam lines across the cover (horizontal planks)
line 0.20,0.52 1.80,0.52 stroke #2a1400 0.7
line 0.20,0.84 1.80,0.84 stroke #2a1400 0.7
line 0.20,1.16 1.80,1.16 stroke #2a1400 0.7
line 0.20,1.48 1.80,1.48 stroke #2a1400 0.7

# Plank end-grain highlights
line 0.20,0.52 1.80,0.52 stroke #5c3a1e 0.3 width 1
line 0.20,1.16 1.80,1.16 stroke #5c3a1e 0.3 width 1

# === Iron strap bands (cross bracing) ===
# North-south strap
rect 0.92,0.22 0.16,1.56 fill #333333 0.85
rect 0.92,0.22 0.16,1.56 stroke #1a1008
# East-west strap
rect 0.22,0.92 1.56,0.16 fill #333333 0.85
rect 0.22,0.92 1.56,0.16 stroke #1a1008

# Iron rivets at strap intersections and ends
circle 1.00,0.30 0.028 fill #222222 0.95
circle 1.00,1.70 0.028 fill #222222 0.95
circle 0.30,1.00 0.028 fill #222222 0.95
circle 1.70,1.00 0.028 fill #222222 0.95

# === Central iron ring pull ===
# Ring mounting plate
rect 0.82,0.82 0.36,0.36 fill #2a1a10 0.85
rect 0.82,0.82 0.36,0.36 stroke #1a1008
# Heavy iron ring (for hauling the cover open)
ring 1.00,1.00 0.22 0.13 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.75
ring 1.00,1.00 0.22 0.13 stroke #222222 width 2
# Ring highlight
arc 1.00,1.00 0.185 210 310 stroke #888888 0.7 width 1

# Iron staple that the ring hangs from
rect 0.96,0.78 0.08,0.10 fill #444444 0.9
rect 0.96,0.78 0.08,0.10 stroke #1a1008

category: Misc
footprint: 2x3
facing: yes

placement: floor

typical_count: single
notes: Transport; place near walls or doorways
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.8,0.35 1.8,1.3 z 0-3

# footprint 2x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-2
# Top-down: wooden cart bed, two wheels at rear, handle shafts at front

# === Handle shafts (north/front, extending forward) ===
# Left shaft
poly 0.0,0.65 0.05,0.6 0.9,0.55 0.9,0.6 0.05,0.68 fill #4a2800 0.75
poly 0.0,0.65 0.05,0.6 0.9,0.55 0.9,0.6 0.05,0.68 stroke #2a1400

# Handle grips

rect 0.0,0.58 0.12,0.12 stroke #2a1400
rect 0.0,1.3 0.12,0.12 fill #3a2000 0.8
rect 0.0,1.3 0.12,0.12 stroke #2a1400

# === Cart bed ===
rect 0.8,0.35 1.8,1.3 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.8,0.35 1.8,1.3 stroke #3a1f00
# Plank lines running lengthwise

line 0.85,1.0 2.55,1.0 stroke #4a2800 0.4
line 0.85,1.35 2.55,1.35 stroke #4a2800 0.4

rect 0.8,1.57 1.8,0.08 fill #3a1f00 0.5
rect 0.8,0.35 0.08,1.3 fill #3a1f00 0.45
rect 2.52,0.35 0.08,1.3 fill #3a1f00 0.45

line 0.00,0.62 0.68,0.62 stroke #8899aa 0.7 width 1

circle 0.52,0.63 0.018 fill #8b4000 0.65

props.casting-pit:
name: Casting Pit
category: Features
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0
placement: center
room_types: foundry-great, infernal-forge, smithy-large
typical_count: single
clusters_with: blast-furnace, ladle-iron, sand-mold, ingot-stack, overhead-crane
lights:
  - type: torch
    x: 1.0
    y: 1.0
    radius: 7
    color: "#ff7030"
    intensity: 0.6
    falloff: linear
notes: Sunken rectangular casting pit filled with molten iron. Sand-moulded rim, gate runner channel leading off one edge. Ground-level feature — no shadow, doesn't block light. Pair with blast-furnace and ladle-iron.
---
# === Outer dark rim (packed earth / sand mound around the pit) ===
rect 0.10,0.10 1.80,1.80 fill #3a2818 0.95
rect 0.10,0.10 1.80,1.80 texfill polyhaven/brown_mud 0.55
rect 0.10,0.10 1.80,1.80 stroke #1a1008 width 2

# === Sand-moulded inner lip (lighter sand color) ===
rect 0.22,0.22 1.56,1.56 fill #8a6a3a 0.9
rect 0.22,0.22 1.56,1.56 stroke #4a3218

# === Inner molten iron pool — layered gradient from outer cool to inner hot ===
rect 0.30,0.30 1.40,1.40 fill #2a0800 0.95
rect 0.30,0.30 1.40,1.40 stroke #1a0400

# Outer cooling crust
rect 0.34,0.34 1.32,1.32 fill #aa3300 0.9
# Mid heat
rect 0.40,0.40 1.20,1.20 fill #ff6600 0.85
# Inner bright
rect 0.48,0.48 1.04,1.04 fill #ffaa30 0.8
# Hottest molten surface
rect 0.58,0.58 0.84,0.84 fill #ffdd66 0.85
# Near-white spots (hottest)
ellipse 0.86,0.92 0.12,0.08 fill #ffeecc 0.9
ellipse 1.20,1.12 0.10,0.07 fill #ffeecc 0.85

# === Wavy ripple highlights across the molten surface ===
bezier 0.40,0.70 0.70,0.62 1.00,0.78 1.60,0.70 stroke #ffe890 0.55 width 2
bezier 0.40,1.10 0.70,1.18 1.00,1.02 1.60,1.10 stroke #ffcc60 0.5 width 2
bezier 0.40,1.40 0.80,1.32 1.20,1.44 1.60,1.38 stroke #ffaa30 0.45 width 1

# === Solidifying slag crust patches floating on surface ===
poly 0.54,0.52 0.62,0.48 0.70,0.54 0.66,0.62 0.56,0.62 fill #4a2410 0.85
poly 0.54,0.52 0.62,0.48 0.70,0.54 0.66,0.62 0.56,0.62 stroke #1a0a04
poly 1.30,0.58 1.38,0.54 1.46,0.60 1.42,0.68 1.32,0.66 fill #4a2410 0.8
poly 0.58,1.40 0.66,1.36 0.74,1.42 0.70,1.50 0.60,1.48 fill #3a1808 0.85
poly 1.26,1.32 1.34,1.28 1.44,1.34 1.40,1.42 1.28,1.42 fill #4a2410 0.8

# === Bright spark/spot hot points (scattered brighter ember spots) ===
circle 0.74,0.84 0.025 fill #ffffcc 0.95
circle 1.30,0.76 0.022 fill #ffeecc 0.9
circle 0.68,1.22 0.020 fill #ffcc60 0.85
circle 1.18,1.26 0.022 fill #ffeecc 0.9
circle 0.94,0.68 0.018 fill #ffff88 0.85

# === Gate runner channel leading south off one edge ===
# Channel carved into the rim (the "sprue" carrying flow out)
rect 0.88,1.78 0.24,0.22 fill #3a1808 0.95
rect 0.88,1.78 0.24,0.22 stroke #1a0400
# Molten flow inside the runner
rect 0.92,1.78 0.16,0.22 fill #ff6600 0.9
rect 0.96,1.78 0.08,0.22 fill #ffaa30 0.85
line 1.00,1.78 1.00,2.00 stroke #ffdd66 0.95 width 2

# === Heat shimmer wisps over the surface (bezier curls) ===
bezier 0.60,0.40 0.62,0.32 0.58,0.26 0.62,0.18 stroke #ff8800 0.35 width 1
bezier 1.40,0.40 1.38,0.32 1.42,0.26 1.38,0.18 stroke #ffaa00 0.35 width 1

line 1.5,0.12 1.5,0.5 stroke #8b7355 0.35

ellipse 1.0,1.50 0.45,0.32 stroke #1a1408 width 2
# Inner darkness (slightly smaller, pitch black)

# === Framing boulders around the mouth ===

circle 0.35,1.40 0.22 fill #3a3228 0.4
circle 0.35,1.40 0.22 stroke #1a1408

circle 1.65,1.40 0.22 fill #3a3228 0.4
circle 1.65,1.40 0.22 stroke #1a1408
circle 0.30,0.50 0.18 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.9
circle 0.30,0.50 0.18 stroke #1a1408
circle 1.70,0.50 0.18 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.9
circle 1.70,0.50 0.18 stroke #1a1408
circle 1.00,0.22 0.16 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.9
circle 1.00,0.22 0.16 stroke #1a1408
circle 0.55,0.82 0.12 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.85
circle 0.55,0.82 0.12 stroke #1a1408
circle 1.45,0.82 0.12 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.85
circle 1.45,0.82 0.12 stroke #1a1408
# === Scattered rubble at the mouth (spilled out of the tunnel) ===

circle 0.80,1.86 0.04 fill #1a1008 0.85

props.celestial-globe:
name: Celestial Globe
category: Decorative
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
placement: center
room_types: library, study, wizard-sanctum, observatory, cartographer
typical_count: single
clusters_with: desk, bookshelf, armchair, crystal-ball
notes: Brass-mounted celestial globe on tripod stand; place as room centerpiece or on desks
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: looking straight down at a globe on a tripod — circle disc
# with constellation star-points scattered across surface + meridian ring.

# Tripod legs (three brass legs radiating from center)
line 0.50,0.50 0.50,0.16 stroke #8b6914 width 2
line 0.50,0.50 0.22,0.72 stroke #8b6914 width 2
line 0.50,0.50 0.78,0.72 stroke #8b6914 width 2
# Leg feet (small brass circles)
circle 0.50,0.16 0.03 fill #daa520 0.7
circle 0.22,0.72 0.03 fill #daa520 0.7
circle 0.78,0.72 0.03 fill #daa520 0.7

# Globe orb (dark blue-black celestial sphere seen from above)
circle 0.50,0.48 0.26 fill #1a1a3a 0.85
circle 0.50,0.48 0.26 stroke #333355

# Meridian ring (brass arc around the globe)
circle 0.50,0.48 0.28 stroke #daa520 width 2

# Constellation star-points scattered across the globe surface
circle 0.40,0.36 0.015 fill #ffd700 0.7
circle 0.56,0.32 0.015 fill #ffd700 0.6
circle 0.62,0.44 0.015 fill #ffd700 0.7
circle 0.38,0.50 0.015 fill #ffd700 0.6
circle 0.52,0.56 0.015 fill #ffd700 0.65
circle 0.44,0.42 0.015 fill #ffd700 0.55
circle 0.60,0.54 0.015 fill #ffd700 0.6
circle 0.48,0.62 0.015 fill #ffd700 0.5

# Faint constellation lines connecting some stars
line 0.40,0.36 0.56,0.32 stroke #6666aa 0.25
line 0.56,0.32 0.62,0.44 stroke #6666aa 0.25
line 0.38,0.50 0.52,0.56 stroke #6666aa 0.2
line 0.44,0.42 0.40,0.36 stroke #6666aa 0.2

# Equatorial ring (faint horizontal circle on globe)
ellipse 0.50,0.48 0.25,0.08 stroke #555577 0.3

# Hub at top (small brass cap at pole)
circle 0.50,0.48 0.05 fill #daa520 0.6
circle 0.50,0.48 0.05 stroke #8b6914
props.celestial-pillar-of-light:
name: Celestial Pillar of Light
category: Magical
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: center
room_types: celestial-vault, temple, cathedral, solar-sanctum, divine-sanctum
typical_count: single
clusters_with: pillar-marble, banner-celestial, sun-disc-altar
notes: Radiant column of pure divine light from ceiling to floor — concentric rings, not a flame silhouette
lights:
  - type: torch
    x: 1.0
    y: 1.0
    radius: 8
    color: "#fff0d0"
    intensity: 0.9
---
# Footprint 2x2: x 0-2, y 0-2
# Top-down: looking straight down a column of light — concentric rings
# Per "Fire & Flame Columns" rule: halo -> bright -> core

# === Outermost halo — very faint warm gold ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.95 fill #fff0c0 0.08
circle 1.0,1.0 0.80 fill #fff0c0 0.10

# === Outer pale gold ring ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.70 fill #ffe8a0 0.20
circle 1.0,1.0 0.60 fill #ffdd88 0.25

# === Mid bright ring — white-gold ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.50 fill #fff0cc 0.45
circle 1.0,1.0 0.42 fill #fff8dd 0.55

# === Inner bright white ring ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.34 fill #fffcee 0.70
circle 1.0,1.0 0.26 fill #fffff0 0.80

# === Core — near-white, brightest ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.18 fill #ffffff 0.90
circle 1.0,1.0 0.10 fill #ffffff 0.95

# === Radial ray lines — light beams radiating outward ===
line 1.0,0.15 1.0,0.35 stroke #fff8dd 0.25
line 1.0,1.65 1.0,1.85 stroke #fff8dd 0.25
line 0.15,1.0 0.35,1.0 stroke #fff8dd 0.25
line 1.65,1.0 1.85,1.0 stroke #fff8dd 0.25
line 0.40,0.40 0.55,0.55 stroke #fff8dd 0.20
line 1.60,0.40 1.45,0.55 stroke #fff8dd 0.20
line 0.40,1.60 0.55,1.45 stroke #fff8dd 0.20
line 1.60,1.60 1.45,1.45 stroke #fff8dd 0.20

# === Floating mote sparkles caught in the light ===
circle 0.70,0.55 0.02 fill #ffffff 0.6
circle 1.30,0.65 0.018 fill #ffffff 0.55
circle 0.60,1.35 0.02 fill #ffffff 0.55
circle 1.40,1.40 0.018 fill #ffffff 0.5
circle 0.85,0.75 0.015 fill #fff8dd 0.5
circle 1.15,1.25 0.015 fill #fff8dd 0.5

circle 0.82,0.50 0.07 fill #c49520 0.5

line 0.18,0.47 0.18,0.40 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 0.82,0.47 0.82,0.40 stroke #daa520 width 1

# === Top fulcrum ornament ===
circle 0.50,0.50 0.04 fill #ffd700 0.9
circle 0.50,0.50 0.04 stroke #8b6914

props.charcoal-kiln:
name: Charcoal Kiln
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
placement: center
room_types: charcoal-burner-camp
typical_count: few
clusters_with: log-pile, chopping-block, wood-pile, charcoal-lump, axe-stuck
notes: Earth-covered charcoal mound (domed soil kiln smoldering) — the centerpiece of a charcoal burner's camp
lights:
  - type: candle
    x: 1.0
    y: 1.0
    radius: 4
    color: "#e06000"
    intensity: 0.3
---
# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: domed earth mound with concentric rings, smoking vent at center

# hitbox for the solid dome
hitbox circle 1.0,1.0 0.8

# Scorched earth ring (ground around the kiln)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.95 fill #1a1208 0.2

# Outer soil/turf ring (the earth covering of the kiln)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.82 texfill polyhaven/brown_mud 0.7
circle 1.0,1.0 0.82 stroke #2a1a0a

# Middle ring — darker cracked earth (heat-baked)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.65 fill #3a2818 0.7
circle 1.0,1.0 0.65 stroke #1a1208 0.5

# Inner dark earth ring (hottest zone before the vent)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.45 fill #1a1208 0.6
circle 1.0,1.0 0.45 stroke #0a0604 0.5

# Crack lines radiating from center (heat fissures)
line 1.0,1.0 1.0,0.22 stroke #0a0604 0.5 width 1
line 1.0,1.0 1.68,0.52 stroke #0a0604 0.45 width 1
line 1.0,1.0 1.78,1.0 stroke #0a0604 0.4 width 1
line 1.0,1.0 1.55,1.62 stroke #0a0604 0.4 width 1
line 1.0,1.0 0.35,1.55 stroke #0a0604 0.45 width 1
line 1.0,1.0 0.22,0.70 stroke #0a0604 0.45 width 1

# Orange glow through cracks (heat seeping through)
line 1.0,0.90 1.0,0.40 stroke #e85500 0.15 width 2
line 1.05,0.95 1.50,0.60 stroke #e85500 0.12 width 2
line 0.95,0.95 0.45,1.40 stroke #e85500 0.12 width 2

# Central vent hole
circle 1.0,1.0 0.15 fill #0a0604 0.85
circle 1.0,1.0 0.15 stroke #1a0800

# Vent glow (faint orange from within)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.12 fill #e85500 0.35
circle 1.0,1.0 0.08 fill #ff8800 0.3
circle 1.0,1.0 0.04 fill #ffaa00 0.4

# Smoke wisp indicators (small grey puffs drifting from vent)
ellipse 1.08,0.85 0.06,0.04 fill #888888 0.2
ellipse 0.92,0.78 0.05,0.03 fill #999999 0.15
ellipse 1.0,0.70 0.04,0.03 fill #aaaaaa 0.12

# Soot staining on outer ring (dark patches)

ellipse 1.45,1.35 0.10,0.06 fill #1a0800 0.18
ellipse 0.60,1.40 0.08,0.06 fill #1a0800 0.15

# Turf patches surviving on outer ring
ellipse 0.40,0.85 0.08,0.05 fill #3a5020 0.2
ellipse 1.55,0.75 0.06,0.04 fill #3a5020 0.18

    color: "#a080ff"
    intensity: 0.6

props.decanter:
name: Decanter
category: Containers
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.8
placement: floor
room_types: house-noble-townhouse, mansion-dining, mansion-study, noble-bedchamber, noble-solar
typical_count: single
clusters_with: wine-glass, sideboard, tea-service, goblet
notes: Crystal wine decanter; place on sideboards and dining tables
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox ellipse 0.5,0.58 0.22,0.18 z 0-0.8

# Base bulb (rounded bottom, crystal glass)
ellipse 0.5,0.62 0.22,0.20 fill #a0b8c0 0.35
ellipse 0.5,0.62 0.22,0.20 stroke #5a7080
# Wine inside (dark burgundy)
ellipse 0.5,0.62 0.18,0.16 fill #4a0818 0.8
ellipse 0.5,0.62 0.18,0.16 stroke #2a0408
# Wine surface meniscus highlight
arc 0.5,0.62 0.16 200 260 stroke #6a1828 0.7 width 1
# Glass shoulder (narrower)
ellipse 0.5,0.44 0.14,0.05 fill #a0b8c0 0.4
ellipse 0.5,0.44 0.14,0.05 stroke #5a7080
# Neck (narrow cylinder)
rect 0.44,0.28 0.12,0.16 fill #a0b8c0 0.35
rect 0.44,0.28 0.12,0.16 stroke #5a7080
# Wine visible in neck
rect 0.46,0.32 0.08,0.12 fill #4a0818 0.7
# Stopper (crystal knob on top)
ellipse 0.5,0.24 0.10,0.04 fill #d0e0e8 0.6
ellipse 0.5,0.24 0.10,0.04 stroke #5a7080
circle 0.5,0.20 0.05 fill #d0e0e8 0.6
circle 0.5,0.20 0.05 stroke #5a7080
# Stopper facet highlights (cut glass)
line 0.47,0.19 0.53,0.19 stroke #ffffff 0.6 width 1
line 0.50,0.16 0.50,0.23 stroke #ffffff 0.5 width 1
# Body highlight curve
arc 0.5,0.62 0.20 220 260 stroke #ffffff 0.5 width 1
# Cut-glass facets on bulb
line 0.36,0.54 0.40,0.70 stroke #ffffff 0.35 width 1
line 0.64,0.54 0.60,0.70 stroke #ffffff 0.35 width 1
line 0.50,0.46 0.50,0.78 stroke #ffffff 0.25 width 1

ellipse 1.0,0.50 0.45,0.25 fill #ffaa44 0.06

rect 0.55,0.20 0.90,0.55 stroke #444444

line 1.05,0.48 1.15,0.30 stroke #cc7711 width 1
line 0.75,0.45 0.80,0.62 stroke #cc7711 width 1

circle 0.90,0.40 0.035 fill #ffcc66 0.35
circle 1.20,0.60 0.04 fill #ffcc66 0.4

rect 1.35,0.36 0.10,0.10 stroke #333333

line 0.28,0.68 1.72,0.68 stroke #667788

---
# A single antler lying flat on the ground, seen from above
# Main beam curves from lower-left toward upper-right

# === Main beam ===
bezier 0.18,0.72 0.30,0.55 0.55,0.40 0.78,0.30 stroke #d4c4a8 width 4
bezier 0.18,0.72 0.30,0.55 0.55,0.40 0.78,0.30 stroke #c8b898 width 2

# First tine — branches upward-left from near base

bezier 0.30,0.62 0.26,0.52 0.20,0.42 0.18,0.34 stroke #c8b898 width 1

bezier 0.45,0.50 0.42,0.38 0.38,0.28 0.35,0.22 stroke #c8b898 width 1

bezier 0.62,0.38 0.60,0.28 0.58,0.22 0.56,0.18 stroke #c8b898 width 1

# Fourth tine — small fork at the very tip
bezier 0.75,0.32 0.80,0.24 0.84,0.20 0.86,0.18 stroke #d4c4a8 width 2

# === Base/burr (wide knob where antler was attached to skull) ===

circle 0.18,0.72 0.06 stroke #a09878

# === Tine tips — slightly lighter ===

circle 0.35,0.22 0.02 fill #e8dcc8 0.5
circle 0.56,0.18 0.02 fill #e8dcc8 0.5
circle 0.86,0.18 0.02 fill #e8dcc8 0.45
circle 0.78,0.30 0.02 fill #e8dcc8 0.45

props.fire-node-core:

    color: "#ff6030"

poly 2.6,1.5 2.55,1.42 2.45,1.44 2.45,1.56 2.55,1.58 stroke #000000 width 1

# Flame column layers (radial buildup to white core)
circle 1.5,1.5 0.9 fill #cc3300 0.55
circle 1.5,1.5 0.78 fill #e85500 0.65
circle 1.5,1.5 0.65 fill #ff6030 0.75
circle 1.5,1.5 0.5 fill #ff8030 0.85
circle 1.5,1.5 0.35 fill #ffaa30 0.9
circle 1.5,1.5 0.22 fill #ffcc60 0.95

# Flame tongues (polygonal licks radiating outward)

poly 1.5,2.4 1.4,2.1 1.6,2.1 fill #ff8030 0.7

# Hot white heart

circle 1.5,1.5 0.09 fill #ffffff 0.9
circle 1.5,1.5 0.05 fill #ffffff 1.0

# Rising sparks and heat flecks

circle 1.85,0.9 0.02 fill #ffaa30 0.8

props.focused-lamp:
name: Focused Lamp
category: Lighting
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
lights: [{"preset":"lantern","x":0.5,"y":0.6,"radius":6,"color":"#ffe8c0","intensity":0.6}]
placement: floor
room_types: interrogation-room, office, study, torture-chamber
typical_count: single
clusters_with: desk, chair, confession-paper, pen-and-inkwell
notes: Angled hooded lamp on a tall adjustable brass arm; the harsh interrogation light. Place near the prisoner's chair. Top-down: hood disk + arm + base.
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: small metal hood disk at south + angled arm line back to upright post at north + base

# === Base plate (north edge, on the floor) ===
circle 0.50,0.22 0.12 fill #666666 0.7
circle 0.50,0.22 0.12 stroke #444444

# Base plate center bolt
circle 0.50,0.22 0.04 fill #888888 0.6

# === Upright post (small circle — cross-section of vertical pole) ===
circle 0.50,0.28 0.04 fill #8b6914 0.8
circle 0.50,0.28 0.04 stroke #5a3a00

# === Angled arm (line from post to hood) ===
line 0.50,0.30 0.50,0.56 stroke #8b6914 0.7 width 3
# Arm joint pivot
circle 0.50,0.38 0.025 fill #daa520 0.7

# === Hood (metal disk, the main visible element from above) ===
# The hood is a conical reflector — top-down it's a circle/ellipse
ellipse 0.50,0.64 0.14,0.12 fill #666666 0.85
ellipse 0.50,0.64 0.14,0.12 stroke #444444
# Hood highlight (convex metal surface)
ellipse 0.48,0.62 0.08,0.05 fill #8899aa 0.3
# Rim detail
ellipse 0.50,0.64 0.14,0.12 stroke #555555 0.5

# === Light spill south of hood (warm glow on floor) ===
ellipse 0.50,0.78 0.18,0.14 fill #ffe8c0 0.2
ellipse 0.50,0.76 0.12,0.10 fill #ffe8c0 0.3
circle 0.50,0.74 0.06 fill #fff0d0 0.35

circle 0.50,0.30 0.02 fill #881818 0.8

line 0.20,0.76 0.80,0.76 stroke #4a6838 0.5

line 0.82,0.50 0.86,0.56 stroke #8b6914 0.7 width 1

props.forge:
name: Forge
category: Workshop
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: yes
height: 3
placement: wall
room_types: forge, smithy
typical_count: single
clusters_with: anvil, bellows, trough, workbench
lights: [{"preset":"brazier","x":1.0,"y":1.0}]
notes: Domed brick forge; open at south. Pair with anvil, bellows, trough.
---
# Hitbox: dome blocks light, not the open mouth area
hitbox circle 1.0,0.9 0.85 z 0-3

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: circular domed brick forge, open mouth at south, chimney hole on top

# === Fire glow spilling out the front opening (drawn first, behind everything) ===
ellipse 1.0,1.8 0.35,0.2 fill #ff8800 0.15
ellipse 1.0,1.7 0.25,0.15 fill #ffaa00 0.1

# === Circular dome — each ring uses a different texture for depth ===

# Outermost ring (base of dome, darkest, rough stone)
circle 1.0,0.9 0.85 texfill polyhaven/cobblestone_floor_01 0.8
circle 1.0,0.9 0.85 stroke #1a1a1a
# Darken the outer edge
circle 1.0,0.9 0.85 fill #1a0a05 0.2

# Ring 2 — dark brick
circle 1.0,0.9 0.72 texfill polyhaven/brick_4 0.85
circle 1.0,0.9 0.72 stroke #1a1a1a

# Ring 3 — stone wall (lighter, higher on dome)
circle 1.0,0.9 0.58 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.75
circle 1.0,0.9 0.58 stroke #1a1a1a

# Ring 4 — granite (smoother, near the top)
circle 1.0,0.9 0.44 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.7
circle 1.0,0.9 0.44 stroke #1a1a1a
# Slight warm glow from fire inside
circle 1.0,0.9 0.44 fill #cc5500 0.04

# Ring 5 — cracked rock (closest to chimney, heat-worn)
circle 1.0,0.9 0.3 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.7
circle 1.0,0.9 0.3 stroke #1a1a1a
# Warm glow bleeding through near chimney
circle 1.0,0.9 0.3 fill #cc5500 0.08

# Radial brick joint lines (spokes, visible across all rings)
line 1.0,0.05 1.0,0.6 stroke #1a1a1a
line 0.35,0.4 0.65,0.7 stroke #1a1a1a
line 1.65,0.4 1.35,0.7 stroke #1a1a1a
line 0.2,0.75 0.55,0.85 stroke #1a1a1a
line 1.8,0.75 1.45,0.85 stroke #1a1a1a
line 0.18,1.1 0.55,1.0 stroke #1a1a1a
line 1.82,1.1 1.45,1.0 stroke #1a1a1a

# === Chimney opening (centered on dome at 1.0, 0.9) ===
# Smoke/heat haze
circle 1.0,0.9 0.28 fill #333333 0.12
# Chimney opening
circle 1.0,0.9 0.18 fill #0a0500 0.75
circle 1.0,0.9 0.18 stroke #222222
# Inner soot ring
circle 1.0,0.9 0.14 stroke #1a1a1a
# Heat shimmer from chimney
circle 1.0,0.9 0.08 fill #cc3300 0.15

# === Front opening (south) — integrated into the dome shape ===
# The opening is part of the circle — thick brick arch curves around the mouth
# Dark interior visible through the opening (wedge shape from dome edge inward)
poly 0.65,1.5 0.7,1.72 1.3,1.72 1.35,1.5 fill #1a0800 0.75

# Arch — two thick curved brick pillars forming the mouth sides
# Left arch pillar (follows dome curve)
poly 0.55,1.25 0.62,1.2 0.68,1.55 0.62,1.72 0.55,1.72 0.48,1.45 texfill polyhaven/brick_4 0.88
poly 0.55,1.25 0.62,1.2 0.68,1.55 0.62,1.72 0.55,1.72 0.48,1.45 stroke #1a1a1a
# Right arch pillar
poly 1.38,1.2 1.45,1.25 1.52,1.45 1.45,1.72 1.38,1.72 1.32,1.55 texfill polyhaven/brick_4 0.88
poly 1.38,1.2 1.45,1.25 1.52,1.45 1.45,1.72 1.38,1.72 1.32,1.55 stroke #1a1a1a

# Arch mantle (curved brick piece spanning across top of opening)
# Connects the two pillars and blends into the dome
poly 0.52,1.22 0.62,1.18 0.75,1.4 0.85,1.48 1.0,1.5 1.15,1.48 1.25,1.4 1.38,1.18 1.48,1.22 1.42,1.3 1.28,1.48 1.15,1.55 1.0,1.58 0.85,1.55 0.72,1.48 0.58,1.3 texfill polyhaven/brick_4 0.9
poly 0.52,1.22 0.62,1.18 0.75,1.4 0.85,1.48 1.0,1.5 1.15,1.48 1.25,1.4 1.38,1.18 1.48,1.22 1.42,1.3 1.28,1.48 1.15,1.55 1.0,1.58 0.85,1.55 0.72,1.48 0.58,1.3 stroke #1a1a1a
# Keystone at top of arch
poly 0.95,1.48 1.0,1.44 1.05,1.48 1.05,1.55 1.0,1.58 0.95,1.55 fill #5a3018 0.7

# Fire visible inside the opening
ellipse 1.0,1.6 0.28,0.12 fill #cc3300 0.5
ellipse 1.0,1.58 0.2,0.08 fill #e85500 0.55
ellipse 1.0,1.56 0.14,0.06 fill #ff8800 0.5
ellipse 1.0,1.54 0.08,0.04 fill #ffcc00 0.6

# === Warm glow spilling onto floor ===
ellipse 1.0,1.82 0.35,0.15 fill #e85500 0.1
ellipse 1.0,1.88 0.25,0.1 fill #ff8800 0.06
props.forge-great:
name: Great Forge
category: Workshop
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: yes
height: 4
placement: wall
room_types: forge, smithy-large, foundry-great, infernal-forge
typical_count: single
clusters_with: anvil, bellows, hammer, ingot-stack, slag-heap, quench-trough
lights:
  - type: brazier
    x: 1.0
    y: 1.3
    radius: 22
    color: "#ff6020"
    intensity: 1.4
notes: Massive double-hearth smithing forge. Twin arched mouths face south, huge chimney vents heat through the top, heavy masonry on all sides. Dwarven or military scale — larger than basic forge.
---
# Hitbox: masonry block (excludes the south floor spill)
hitbox rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,1.55 z 0-4

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: truncated-D-shaped masonry mass, flat along north wall, twin arched mouths south, central chimney vent

# === Ambient heat haze on floor (drawn first, behind everything) ===
ellipse 1.0,1.88 0.85,0.10 fill #e85500 0.12
ellipse 1.0,1.82 0.7,0.08 fill #ff8800 0.08

# === Outer masonry block (massive squared foundation) ===
rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,1.55 texfill polyhaven/cobblestone_floor_01 0.85
rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,1.55 stroke #0a0a0a width 2
# Dark weathered edge
rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,1.55 fill #1a0a05 0.18

# === Corner quoin stones (big cut blocks at corners — signal "grand") ===
rect 0.08,0.08 0.28,0.26 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.85
rect 0.08,0.08 0.28,0.26 stroke #0a0a0a
rect 1.64,0.08 0.28,0.26 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.85
rect 1.64,0.08 0.28,0.26 stroke #0a0a0a
rect 0.08,1.37 0.28,0.26 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.85
rect 0.08,1.37 0.28,0.26 stroke #0a0a0a
rect 1.64,1.37 0.28,0.26 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.85
rect 1.64,1.37 0.28,0.26 stroke #0a0a0a

# === Mortar joints (coursed masonry pattern) ===
line 0.08,0.45 1.92,0.45 stroke #0a0a0a 0.55
line 0.08,0.85 1.92,0.85 stroke #0a0a0a 0.55
line 0.08,1.20 1.92,1.20 stroke #0a0a0a 0.55
line 0.55,0.08 0.55,1.63 stroke #0a0a0a 0.4
line 1.00,0.08 1.00,1.63 stroke #0a0a0a 0.4
line 1.45,0.08 1.45,1.63 stroke #0a0a0a 0.4

# === Inner brick core (shows through under chimney + mouths) ===
rect 0.30,0.30 1.40,1.10 texfill polyhaven/brick_4 0.9
rect 0.30,0.30 1.40,1.10 stroke #0a0600 width 2

# Brick courses inside
line 0.30,0.55 1.70,0.55 stroke #0a0600 0.55
line 0.30,0.80 1.70,0.80 stroke #0a0600 0.55
line 0.30,1.05 1.70,1.05 stroke #0a0600 0.55

# === Central chimney vent (large circular opening on top) ===
# Smoke halo
circle 1.0,0.60 0.24 fill #333333 0.25
# Dark cavity
circle 1.0,0.60 0.18 fill #0a0400 0.9
circle 1.0,0.60 0.18 stroke #0a0a0a width 2
# Soot-stained inner ring
circle 1.0,0.60 0.14 stroke #1a0a06 width 2
# Heat bloom glimpsed inside
circle 1.0,0.60 0.10 fill #cc3300 0.45
circle 1.0,0.60 0.06 fill #ff6600 0.65
circle 1.0,0.60 0.03 fill #ffaa00 0.85

# === Twin arched hearth mouths opening south ===

# --- LEFT HEARTH ---
# Dark cavernous interior
poly 0.32,1.10 0.30,1.60 0.86,1.60 0.88,1.10 fill #0a0400 0.9
poly 0.32,1.10 0.30,1.60 0.86,1.60 0.88,1.10 stroke #0a0a0a
# Arch keystone & lintel (brick ring around mouth)
poly 0.28,1.00 0.35,0.96 0.83,0.96 0.90,1.00 0.90,1.18 0.82,1.12 0.36,1.12 0.28,1.18 texfill polyhaven/brick_4 0.92

props.fossil-embedded:
name: Fossil Embedded
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no

height: 0.5
placement: floor
room_types: cave, elemental-earth-node, tomb, natural-cavern, museum

---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: rectangular stone base with detailed ammonite fossil carving in center

# === Stone slab base ===
rect 0.08,0.10 0.84,0.80 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.8
rect 0.08,0.10 0.84,0.80 stroke #666666

# Slab surface variation (subtle darker patch)
rect 0.12,0.14 0.76,0.72 fill #777777 0.08

# === Ammonite fossil (spiral shell, carved/embedded in stone) ===
# Outer spiral ring
arc 0.50,0.50 0.28 0 350 stroke #8b7355 width 2
# Second ring
arc 0.50,0.50 0.22 20 370 stroke #8b7355 width 2
# Third ring
arc 0.50,0.50 0.16 40 380 stroke #8b7355 width 2
# Fourth ring (inner)
arc 0.50,0.50 0.10 60 390 stroke #8b7355 width 2
# Innermost whorl
arc 0.50,0.50 0.05 80 400 stroke #8b7355 width 2

# Spiral connecting segments (linking the rings into a continuous spiral)
line 0.50,0.22 0.52,0.28 stroke #8b7355 width 1
line 0.50,0.28 0.52,0.34 stroke #8b7355 width 1
line 0.50,0.34 0.52,0.40 stroke #8b7355 width 1
line 0.50,0.40 0.51,0.45 stroke #8b7355 width 1

# Rib lines radiating from the spiral (shell texture)
line 0.30,0.35 0.35,0.30 stroke #9a8565 width 1
line 0.28,0.50 0.34,0.46 stroke #9a8565 width 1
line 0.32,0.65 0.38,0.60 stroke #9a8565 width 1
line 0.50,0.75 0.50,0.68 stroke #9a8565 width 1
line 0.68,0.65 0.62,0.60 stroke #9a8565 width 1
line 0.72,0.50 0.66,0.46 stroke #9a8565 width 1
line 0.68,0.35 0.62,0.32 stroke #9a8565 width 1

# Central fossil eye (dark pit)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.03 fill #444444 0.6

# Fossil shadow (recessed carving effect)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.30 fill #000000 0.06

# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 1.0,0.86 0.80 z 0-3

line 1.0,0.86 0.30,1.16 stroke #4a2010 0.4
line 1.0,0.86 1.70,1.16 stroke #4a2010 0.4

props.grand-staircase:
name: Grand Staircase
category: Structure
footprint: 3x3
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 4
placement: wall
room_types: mansion-grand-hall, manor-foyer, noble-villa, reception-hall, estate, great-hall
typical_count: single
clusters_with: banner-heraldic, tapestry-large, statue-noble, coat-rack-ornate
notes: Base landing of a grand staircase ascending north. Marble steps with ornate balustrades on each side and a central carpet runner.
---
# footprint 3x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-3

# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.40,0.10 2.20,2.80 z 0-2

# Base landing platform (full footprint marble)
rect 0.10,0.10 2.80,2.80 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.88
rect 0.10,0.10 2.80,2.80 stroke #777777 width 2

# Left balustrade solid rail (west side, continuous strip)
rect 0.10,0.10 0.30,2.70 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.92
rect 0.10,0.10 0.30,2.70 stroke #666666 width 2

# Right balustrade solid rail (east side)
rect 2.60,0.10 0.30,2.70 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.92
rect 2.60,0.10 0.30,2.70 stroke #666666 width 2

# Left balustrade top-cap line (highlight)
line 0.40,0.10 0.40,2.80 stroke #aaaaaa width 2

# Right balustrade top-cap line
line 2.60,0.10 2.60,2.80 stroke #aaaaaa width 2

# Balustrade posts/spindles visible as small circles along the rails (west)
circle 0.25,0.40 0.08 fill #aaaaaa 0.85
circle 0.25,0.40 0.08 stroke #555555
circle 0.25,0.90 0.06 fill #aaaaaa 0.8
circle 0.25,1.40 0.06 fill #aaaaaa 0.8
circle 0.25,1.90 0.06 fill #aaaaaa 0.8
circle 0.25,2.40 0.06 fill #aaaaaa 0.8

# Balustrade posts (east)
circle 2.75,0.40 0.08 fill #aaaaaa 0.85
circle 2.75,0.40 0.08 stroke #555555
circle 2.75,0.90 0.06 fill #aaaaaa 0.8
circle 2.75,1.40 0.06 fill #aaaaaa 0.8
circle 2.75,1.90 0.06 fill #aaaaaa 0.8
circle 2.75,2.40 0.06 fill #aaaaaa 0.8

# Newel posts at south end (ornate large knobs at base of rail)
circle 0.25,2.70 0.14 fill #f8f0e0 0.95
circle 0.25,2.70 0.14 stroke #555555 width 2
circle 0.25,2.70 0.08 fill #daa520 0.85
circle 0.25,2.70 0.08 stroke #5a3a00

circle 2.75,2.70 0.14 fill #f8f0e0 0.95
circle 2.75,2.70 0.14 stroke #555555 width 2
circle 2.75,2.70 0.08 fill #daa520 0.85
circle 2.75,2.70 0.08 stroke #5a3a00

# Central stair steps ascending north — a series of horizontal lines (each is a step edge)
# Step edges drawn as shadow lines (strong at south end, fade up)
rect 0.40,0.20 2.20,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.90
rect 0.40,0.50 2.20,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.88
rect 0.40,0.80 2.20,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.86
rect 0.40,1.10 2.20,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.84
rect 0.40,1.40 2.20,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.82
rect 0.40,1.70 2.20,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.80
rect 0.40,2.00 2.20,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.78
rect 0.40,2.30 2.20,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.76

# Step edge shadow lines (the line between each tread/riser)
line 0.40,0.50 2.60,0.50 stroke #444444 width 2
line 0.40,0.80 2.60,0.80 stroke #444444 width 2
line 0.40,1.10 2.60,1.10 stroke #444444 width 2
line 0.40,1.40 2.60,1.40 stroke #444444 width 2
line 0.40,1.70 2.60,1.70 stroke #444444 width 2
line 0.40,2.00 2.60,2.00 stroke #444444 width 2
line 0.40,2.30 2.60,2.30 stroke #444444 width 2
line 0.40,2.60 2.60,2.60 stroke #444444 width 2

# Carpet runner down center of staircase (deep red with gold trim)
rect 0.80,0.15 1.40,2.70 texfill polyhaven/floral_jacquard 0.8
rect 0.80,0.15 1.40,2.70 fill #5a1a1a 0.55
rect 0.80,0.15 1.40,2.70 stroke #2a0810 width 2

# Carpet gold trim stripes
line 0.86,0.15 0.86,2.85 stroke #daa520 width 2
line 2.14,0.15 2.14,2.85 stroke #daa520 width 2

# Carpet tassel/fringe at south base
line 0.82,2.86 0.82,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 0.92,2.86 0.92,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.02,2.86 1.02,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.12,2.86 1.12,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.22,2.86 1.22,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.32,2.86 1.32,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.42,2.86 1.42,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.52,2.86 1.52,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.62,2.86 1.62,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.72,2.86 1.72,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.82,2.86 1.82,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 1.92,2.86 1.92,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 2.02,2.86 2.02,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 2.12,2.86 2.12,2.90 stroke #daa520 width 1
props.grandfather-clock:
name: Grandfather Clock
category: Furniture
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 6
placement: wall
room_types: house-merchant, mansion-grand-hall, mansion-library, noble-solar
typical_count: single
clusters_with: tapestry, wall-sconce, bust-on-pedestal, carpet
notes: Tall narrow long-case clock — from top-down only the decorative crown cap is visible (face, pendulum, case body are on the south front)
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.30,0.06 0.40,0.70 z 0-6

# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1. Wall at north, face on south.
# Top-down: narrow rectangle of the clock crown + case top.

# Shadow gap at wall (north edge)
rect 0.26,0.02 0.48,0.04 fill #000000 0.2

# Crown pediment (widest ornamental top — broken arch shape)
poly 0.24,0.06 0.76,0.06 0.72,0.16 0.58,0.14 0.50,0.10 0.42,0.14 0.28,0.16 fill #3a1f00 0.95
poly 0.24,0.06 0.76,0.06 0.72,0.16 0.58,0.14 0.50,0.10 0.42,0.14 0.28,0.16 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.55
poly 0.24,0.06 0.76,0.06 0.72,0.16 0.58,0.14 0.50,0.10 0.42,0.14 0.28,0.16 stroke #1a0f00

# Central finial (decorative spire/urn on top — visible from above)
poly 0.46,0.10 0.54,0.10 0.52,0.04 0.50,0.02 0.48,0.04 fill #daa520 0.9
poly 0.46,0.10 0.54,0.10 0.52,0.04 0.50,0.02 0.48,0.04 stroke #5a3a00

# Side finial caps (small brass ornaments on each end of pediment)
circle 0.26,0.10 0.028 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.26,0.10 0.028 stroke #5a3a00
circle 0.74,0.10 0.028 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.74,0.10 0.028 stroke #5a3a00

# Main clock case top (narrow rectangle body)
rect 0.30,0.16 0.40,0.60 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.30,0.16 0.40,0.60 fill #1a0f00 0.3
rect 0.30,0.16 0.40,0.60 stroke #2a1400

# Case top bevel edge
rect 0.32,0.18 0.36,0.56 stroke #5c3a1e 0.55 width 1

# Wood grain lines (along length of case)
line 0.32,0.30 0.68,0.30 stroke #5c3a1e 0.3
line 0.32,0.46 0.68,0.46 stroke #5c3a1e 0.3
line 0.32,0.62 0.68,0.62 stroke #5c3a1e 0.3

# Subtle dust shadow at back (near wall)
rect 0.30,0.18 0.40,0.06 fill #000000 0.1

# Front trim lip (south edge — where clock face panel sits below)
rect 0.30,0.72 0.40,0.06 fill #3a1f00 0.6
rect 0.30,0.72 0.40,0.06 stroke #2a1400

# Glass-panel hint on the front (very faint reflection visible only at edge)
rect 0.34,0.74 0.32,0.02 fill #aaaaaa 0.3

# Carved decorative inlay on top (diamond motif)
poly 0.46,0.40 0.50,0.36 0.54,0.40 0.50,0.44 stroke #5a3a00 0.6 width 1
circle 0.50,0.40 0.012 fill #5a3a00 0.7

# Wood knot detail
circle 0.60,0.56 0.012 fill #2a1400 0.6
circle 0.40,0.34 0.01 fill #2a1400 0.5

# Edge highlight (light catching top edge)
line 0.32,0.18 0.68,0.18 stroke #8b6914 0.35

notes: Concert harp seen edge-on (a harp is a thin planar instrument — from above you see only its profile). Soundbox base at the south end, pillar post rising north, scroll crown at the top.
---
# footprint 2x1: x 0-1, y 0-2. Harp stands vertically, viewed edge-on from above.
# === HITBOX — narrow profile along the spine ===
hitbox rect 0.40,0.15 0.20,1.75 z 0-1.8
# Soundbox base — widest element, sits on the floor at south
ellipse 0.50,1.82 0.22,0.12 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
ellipse 0.50,1.82 0.22,0.12 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
# Gilt trim ring around soundbox rim

ellipse 0.50,1.78 0.07,0.03 fill #1a1208 0.9
ellipse 0.50,1.78 0.07,0.03 stroke #3a1f00 width 1
# Pillar post — narrow vertical spine from soundbox up to the neck/crown
rect 0.45,0.20 0.10,1.58 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.92
rect 0.45,0.20 0.10,1.58 stroke #2a1400 width 1
# Gilt trim line along the pillar
line 0.48,0.22 0.48,1.76 stroke #daa520 0.75 width 1
# Neck curve — bezier arcing slightly off the pillar toward the strings
bezier 0.52,1.70 0.58,1.10 0.56,0.55 0.50,0.22 stroke #3a1f00 width 4
bezier 0.52,1.70 0.58,1.10 0.56,0.55 0.50,0.22 stroke #5c3a1e 0.7 width 2
# Strings — thin taut lines running along the spine between neck and soundbox

line 0.54,0.55 0.54,1.72 stroke #c8b898 0.80 width 1
line 0.56,0.75 0.56,1.72 stroke #e8dcc8 0.80 width 1
line 0.50,0.30 0.50,1.72 stroke #c8b898 0.75 width 1
line 0.48,0.45 0.48,1.72 stroke #e8dcc8 0.80 width 1
line 0.46,0.65 0.46,1.72 stroke #c8b898 0.75 width 1
line 0.44,0.90 0.44,1.72 stroke #e8dcc8 0.75 width 1
# Tuning pegs — small brass dots along the neck
circle 0.53,0.50 0.018 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.54,0.75 0.018 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.55,1.00 0.018 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.55,1.25 0.018 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.54,1.50 0.018 fill #daa520 0.9
# Ornate scroll crown at the top of the pillar (nearest the viewer)

circle 0.68,1.92 0.03 fill #1a0804 0.55

props.kiln-brick:
name: Brick Kiln
category: Workshop
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 3
placement: corner
room_types: kiln-pottery, house-medium-artisan
typical_count: single
clusters_with: forge, clay-lump, finished-pot, broken-pot, clay-bin
lights:
  - type: brazier
    x: 1.0
    y: 1.0
    radius: 14
    color: "#ff7030"
    intensity: 1.0
notes: Small brick kiln for firing pottery — square brick body with central firing chamber
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.15,0.15 1.70,1.70 z 0-3

# Ash and soot scatter at base (drawn first, behind kiln)
ellipse 1.00,1.90 0.55,0.12 fill #2a2018 0.5
ellipse 0.40,1.88 0.18,0.06 fill #2a2018 0.4
ellipse 1.60,1.88 0.18,0.06 fill #2a2018 0.4
# Warm glow spill on floor (from chimney)
ellipse 1.00,1.00 0.90,0.90 fill #ff7030 0.06

# === Outer square brick body ===
rect 0.15,0.15 1.70,1.70 texfill polyhaven/brick_4 0.88
rect 0.15,0.15 1.70,1.70 fill #2a1408 0.15
rect 0.15,0.15 1.70,1.70 stroke #1a0a04 width 2

# Inner shoulder step (thick wall of kiln)
rect 0.30,0.30 1.40,1.40 texfill polyhaven/brick_4 0.78
rect 0.30,0.30 1.40,1.40 stroke #1a0a04

# Soot-stained inner ring
rect 0.45,0.45 1.10,1.10 fill #1a0a04 0.55
rect 0.45,0.45 1.10,1.10 stroke #0a0400

# === Firing chamber (central circular opening — hot core) ===
# Dark outer chamber rim
circle 1.00,1.00 0.46 fill #1a0800 0.9
circle 1.00,1.00 0.46 stroke #0a0400 width 2
# Layered fire glow — outer embers
circle 1.00,1.00 0.40 fill #cc3300 0.55
# Mid glow
circle 1.00,1.00 0.32 fill #e85500 0.65
# Bright inner flame
circle 1.00,1.00 0.24 fill #ff8800 0.75
# Hot amber
circle 1.00,1.00 0.16 fill #ffaa00 0.85
# Hottest core
circle 1.00,1.00 0.09 fill #ffcc00 0.95
# White-hot center spark
circle 1.00,1.00 0.04 fill #ffffcc 0.9

# === Small chimney opening (offset NE from center) ===
circle 1.50,0.50 0.12 fill #1a0800 0.85
circle 1.50,0.50 0.12 stroke #0a0400
# Heat shimmer from chimney
circle 1.50,0.50 0.07 fill #cc3300 0.45
circle 1.50,0.50 0.035 fill #ff8800 0.6

# === Brick joint lines on outer body (mortar seams) ===
line 0.15,0.60 0.30,0.60 stroke #1a0a04 0.7
line 1.70,0.60 1.85,0.60 stroke #1a0a04 0.7
line 0.15,1.30 0.30,1.30 stroke #1a0a04 0.7
line 1.70,1.30 1.85,1.30 stroke #1a0a04 0.7
line 0.60,0.15 0.60,0.30 stroke #1a0a04 0.7
line 1.30,0.15 1.30,0.30 stroke #1a0a04 0.7
line 0.60,1.70 0.60,1.85 stroke #1a0a04 0.7
line 1.30,1.70 1.30,1.85 stroke #1a0a04 0.7

# === Heat-scorched highlight around firing chamber ===
arc 1.00,1.00 0.50 200 340 stroke #ff8800 0.4 width 2

# Soot streak trailing from chimney
ellipse 1.50,0.36 0.10,0.06 fill #1a0a04 0.6

# Top-down: ladder leaning against north wall, heavily foreshortened

# Floor feet are at south (wide apart), top rests against wall at north (close together)

poly 0.2,0.85 0.8,0.85 0.55,0.25 0.45,0.25 fill #1a1208 0.15

poly 0.72,0.88 0.82,0.88 0.57,0.15 0.53,0.15 stroke #3a1f00

rect 0.28,0.78 0.44,0.05 stroke #2a1400

rect 0.43,0.28 0.14,0.03 fill #4a2800 0.6

# === Rail tips resting on wall (north edge) ===
rect 0.42,0.12 0.06,0.05 fill #3a2000 0.8
rect 0.52,0.12 0.06,0.05 fill #3a2000 0.8

# === Floor feet (rubber/iron caps at south end) ===

rect 0.73,0.86 0.08,0.04 fill #555555 0.6

room_types: fairground-seasonal, festival-grounds, village-green, tavern, temple
typical_count: few
clusters_with: bunting-line, game-booth, stage-performance, bonfire-large, pie-stand
notes: Round paper lantern on short post with warm yellow glow; festive lighting
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1

# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.28 z 0-1.0

# === Soft outer glow (spills onto ground) ===
circle 0.5,0.5 0.48 fill #ffcc60 0.15
circle 0.5,0.5 0.40 fill #ffcc60 0.25

# === Post base (seen from above as small dark circle) ===
circle 0.5,0.5 0.05 fill #3a2418 0.9
circle 0.5,0.5 0.05 stroke #1a0a04

# === Lantern body (round paper sphere, seen from above = circle) ===
# Outer paper shell
circle 0.5,0.5 0.30 fill #ffeec0 0.85
circle 0.5,0.5 0.30 stroke #8b6914

# Paper panels / ribs (visible as radiating lines)
line 0.50,0.20 0.50,0.80 stroke #8b6914 0.6 width 1
line 0.20,0.50 0.80,0.50 stroke #8b6914 0.6 width 1
line 0.29,0.29 0.71,0.71 stroke #8b6914 0.5 width 1
line 0.71,0.29 0.29,0.71 stroke #8b6914 0.5 width 1

# Inner glow (brighter center where candle sits)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.22 fill #ffdc80 0.7
circle 0.5,0.5 0.14 fill #ffee90 0.85
circle 0.5,0.5 0.08 fill #ffffcc 0.9

# === Top cap (small wooden disc on top of lantern) ===
circle 0.5,0.5 0.09 fill #5c3a1e 0.5
circle 0.5,0.5 0.09 stroke #2a1408 0.6

# Top crown (small handle loop)
arc 0.5,0.48 0.06 200 340 stroke #3a2418 width 2

# Hanging tassel (small red decoration south)
line 0.5,0.80 0.5,0.86 stroke #c82020 width 2
circle 0.5,0.88 0.025 fill #c82020 0.9
circle 0.5,0.88 0.025 stroke #5a1010

# Decorative paint trim (band around lantern)
arc 0.5,0.5 0.28 10 80 stroke #c82020 0.7 width 2
arc 0.5,0.5 0.28 100 170 stroke #c82020 0.7 width 2
arc 0.5,0.5 0.28 190 260 stroke #c82020 0.7 width 2
arc 0.5,0.5 0.28 280 350 stroke #c82020 0.7 width 2
props.lantern-post:
name: Lantern Post
category: Lighting
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 7
lights: [{"preset":"lantern","x":0.5,"y":0.5}]
placement: floor
room_types: street, courtyard, dock, garden
typical_count: few
clusters_with:
notes: Standing light; place along paths or at intersections
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox poly 0.50,0.68 0.62,0.72 0.70,0.80 0.66,0.90 0.50,0.94 0.34,0.90 0.30,0.80 0.38,0.72 z 0-1
hitbox circle 0.50,0.62 0.06 z 1-5
hitbox poly 0.50,0.18 0.64,0.22 0.72,0.34 0.72,0.50 0.64,0.62 0.50,0.66 0.36,0.62 0.28,0.50 0.28,0.34 0.36,0.22 z 5-7

# Warm glow halo (ground level, drawn first)
circle 0.50,0.42 0.44 fill #ffaa00 0.06
circle 0.50,0.42 0.32 fill #ffcc44 0.08
# Decorative octagonal base plate (ground level)
poly 0.50,0.68 0.62,0.72 0.70,0.80 0.66,0.90 0.50,0.94 0.34,0.90 0.30,0.80 0.38,0.72 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.80
poly 0.50,0.68 0.62,0.72 0.70,0.80 0.66,0.90 0.50,0.94 0.34,0.90 0.30,0.80 0.38,0.72 stroke #444444
# Base plate inner bevel
poly 0.50,0.72 0.58,0.75 0.64,0.81 0.61,0.88 0.50,0.90 0.39,0.88 0.36,0.81 0.42,0.75 stroke #555555
# Post cross-section (circle from above, mid-height)
circle 0.50,0.62 0.06 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.85
circle 0.50,0.62 0.06 stroke #444444
# Lantern housing — outer octagonal frame (tallest, closest to eye)
poly 0.50,0.18 0.64,0.22 0.72,0.34 0.72,0.50 0.64,0.62 0.50,0.66 0.36,0.62 0.28,0.50 0.28,0.34 0.36,0.22 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.80
poly 0.50,0.18 0.64,0.22 0.72,0.34 0.72,0.50 0.64,0.62 0.50,0.66 0.36,0.62 0.28,0.50 0.28,0.34 0.36,0.22 stroke #444444
# Glass panels (warm amber glow between frame struts)
poly 0.50,0.22 0.60,0.25 0.66,0.34 0.66,0.50 0.60,0.58 0.50,0.62 0.40,0.58 0.34,0.50 0.34,0.34 0.40,0.25 fill #ffcc44 0.20
# Frame struts (cross-bars across glass)
line 0.50,0.18 0.50,0.66 stroke #555555
line 0.28,0.42 0.72,0.42 stroke #555555
# Flame glow layers (center of lantern)
circle 0.50,0.42 0.14 fill #e85500 0.25
circle 0.50,0.42 0.10 fill #ffaa00 0.40
circle 0.50,0.42 0.06 fill #ffcc00 0.60
circle 0.50,0.42 0.03 fill #ffffff 0.50
# Decorative cap / finial (very top, drawn last)
circle 0.50,0.42 0.05 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.90
circle 0.50,0.42 0.05 stroke #444444
# Finial point
circle 0.50,0.42 0.02 fill #8899aa 0.70
props.lapdog-cushion:

line 0.50,0.24 0.52,0.18 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 0.50,0.24 0.50,0.16 stroke #daa520 width 1
line 0.50,0.76 0.48,0.82 stroke #daa520 width 1

# Embroidered monogram in center (gold)
poly 0.48,0.46 0.50,0.42 0.52,0.46 0.50,0.50 fill #daa520 0.7
poly 0.48,0.54 0.50,0.50 0.52,0.54 0.50,0.58 fill #daa520 0.7
# Stuffing tuft peeking out

# Shed fur bits (white dog hair)
circle 0.66,0.42 0.01 fill #e8e0d8 0.8
circle 0.32,0.58 0.008 fill #e8e0d8 0.8
circle 0.60,0.58 0.01 fill #e8e0d8 0.75
# Velvet fabric sheen (nap direction)
arc 0.5,0.5 0.30 210 260 stroke #8040a0 0.5 width 1
arc 0.5,0.5 0.24 220 250 stroke #8040a0 0.4 width 1
# Stitched quilted pattern (diamond)
line 0.40,0.40 0.60,0.60 stroke #2a0838 0.4
line 0.40,0.60 0.60,0.40 stroke #2a0838 0.4
# Cushion tufting buttons
circle 0.40,0.40 0.018 fill #5a0868 0.85
circle 0.40,0.40 0.018 stroke #daa520 0.7
circle 0.60,0.40 0.018 fill #5a0868 0.85
circle 0.60,0.40 0.018 stroke #daa520 0.7
circle 0.40,0.60 0.018 fill #5a0868 0.85
circle 0.40,0.60 0.018 stroke #daa520 0.7
circle 0.60,0.60 0.018 fill #5a0868 0.85
circle 0.60,0.60 0.018 stroke #daa520 0.7

poly 0.38,0.86 0.44,0.82 0.48,0.90 0.42,0.94 fill #4a8030 0.88
poly 0.38,0.86 0.44,0.82 0.48,0.90 0.42,0.94 stroke #2a5018 width 1
# SW
poly 0.20,0.72 0.28,0.72 0.30,0.80 0.22,0.82 fill #5a9038 0.88
poly 0.20,0.72 0.28,0.72 0.30,0.80 0.22,0.82 stroke #2a5018 width 1
# West
poly 0.08,0.42 0.16,0.46 0.18,0.54 0.10,0.56 fill #4a8030 0.9
poly 0.08,0.42 0.16,0.46 0.18,0.54 0.10,0.56 stroke #2a5018 width 1

circle 0.30,0.70 0.02 fill #ffd700 0.9
