props.lava-fountain:
name: Lava Fountain
category: Features
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 1.4
placement: center
room_types: elemental-fire-node, volcano-caldera, elemental-node
typical_count: single
clusters_with: fire-node-core, molten-pool-small, basalt-pillar
notes: Stone bowl fountain with liquid lava gushing up. Splash ring of molten drops radiates from the central jet.
lights:
  - type: torch
    x: 1.0
    y: 1.0
    radius: 16
    color: "#ff5020"
    intensity: 1.0
---
# Heat halo
circle 1.0,1.0 0.95 gradient-radial #ff5020 #0a0400 0.35

# Outer stone bowl rim
ring 1.0,1.0 0.85 0.7 texfill polyhaven/volcanic_rock_tiles 0.85
ring 1.0,1.0 0.85 0.7 fill #2a1500 0.4
ring 1.0,1.0 0.85 0.7 stroke #000000 width 2

# Bowl edge highlight
circle 1.0,1.0 0.85 stroke #5a3a00 width 1

# Bowl interior filled with lava
circle 1.0,1.0 0.7 fill #1a0800 0.95
circle 1.0,1.0 0.68 fill #cc3300 0.7
circle 1.0,1.0 0.62 fill #e85500 0.8
circle 1.0,1.0 0.55 fill #ff6030 0.85

# Cooled crust patches floating on the lava
poly 0.55,0.85 0.7,0.82 0.75,0.95 0.65,1.02 0.55,0.95 fill #2a1500 0.8
poly 0.55,0.85 0.7,0.82 0.75,0.95 0.65,1.02 0.55,0.95 stroke #000000 width 1
poly 1.25,1.1 1.38,1.08 1.44,1.2 1.35,1.3 1.25,1.22 fill #2a1500 0.8
poly 1.25,1.1 1.38,1.08 1.44,1.2 1.35,1.3 1.25,1.22 stroke #000000 width 1

# Central lava jet gushing up (viewed as a bright bulb from above)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.32 fill #ff8030 0.9
circle 1.0,1.0 0.25 fill #ffaa30 0.95
circle 1.0,1.0 0.18 fill #ffcc60 1.0
circle 1.0,1.0 0.12 fill #ffffff 0.85

# Splash droplets arcing out (molten specks)
circle 1.0,0.35 0.05 fill #ffaa30 0.95
circle 1.0,0.35 0.03 fill #ffffff 0.8
circle 1.0,1.65 0.045 fill #ffaa30 0.9
circle 1.0,1.65 0.025 fill #ffcc60 0.85
circle 0.35,1.0 0.045 fill #ffaa30 0.9
circle 0.35,1.0 0.025 fill #ffcc60 0.85
circle 1.65,1.0 0.045 fill #ffaa30 0.9
circle 1.65,1.0 0.025 fill #ffcc60 0.85

# Diagonal splash droplets
circle 0.5,0.5 0.035 fill #ff8030 0.85
circle 1.5,0.5 0.035 fill #ff8030 0.85
circle 0.5,1.5 0.035 fill #ff8030 0.85
circle 1.5,1.5 0.035 fill #ff8030 0.85

# Rising flecks and sparks
circle 0.7,0.55 0.022 fill #ffcc60 0.8
circle 1.3,0.6 0.02 fill #ffaa30 0.75
circle 0.7,1.42 0.02 fill #ffaa30 0.8
props.leaf-drift:
name: Leaf Drift
category: Decorative
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: elemental-air-node, elemental-node, storm-spire, genie-court
typical_count: many
clusters_with: feather-drift, seed-float
notes: Scatter of autumn leaves caught mid-spin — ochre, rust, and gold.
---
# Subtle air swirl halo
circle 0.5,0.5 0.4 gradient-radial #ddc090 #1a1408 0.12

# Leaf 1 — ochre, upper-left (oak-shaped lobes)
poly 0.25,0.2 0.32,0.15 0.38,0.22 0.36,0.3 0.3,0.34 0.22,0.3 fill #b8742a 0.85
poly 0.25,0.2 0.32,0.15 0.38,0.22 0.36,0.3 0.3,0.34 0.22,0.3 stroke #5a3008 width 1
line 0.28,0.2 0.30,0.32 stroke #5a3008 width 1

# Leaf 2 — rust red, center (maple-ish)
poly 0.55,0.42 0.62,0.38 0.7,0.42 0.72,0.5 0.65,0.56 0.58,0.58 0.5,0.55 0.48,0.48 fill #a03020 0.85
poly 0.55,0.42 0.62,0.38 0.7,0.42 0.72,0.5 0.65,0.56 0.58,0.58 0.5,0.55 0.48,0.48 stroke #4a1008 width 1
line 0.6,0.4 0.6,0.56 stroke #4a1008 width 1
line 0.52,0.48 0.68,0.48 stroke #4a1008 width 1

# Leaf 3 — gold yellow, lower-right
poly 0.65,0.72 0.78,0.7 0.85,0.78 0.8,0.88 0.7,0.9 0.63,0.82 fill #d4a020 0.85
poly 0.65,0.72 0.78,0.7 0.85,0.78 0.8,0.88 0.7,0.9 0.63,0.82 stroke #6a4808 width 1
line 0.68,0.74 0.78,0.88 stroke #6a4808 width 1

# Leaf 4 — small ochre, lower-left
poly 0.2,0.75 0.28,0.72 0.32,0.8 0.25,0.86 0.18,0.82 fill #a8642a 0.8
poly 0.2,0.75 0.28,0.72 0.32,0.8 0.25,0.86 0.18,0.82 stroke #5a3008 width 1

# Tiny leaf bits and motes
circle 0.45,0.25 0.025 fill #c08030 0.7
circle 0.8,0.3 0.02 fill #d4a020 0.65
circle 0.4,0.7 0.018 fill #a03020 0.6
props.leather-apron:
name: Leather Apron
category: Clutter
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 1.5
placement: wall
room_types: cooperage, foundry-great, mill-lumber, forge, smithy-large, shop-tailor, glassworks, butcher-shop, tannery
typical_count: single
clusters_with: tool-rack, weapon-rack, workbench, anvil
notes: Heavy work apron hanging from a peg; burn marks suggest smithy use
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.20,0.10 0.60,0.70 z 0-1.5

# Peg (small dark dot at top — where apron hangs)
circle 0.50,0.08 0.03 fill #2a1400 0.9
# Neck strap loop
bezier 0.42,0.10 0.44,0.14 0.56,0.14 0.58,0.10 stroke #3a2010 width 2
# Apron top bib (narrow)
poly 0.42,0.14 0.58,0.14 0.60,0.28 0.40,0.28 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
poly 0.42,0.14 0.58,0.14 0.60,0.28 0.40,0.28 stroke #2a1400
# Apron main body (wider)
poly 0.40,0.28 0.60,0.28 0.72,0.52 0.70,0.76 0.30,0.76 0.28,0.52 fill #6b4a2e 0.92
poly 0.40,0.28 0.60,0.28 0.72,0.52 0.70,0.76 0.30,0.76 0.28,0.52 texfill polyhaven/brown_leather 0.6
poly 0.40,0.28 0.60,0.28 0.72,0.52 0.70,0.76 0.30,0.76 0.28,0.52 stroke #2a1400
# Waist tie strings (going off to east and west)
bezier 0.28,0.52 0.20,0.48 0.14,0.50 0.10,0.54 stroke #3a2010 width 2
bezier 0.72,0.52 0.80,0.48 0.86,0.50 0.90,0.54 stroke #3a2010 width 2
# Stitching seams (dark lines)
line 0.40,0.30 0.40,0.74 stroke #2a1400 0.6
line 0.60,0.30 0.60,0.74 stroke #2a1400 0.6
# Cross-stitching
line 0.32,0.54 0.68,0.54 stroke #3a2010 0.5
# Burn marks/scorch spots
circle 0.46,0.42 0.04 fill #1a1008 0.7
circle 0.56,0.58 0.035 fill #1a1008 0.7
circle 0.40,0.64 0.03 fill #2a1808 0.6
# Metal grommets on top
circle 0.44,0.20 0.02 fill #666666 0.9
circle 0.56,0.20 0.02 fill #666666 0.9
# Stain streaks (oil / ash)
line 0.40,0.38 0.38,0.52 stroke #1a1008 0.4
line 0.58,0.46 0.62,0.62 stroke #1a1008 0.4
# Hem line at bottom
line 0.30,0.74 0.70,0.74 stroke #3a2010 0.7
# Pocket (small rectangular stitched pocket)
rect 0.44,0.50 0.12,0.12 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1
props.leather-stack:
name: Leather Stack
category: Containers
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.4
placement: floor
room_types: tannery, workshop, shop-tailor
typical_count: few
clusters_with: tanning-rack, hide-scraps, crate-stack, workbench
notes: Stack of folded finished leather sheets; place along workshop walls or near benches
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.15,0.15 0.70,0.70 z 0-0.4

# Bottom sheet (largest, slightly offset SE)
rect 0.18,0.22 0.70,0.66 texfill polyhaven/brown_leather 0.85
rect 0.18,0.22 0.70,0.66 fill #5c3a1e 0.35
rect 0.18,0.22 0.70,0.66 stroke #2a1400
# Stitching along bottom sheet edge
line 0.22,0.26 0.84,0.26 stroke #c8b898 0.7 width 1
line 0.22,0.84 0.84,0.84 stroke #c8b898 0.7 width 1
# Middle sheet (offset NW from bottom)
rect 0.14,0.16 0.68,0.64 texfill polyhaven/brown_leather 0.88
rect 0.14,0.16 0.68,0.64 fill #6b4a2e 0.3
rect 0.14,0.16 0.68,0.64 stroke #2a1400
# Stitching on middle sheet
line 0.18,0.20 0.78,0.20 stroke #c8b898 0.7 width 1
line 0.18,0.76 0.78,0.76 stroke #c8b898 0.7 width 1
# Top sheet (smaller, offset slightly NE)
rect 0.20,0.10 0.64,0.60 texfill polyhaven/brown_leather 0.9
rect 0.20,0.10 0.64,0.60 fill #8a6040 0.3

notes: Stacked logs; place near camps or against cabin walls
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.05,0.10 1.90,1.82 z 0-3

# Bottom layer — 3 logs spread across full footprint height
# South log (bottom of pyramid, visible at south edge)

rect 0.05,0.80 1.90,0.42 stroke #3a1f00 0.45
line 0.10,1.01 1.90,1.01 stroke #6b4e2e 0.20
# North log (visible at north edge)
rect 0.05,0.10 1.90,0.42 texfill polyhaven/bark_brown_02 0.75
rect 0.05,0.10 1.90,0.42 stroke #3a1f00 0.45
line 0.10,0.31 1.90,0.31 stroke #6b4e2e 0.20
# Shadows under middle layer
rect 0.20,1.36 1.60,0.10 fill #000000 0.25
rect 0.20,0.66 1.60,0.10 fill #000000 0.25
# Middle layer — 2 logs centered on gaps between bottom 3
# South middle log (centered on gap at y=1.36)
rect 0.18,1.16 1.64,0.40 texfill polyhaven/bark_brown_02 0.82
rect 0.18,1.16 1.64,0.40 stroke #3a1f00 0.50
line 0.22,1.36 1.78,1.36 stroke #6b4e2e 0.22
# North middle log (centered on gap at y=0.66)

rect 0.18,0.46 1.64,0.40 stroke #3a1f00 0.50
line 0.22,0.66 1.78,0.66 stroke #6b4e2e 0.22
# Shadow under top layer
rect 0.38,0.91 1.24,0.10 fill #000000 0.28
# Top layer — 1 log centered on gap between middle 2 (y=1.01)
rect 0.35,0.82 1.30,0.38 texfill polyhaven/bark_brown_02 0.85
rect 0.35,0.82 1.30,0.38 stroke #3a1f00 0.55
line 0.40,1.01 1.60,1.01 stroke #6b4e2e 0.25
line 0.44,0.98 1.56,0.98 stroke #8b7355 0.15
props.log-round:
name: Log Round
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 1
placement: floor
room_types: lumberyard, mill-lumber, forest, cabin-hunters
typical_count: few
clusters_with: log-pile, firewood-stack, axe-head, wedge-iron, wood-chip
notes: Single thick section of tree trunk — chopping block
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.40 z 0-1

# Outer bark
circle 0.5,0.5 0.42 fill #3a1f00 0.9
circle 0.5,0.5 0.42 texfill polyhaven/bark_brown_02 0.7
circle 0.5,0.5 0.42 stroke #1a0f00
# Inner cut surface (exposed wood)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.38 fill #c8a060 0.95
circle 0.5,0.5 0.38 texfill polyhaven/wood_table 0.5
circle 0.5,0.5 0.38 stroke #5c3a1e
# Annual growth rings
circle 0.5,0.5 0.36 stroke #8a6830 0.6 width 1
circle 0.5,0.5 0.32 stroke #8a6830 0.6 width 1
circle 0.5,0.5 0.27 stroke #8a6830 0.6 width 1
circle 0.5,0.5 0.22 stroke #8a6830 0.6 width 1
circle 0.5,0.5 0.17 stroke #8a6830 0.6 width 1
circle 0.5,0.5 0.12 stroke #8a6830 0.6 width 1
circle 0.5,0.5 0.07 stroke #8a6830 0.6 width 1
# Heart/pith (darker center)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.05 fill #6a4020 0.85
circle 0.5,0.5 0.05 stroke #3a1f00
# Radial cracks (seasoning cracks)
line 0.50,0.12 0.50,0.28 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 0.50,0.72 0.50,0.88 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 0.18,0.50 0.28,0.50 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 0.82,0.50 0.72,0.50 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 0.26,0.26 0.34,0.34 stroke #3a1f00 0.8 width 1
line 0.74,0.26 0.66,0.34 stroke #3a1f00 0.8 width 1
line 0.26,0.74 0.34,0.66 stroke #3a1f00 0.8 width 1
line 0.74,0.74 0.66,0.66 stroke #3a1f00 0.8 width 1
# Knot holes (dark circles)
circle 0.34,0.42 0.025 fill #3a1f00 0.85
circle 0.34,0.42 0.025 stroke #1a0f00
circle 0.66,0.58 0.02 fill #3a1f00 0.85
circle 0.66,0.58 0.02 stroke #1a0f00
# Axe scar marks (from past chopping)
line 0.44,0.42 0.50,0.48 stroke #1a0f00 0.8 width 2
line 0.48,0.52 0.56,0.58 stroke #1a0f00 0.7 width 2
line 0.40,0.54 0.46,0.58 stroke #1a0f00 0.6 width 2
# Sap (dried amber)
ellipse 0.38,0.60 0.04,0.02 fill #d4a040 0.7
circle 0.62,0.38 0.015 fill #d4a040 0.7
# Bark texture details
arc 0.5,0.5 0.42 30 80 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 2
arc 0.5,0.5 0.42 200 250 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 2
arc 0.5,0.5 0.42 280 330 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 2
# Moss patch on bark
poly 0.16,0.58 0.20,0.54 0.22,0.62 0.18,0.66 fill #3a5028 0.7
poly 0.16,0.58 0.20,0.54 0.22,0.62 0.18,0.66 stroke #1a3010
# Wood chips at base (scattered)
poly 0.10,0.88 0.14,0.86 0.12,0.92 fill #8a5830 0.8
poly 0.86,0.90 0.90,0.88 0.92,0.92 fill #8a5830 0.8
# Highlight on top
arc 0.5,0.5 0.36 210 260 stroke #e8c880 0.5 width 1
props.log-seat:
name: Log Seat
category: Furniture
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.5
placement: floor
room_types: campsite-traveler, cabin-hunters, orc-war-camp, fairground-seasonal
typical_count: few
clusters_with: campfire, cook-pot-tripod, log-round, bedroll
notes: Short log-round used as a stool around a fire; arrange several in a ring around campfires
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: circular log end. Dark bark ring on the outside, flat sanded-smooth seat with visible concentric growth rings. Shorter than a chopping-block log-round — this is a stool.

# Bark ring (outer edge)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.40 texfill polyhaven/bark_brown_02 0.85
circle 0.50,0.50 0.40 fill #3a1f00 0.5
circle 0.50,0.50 0.40 stroke #1a0f00
# Bark ridge detail (chunky outer texture strokes)
arc 0.50,0.50 0.40 20 70 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 2
arc 0.50,0.50 0.40 130 180 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 2
arc 0.50,0.50 0.40 220 270 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 2
arc 0.50,0.50 0.40 310 350 stroke #2a1400 0.7 width 2

# Sapwood transition (lighter ring just inside bark)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.36 fill #a88050 0.7
circle 0.50,0.50 0.36 stroke #5c3a1e

# Flat worn seat surface (sanded smooth from use — warmer mid-tone)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.34 texfill polyhaven/brown_planks_09 0.80
circle 0.50,0.50 0.34 fill #b08860 0.45
circle 0.50,0.50 0.34 stroke #5c3a1e

# Concentric growth rings (visible on the seat top)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.30 stroke #8a6830 0.55 width 1
circle 0.50,0.50 0.24 stroke #8a6830 0.55 width 1
circle 0.50,0.50 0.18 stroke #8a6830 0.55 width 1
circle 0.50,0.50 0.12 stroke #8a6830 0.55 width 1

# Heart/pith center (darker core)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.05 fill #6a4020 0.85
circle 0.50,0.50 0.05 stroke #3a1f00

# Sit-polish highlight (smoother, slightly offset patch where people actually sit)
ellipse 0.48,0.46 0.14,0.10 fill #d4a878 0.25

# One small seasoning crack radiating from center
line 0.50,0.50 0.50,0.18 stroke #3a1f00 0.75 width 1
# A tiny knot
circle 0.38,0.56 0.022 fill #3a1f00 0.85
circle 0.38,0.56 0.022 stroke #1a0f00

props.longboat-cradle:
name: Longboat Cradle
category: Nautical
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.5
placement: center
room_types: ship-main-deck, ship-deck, galleon

clusters_with: mast-main, mast-fore, cargo-hatch, rope-coil
notes: Wooden cradle holding an upturned longboat stowed amidships; two curved struts support the inverted hull with keel running along the long axis.
---
# Footprint 2x2: x 0-2, y 0-2. Long axis runs N-S. Front (bow) south.

# === HITBOX (the overturned hull blocks light) ===
hitbox poly 0.74,0.08 1.26,0.08 1.48,0.50 1.52,1.00 1.48,1.50 1.26,1.92 0.74,1.92 0.52,1.50 0.48,1.00 0.52,0.50 z 0-2.5

# === Cradle arms (two curved wooden struts shaped like half-moons) ===
# North cradle arm (broader at base, curving up to cup the hull)
poly 0.28,0.36 0.36,0.30 0.50,0.28 0.70,0.34 1.00,0.36 1.30,0.34 1.50,0.28 1.64,0.30 1.72,0.36 1.68,0.44 1.50,0.48 1.30,0.52 1.00,0.54 0.70,0.52 0.50,0.48 0.32,0.44 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
poly 0.28,0.36 0.36,0.30 0.50,0.28 0.70,0.34 1.00,0.36 1.30,0.34 1.50,0.28 1.64,0.30 1.72,0.36 1.68,0.44 1.50,0.48 1.30,0.52 1.00,0.54 0.70,0.52 0.50,0.48 0.32,0.44 stroke #1a0f00

# South cradle arm (mirror)
poly 0.28,1.64 0.36,1.70 0.50,1.72 0.70,1.66 1.00,1.64 1.30,1.66 1.50,1.72 1.64,1.70 1.72,1.64 1.68,1.56 1.50,1.52 1.30,1.48 1.00,1.46 0.70,1.48 0.50,1.52 0.32,1.56 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
poly 0.28,1.64 0.36,1.70 0.50,1.72 0.70,1.66 1.00,1.64 1.30,1.66 1.50,1.72 1.64,1.70 1.68,1.56 1.50,1.52 1.30,1.48 1.00,1.46 0.70,1.48 0.50,1.52 0.32,1.56 stroke #1a0f00

# Cradle posts / feet where arms meet the deck (iron-capped)
rect 0.26,0.30 0.10,0.18 fill #2a1400 0.9
rect 0.26,0.30 0.10,0.18 stroke #1a0f00
rect 1.64,0.30 0.10,0.18 fill #2a1400 0.9
rect 1.64,0.30 0.10,0.18 stroke #1a0f00
rect 0.26,1.52 0.10,0.18 fill #2a1400 0.9
rect 0.26,1.52 0.10,0.18 stroke #1a0f00
rect 1.64,1.52 0.10,0.18 fill #2a1400 0.9
rect 1.64,1.52 0.10,0.18 stroke #1a0f00

# === Inverted longboat hull on top of cradle ===
# Overturned hull silhouette — pointed bow south, pointed stern north (both ends tapered because we see the bottom of the hull)
poly 1.00,0.10 0.82,0.22 0.60,0.46 0.52,0.90 0.52,1.10 0.60,1.54 0.82,1.78 1.00,1.90 1.18,1.78 1.40,1.54 1.48,1.10 1.48,0.90 1.40,0.46 1.18,0.22 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.88
poly 1.00,0.10 0.82,0.22 0.60,0.46 0.52,0.90 0.52,1.10 0.60,1.54 0.82,1.78 1.00,1.90 1.18,1.78 1.40,1.54 1.48,1.10 1.48,0.90 1.40,0.46 1.18,0.22 stroke #2a1400

# === Keel stripe running down the spine of the inverted hull ===
# Dark keel plank (the bottom of the boat, now topmost)
rect 0.92,0.14 0.16,1.72 fill #1a0800 0.85
rect 0.92,0.14 0.16,1.72 stroke #0a0400

# Keel plank seam highlights
line 1.00,0.14 1.00,1.86 stroke #3a1f00 0.8 width 1

# === Hull plank seams running fore-aft along the curved bottom ===
bezier 0.70,0.34 0.64,0.80 0.64,1.20 0.70,1.66 stroke #3a1f00 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.80,0.22 0.76,0.78 0.76,1.22 0.80,1.78 stroke #3a1f00 0.4 width 1
bezier 1.30,0.34 1.36,0.80 1.36,1.20 1.30,1.66 stroke #3a1f00 0.5 width 1
bezier 1.20,0.22 1.24,0.78 1.24,1.22 1.20,1.78 stroke #3a1f00 0.4 width 1

# Lashing ropes holding the boat to the cradle
line 0.52,0.40 1.48,0.40 stroke #5c3a1e width 3
line 0.52,0.40 1.48,0.40 stroke #8b7355 0.6 width 1
line 0.52,1.60 1.48,1.60 stroke #5c3a1e width 3
line 0.52,1.60 1.48,1.60 stroke #8b7355 0.6 width 1

# Bow/stern tip highlights (pointed ends visible)
circle 1.00,0.14 0.04 fill #3a1f00 0.85
circle 1.00,1.86 0.04 fill #3a1f00 0.85

props.market-stall-awning:
name: Market Stall Awning
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 2.5
placement: floor
room_types: fairground-seasonal, market-square
typical_count: few
clusters_with: market-stall
notes: Overlay prop designed to be placed at the same position as market-stall. Canvas canopy seen from above; do not add a drop shadow (it is overhead — shadow would be wrong, like a chandelier).
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,1.84 z 2-2.5

# Canvas canopy base (full square, slight margin so it overhangs the stall edges visually)
rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,1.84 fill #b83028 0.92
rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,1.84 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.45
rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,1.84 stroke #5a0808
# Red/white vertical stripes — three white bands across the 2-cell width
rect 0.36,0.08 0.26,1.84 fill #f0e8dc 0.90
rect 0.36,0.08 0.26,1.84 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.35
rect 0.86,0.08 0.26,1.84 fill #f0e8dc 0.90
rect 0.86,0.08 0.26,1.84 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.35
rect 1.36,0.08 0.26,1.84 fill #f0e8dc 0.90
rect 1.36,0.08 0.26,1.84 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.35
# Seam stitching along stripe boundaries
line 0.36,0.08 0.36,1.92 stroke #5a0808 0.7
line 0.62,0.08 0.62,1.92 stroke #5a0808 0.7
line 0.86,0.08 0.86,1.92 stroke #5a0808 0.7
line 1.12,0.08 1.12,1.92 stroke #5a0808 0.7
line 1.36,0.08 1.36,1.92 stroke #5a0808 0.7
line 1.62,0.08 1.62,1.92 stroke #5a0808 0.7
# Ridge line crossing east-west (subtle sag — canopy sags toward center)
bezier 0.08,1.00 0.60,1.08 1.40,1.08 1.92,1.00 stroke #3a0404 0.5 width 2
# Support pole pass-throughs (small circles where poles rise through canopy)
circle 0.20,0.20 0.07 fill #4a2800 0.95
circle 0.20,0.20 0.07 stroke #1a0a00
circle 1.80,0.20 0.07 fill #4a2800 0.95
circle 1.80,0.20 0.07 stroke #1a0a00
circle 0.20,1.80 0.07 fill #4a2800 0.95
circle 0.20,1.80 0.07 stroke #1a0a00
circle 1.80,1.80 0.07 fill #4a2800 0.95
circle 1.80,1.80 0.07 stroke #1a0a00
# Pole collar rings (reinforcement where pole meets canvas)
circle 0.20,0.20 0.11 stroke #5a0808 width 1
circle 1.80,0.20 0.11 stroke #5a0808 width 1
circle 0.20,1.80 0.11 stroke #5a0808 width 1
circle 1.80,1.80 0.11 stroke #5a0808 width 1
# Subtle fabric ripples / sag highlights (canvas bowing between poles)
bezier 0.20,0.60 0.60,0.66 1.40,0.66 1.80,0.60 stroke #f4e8d8 0.25 width 1
bezier 0.20,1.40 0.60,1.46 1.40,1.46 1.80,1.40 stroke #f4e8d8 0.25 width 1
# Scalloped front valance (south edge — fabric trim hanging down visible as notched line)
bezier 0.08,1.88 0.30,1.96 0.50,1.96 0.72,1.88 stroke #5a0808 0.7 width 2
bezier 0.72,1.88 0.94,1.96 1.14,1.96 1.36,1.88 stroke #5a0808 0.7 width 2
bezier 1.36,1.88 1.58,1.96 1.78,1.96 1.92,1.88 stroke #5a0808 0.7 width 2
# Weathering stains on canvas
ellipse 0.48,0.40 0.08,0.05 fill #3a0808 0.3
ellipse 1.52,1.20 0.10,0.05 fill #3a0808 0.3
# Rope ties at corners (cinched fabric to pole)
line 0.14,0.14 0.26,0.26 stroke #6b4e2e 0.9 width 1
line 1.86,0.14 1.74,0.26 stroke #6b4e2e 0.9 width 1
line 0.14,1.86 0.26,1.74 stroke #6b4e2e 0.9 width 1
line 1.86,1.86 1.74,1.74 stroke #6b4e2e 0.9 width 1

circle 1.80,0.26 0.022 fill #1a1a1a 0.95
circle 0.20,0.74 0.022 fill #1a1a1a 0.95

hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.32 z 0-10

circle 0.50,0.50 0.36 stroke #000000

circle 0.50,0.50 0.28 stroke #555555 0.7 width 1

# Heartwood age rings

circle 0.50,0.50 0.09 stroke #3a1f00 0.5 width 1

# Darkest core at the pith

rect 0.47,0.13 0.06,0.08 stroke #2a1400
rect 0.79,0.47 0.08,0.06 fill #5c3a1e 0.9

rect 0.47,0.79 0.06,0.08 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
rect 0.47,0.79 0.06,0.08 stroke #2a1400
rect 0.13,0.47 0.08,0.06 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
rect 0.13,0.47 0.08,0.06 stroke #2a1400

# Iron rivets on the outer band

circle 0.78,0.50 0.015 fill #222222 0.95
circle 0.50,0.78 0.015 fill #222222 0.95
circle 0.22,0.50 0.015 fill #222222 0.95

clusters_with: candle, candle-guttered, candle-stub, altar, skull-small
notes: Hardened black wax puddle from ritual candles — sinister dark drippings
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.30 z 0-0.05

# Main wax pool (dark black-purple)
poly 0.16,0.48 0.24,0.28 0.40,0.22 0.58,0.24 0.72,0.30 0.84,0.42 0.86,0.58 0.78,0.72 0.62,0.80 0.42,0.82 0.24,0.76 0.14,0.64 fill #1a0a18 0.95
poly 0.16,0.48 0.24,0.28 0.40,0.22 0.58,0.24 0.72,0.30 0.84,0.42 0.86,0.58 0.78,0.72 0.62,0.80 0.42,0.82 0.24,0.76 0.14,0.64 stroke #0a0410
# Darker inner pool
poly 0.26,0.48 0.36,0.34 0.50,0.32 0.64,0.36 0.74,0.48 0.72,0.62 0.60,0.72 0.44,0.74 0.30,0.68 0.24,0.58 fill #0a0410 0.95
# Subtle purple iridescent sheen (ritual wax)
arc 0.5,0.5 0.26 210 280 stroke #4a2060 0.5 width 1
arc 0.5,0.5 0.22 220 260 stroke #6a3080 0.4 width 1
# Drip rivulets extending outward (fingers of wax)
poly 0.16,0.48 0.08,0.50 0.06,0.56 0.12,0.58 fill #1a0a18 0.9
poly 0.86,0.58 0.92,0.60 0.94,0.68 0.88,0.68 fill #1a0a18 0.9
poly 0.42,0.82 0.40,0.92 0.46,0.94 0.48,0.86 fill #1a0a18 0.9
poly 0.62,0.22 0.66,0.12 0.70,0.14 0.68,0.22 fill #1a0a18 0.85
# Embedded wick stubs (charred, sticking up)
circle 0.38,0.50 0.01 fill #000000 0.95
line 0.38,0.50 0.38,0.42 stroke #000000 width 1
circle 0.60,0.58 0.01 fill #000000 0.95
line 0.60,0.58 0.60,0.52 stroke #000000 width 1
circle 0.48,0.36 0.008 fill #000000 0.9
# Cracked wax surface (ripples)
bezier 0.26,0.44 0.40,0.50 0.60,0.48 0.72,0.44 stroke #2a1428 0.6 width 1
bezier 0.28,0.60 0.42,0.64 0.58,0.62 0.70,0.60 stroke #2a1428 0.6 width 1
# Shine on surface (glossy hardened wax)
arc 0.5,0.5 0.24 200 260 stroke #3a1a48 0.5 width 1
# Tiny bubble/void
circle 0.52,0.44 0.012 fill #2a1428 0.8
circle 0.40,0.58 0.008 fill #2a1428 0.7
# Dark sludge edges (where wax met oil/blood)
line 0.18,0.50 0.12,0.52 stroke #3a1038 0.5
line 0.82,0.54 0.88,0.56 stroke #3a1038 0.5
# Gold fleck (from candle drips with imbued metal)
circle 0.48,0.48 0.01 fill #daa520 0.7
circle 0.56,0.52 0.008 fill #daa520 0.6
props.mine-cart:
name: Mine Cart
category: Misc
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes

---
# Hitbox — main body blocks light
hitbox rect 0.15,0.20 1.70,0.60 z 0-1.5
# === Wheels — small edge-on ellipses on each rail position ===
# NW wheel (on north rail)
ellipse 0.30,0.37 0.08,0.04 fill #444444 0.95
ellipse 0.30,0.37 0.08,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
line 0.22,0.37 0.38,0.37 stroke #8899aa 0.55 width 1

line 1.62,0.37 1.78,0.37 stroke #8899aa 0.55 width 1

line 0.22,0.63 0.38,0.63 stroke #8899aa 0.55 width 1

ellipse 1.70,0.63 0.08,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
line 1.62,0.63 1.78,0.63 stroke #8899aa 0.55 width 1
# === Cart body (wooden box) ===
rect 0.15,0.22 1.70,0.56 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.15,0.22 1.70,0.56 stroke #1a1008 width 2
# Wood grain lines
line 0.40,0.23 0.40,0.77 stroke #2a1400 0.45 width 1
line 0.90,0.23 0.90,0.77 stroke #2a1400 0.45 width 1
line 1.40,0.23 1.40,0.77 stroke #2a1400 0.45 width 1
# === Iron reinforcement bands ===

rect 0.15,0.26 1.70,0.04 fill #555555 0.88
rect 0.15,0.26 1.70,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
rect 0.15,0.70 1.70,0.04 fill #555555 0.88
rect 0.15,0.70 1.70,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
# Vertical iron straps at the corners
rect 0.16,0.22 0.06,0.56 fill #555555 0.88
rect 0.16,0.22 0.06,0.56 stroke #222222 width 1
rect 1.78,0.22 0.06,0.56 fill #555555 0.88
rect 1.78,0.22 0.06,0.56 stroke #222222 width 1
# Mid vertical straps
rect 0.60,0.22 0.04,0.56 fill #555555 0.80
rect 0.60,0.22 0.04,0.56 stroke #222222 width 1
rect 1.36,0.22 0.04,0.56 fill #555555 0.80
rect 1.36,0.22 0.04,0.56 stroke #222222 width 1
# === Cart interior (open top showing the load) ===
# Inner bed (darker — showing we're looking down into the box)
rect 0.24,0.32 1.52,0.36 fill #1a1408 0.95
rect 0.24,0.32 1.52,0.36 stroke #0a0400 width 1
# === Cargo — piled coal and ore chunks ===
circle 0.42,0.42 0.06 fill #2a2a2a 0.95
circle 0.42,0.42 0.06 stroke #0a0a0a
circle 0.66,0.52 0.07 fill #1a1a1a 0.95
circle 0.66,0.52 0.07 stroke #0a0a0a
circle 0.92,0.44 0.055 fill #3a3a3a 0.95
circle 0.92,0.44 0.055 stroke #0a0a0a
circle 1.18,0.56 0.06 fill #2a2a2a 0.95
circle 1.18,0.56 0.06 stroke #0a0a0a
circle 1.44,0.48 0.05 fill #1a1a1a 0.95
circle 1.44,0.48 0.05 stroke #0a0a0a
circle 1.64,0.54 0.045 fill #2a2a2a 0.9
circle 1.64,0.54 0.045 stroke #0a0a0a
# Smaller pebbles in the cracks
circle 0.54,0.60 0.025 fill #4a4040 0.85
circle 0.80,0.38 0.022 fill #4a4a4a 0.85
circle 1.08,0.40 0.020 fill #4a4040 0.85
circle 1.32,0.60 0.022 fill #4a4a4a 0.85
circle 1.54,0.38 0.018 fill #4a4040 0.8
# Bright ore specks (iron, quartz, traces of mineral)
circle 0.58,0.46 0.012 fill #8b6914 0.9
circle 0.82,0.56 0.010 fill #a8a8b0 0.85
circle 1.00,0.52 0.012 fill #8b6914 0.9
circle 1.26,0.44 0.010 fill #a8a8b0 0.85
circle 1.50,0.58 0.010 fill #8b6914 0.85
# === Coupling hooks (front and back, for linking carts into a train) ===
# Front (east) coupling
rect 1.86,0.48 0.10,0.04 fill #666666 0.95
rect 1.86,0.48 0.10,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
circle 1.96,0.50 0.03 fill #444444 0.95
circle 1.96,0.50 0.03 stroke #222222 width 1
# Back (west) coupling
rect 0.04,0.48 0.10,0.04 fill #666666 0.95
rect 0.04,0.48 0.10,0.04 stroke #222222 width 1
circle 0.04,0.50 0.03 fill #444444 0.95
circle 0.04,0.50 0.03 stroke #222222 width 1
# === Rust patches on iron ===
circle 0.20,0.28 0.022 fill #8b4000 0.65
circle 1.75,0.72 0.022 fill #8b4000 0.65
circle 0.80,0.26 0.015 fill #8b4000 0.55
circle 1.30,0.74 0.018 fill #8b4000 0.55
circle 1.82,0.28 0.016 fill #8b4000 0.55
# Coal dust smears on the body edges
ellipse 0.30,0.78 0.08,0.02 fill #0a0a0a 0.5
ellipse 1.60,0.20 0.08,0.02 fill #0a0a0a 0.5

props.mine-shaft:
name: Mine Shaft
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: center
room_types: mine-shaft-entrance, mining-camp, deep-mine, cave-living
typical_count: single
clusters_with: headframe, winch-large, cart-track, pickaxe
notes: Vertical shaft opening in the floor — dark pit rimmed with a wooden plank frame; rope descends into darkness
---
# Wooden plank frame around the shaft (square border of heavy timbers)
rect 0.14,0.14 1.72,0.22 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.14,0.14 1.72,0.22 stroke #3a1f00
rect 0.14,1.64 1.72,0.22 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.14,1.64 1.72,0.22 stroke #3a1f00
rect 0.14,0.14 0.22,1.72 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.14,0.14 0.22,1.72 stroke #3a1f00
rect 1.64,0.14 0.22,1.72 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 1.64,0.14 0.22,1.72 stroke #3a1f00
# Iron corner bolts on the frame
circle 0.25,0.25 0.035 fill #333333 0.95
circle 1.75,0.25 0.035 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.25,1.75 0.035 fill #333333 0.95
circle 1.75,1.75 0.035 fill #333333 0.95
# Shaft opening — deep black pit
rect 0.36,0.36 1.28,1.28 fill #0a0a0a 0.98
# Inner darkness gradient (giving depth)
rect 0.42,0.42 1.16,1.16 gradient-radial #2a1400 #000000 0.95
# Ladder hooks on the north edge (two iron brackets)
rect 0.72,0.30 0.06,0.10 fill #444444 0.95
rect 0.72,0.30 0.06,0.10 stroke #222222
rect 1.22,0.30 0.06,0.10 fill #444444 0.95
rect 1.22,0.30 0.06,0.10 stroke #222222
# Ladder rungs visible just below the hooks (descending into darkness)
line 0.74,0.42 1.26,0.42 stroke #4a2800 width 2
line 0.74,0.54 1.26,0.54 stroke #4a2800 0.75 width 2
line 0.74,0.66 1.26,0.66 stroke #4a2800 0.5 width 2
line 0.74,0.78 1.26,0.78 stroke #4a2800 0.3 width 2
# Ladder rails (vertical)
line 0.74,0.42 0.74,0.90 stroke #4a2800 0.7 width 2
line 1.26,0.42 1.26,0.90 stroke #4a2800 0.7 width 2
# Rope descending into darkness on the south side
line 1.00,1.20 1.00,1.80 stroke #8b7355 width 3
# Rope fray/knot at the top of descent
circle 1.00,1.20 0.04 fill #8b7355 0.9
circle 1.00,1.20 0.04 stroke #5c3a1e
# Scattered dirt/debris on the frame edges
circle 0.50,0.20 0.02 fill #6a5a4a 0.6
circle 1.40,1.78 0.018 fill #6a5a4a 0.6
circle 0.22,1.20 0.015 fill #6a5a4a 0.6
# Warning chalk marks on the frame
line 0.40,0.20 0.60,0.20 stroke #e8dcc8 0.55 width 1
line 0.50,0.16 0.50,0.24 stroke #e8dcc8 0.55 width 1
props.mine-shaft-opening:
name: Mine Shaft Opening
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: mine-shaft-entrance, deep-mine, tunnel, collapsed-area
typical_count: single
clusters_with: bucket-on-rope, timber-brace, rubble, rope-coil
notes: A vertical shaft opening in the floor — dark hole with a square timber frame and a faint rope dangling. Place centrally in mine rooms. Looking straight down into darkness.
---
# === Timber frame perimeter (square beams around the rim) ===
# North beam
rect 0.30,0.30 1.40,0.14 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.30,0.30 1.40,0.14 stroke #2a1400
# South beam
rect 0.30,1.56 1.40,0.14 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.30,1.56 1.40,0.14 stroke #2a1400
# West beam
rect 0.30,0.30 0.14,1.40 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.30,0.30 0.14,1.40 stroke #2a1400
# East beam
rect 1.56,0.30 0.14,1.40 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 1.56,0.30 0.14,1.40 stroke #2a1400

# Corner joints (dark overlap squares)
rect 0.30,0.30 0.14,0.14 fill #1a1208 0.6
rect 1.56,0.30 0.14,0.14 fill #1a1208 0.6
rect 0.30,1.56 0.14,0.14 fill #1a1208 0.6
rect 1.56,1.56 0.14,0.14 fill #1a1208 0.6

# === Dark shaft hole (pitch black interior) ===
rect 0.44,0.44 1.12,1.12 fill #000000 0.98
rect 0.44,0.44 1.12,1.12 stroke #1a1208 width 2

# Inner darkness (slightly inset, fully black)
rect 0.50,0.50 1.00,1.00 fill #000000 1.0

# === Rope dangling into the shaft ===
# Rope anchor at timber frame (NE corner area)
circle 1.48,0.52 0.04 fill #555555 0.9
circle 1.48,0.52 0.04 stroke #333333
# Rope line going into the dark (visible as a thin line)
line 1.48,0.52 1.30,0.70 stroke #8b7355 width 2
line 1.30,0.70 1.20,0.90 stroke #8b7355 0.8 width 2
line 1.20,0.90 1.15,1.10 stroke #8b7355 0.6 width 1
# Rope fades into darkness
line 1.15,1.10 1.12,1.30 stroke #8b7355 0.3 width 1

# === Wear marks on timber ===
line 0.50,0.34 0.80,0.38 stroke #1a1208 0.5 width 1
line 1.20,1.60 1.50,1.62 stroke #1a1208 0.5 width 1

# === Scattered dirt/dust at edges ===
circle 0.26,0.50 0.025 fill #4a3a28 0.4
circle 1.76,1.40 0.020 fill #4a3a28 0.35
circle 0.50,1.76 0.022 fill #4a3a28 0.4

poly 0.10,0.50 0.28,0.40 0.48,0.52 0.66,0.46 0.88,0.54 1.08,0.48 1.28,0.58 1.50,0.50 1.72,0.60 1.90,0.56 1.80,0.64 1.58,0.58 1.36,0.66 1.14,0.56 0.92,0.62 0.70,0.54 0.48,0.60 0.28,0.50 0.14,0.58 stroke #5a3810

bezier 1.00,0.52 1.30,0.54 1.60,0.54 1.88,0.58 stroke #e0a848 0.85 width 2

line 1.20,0.54 1.14,0.46 stroke #e0a848 0.7 width 1
line 1.56,0.52 1.64,0.44 stroke #e0a848 0.7 width 1
# Embedded gem sparkle dots — bright points along the vein
circle 0.22,0.46 0.022 fill #ffe890 0.95
circle 0.22,0.46 0.022 stroke #8b6914
circle 0.54,0.56 0.018 fill #ffe890 0.9

name: Obelisk
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 8
placement: center
room_types: temple, courtyard, tomb, magical-chamber
typical_count: few
notes: Tall monument; place as focal point or in symmetrical arrangements
---
# Hitbox: shaft cross-section blocks light (not the ground-level pedestal)

# Ground shadow (height shadow cast by obelisk)
ellipse 1.15,1.15 0.75,0.75 fill #000000 0.15
ellipse 1.2,1.2 0.65,0.65 fill #000000 0.18

# Base pedestal — larger stone platform
rect 0.25,0.25 1.5,1.5 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.75
rect 0.25,0.25 1.5,1.5 stroke #666666

# Pedestal edge highlight (top-left edges catch light)

line 0.25,0.25 0.25,1.75 stroke #999999 width 1

# Shaft cross-section — main obelisk column
rect 0.45,0.45 1.1,1.1 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85
rect 0.45,0.45 1.1,1.1 stroke #777777

# Carved details — subtle rune/hieroglyph lines on shaft surface

line 0.65,0.6 0.75,0.6 stroke #555555 width 1
line 1.3,0.55 1.3,0.75 stroke #555555 width 1
line 1.35,0.65 1.45,0.65 stroke #555555 width 1
line 0.6,1.3 0.6,1.45 stroke #555555 width 1
line 0.65,1.35 0.78,1.35 stroke #555555 width 1
line 1.35,1.25 1.35,1.45 stroke #555555 width 1
line 1.25,1.35 1.4,1.35 stroke #555555 width 1

# Pyramidion (tip) — four triangular facets meeting at center
# North facet — lightest (sun-facing)
poly 0.45,0.45 1.55,0.45 1.0,1.0 fill #999999 0.7
# East facet — medium-light
poly 1.55,0.45 1.55,1.55 1.0,1.0 fill #888888 0.65
# South facet — darkest (shadow side)
poly 1.55,1.55 0.45,1.55 1.0,1.0 fill #777777 0.6
# West facet — medium
poly 0.45,1.55 0.45,0.45 1.0,1.0 fill #8a8a8a 0.6

# Pyramidion outline
poly 0.45,0.45 1.55,0.45 1.55,1.55 0.45,1.55 stroke #666666

# Edge highlights — sharp stone ridges from corners to tip
line 0.45,0.45 1.0,1.0 stroke #bbbbbb width 1
line 1.55,0.45 1.0,1.0 stroke #aaaaaa width 1
line 0.45,1.55 1.0,1.0 stroke #999999 width 1
line 1.55,1.55 1.0,1.0 stroke #888888 width 1

# Center point highlight — very tip of the pyramidion
circle 1.0,1.0 0.04 fill #cccccc 0.5
circle 1.0,1.0 0.04 stroke #aaaaaa
props.obelisk-astral:
name: Astral Obelisk
category: Magical
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.5
placement: corner
room_types: astral-anchor, astral-sea, githyanki-citadel, planar-nexus
typical_count: few
clusters_with: astral-anchor-stone, portal-stela, silver-cord-pylon
notes: Obsidian obelisk etched with silver astral runes — top-down view of the pedestal, shaft, and four-sided pyramidion meeting at the glowing apex
lights:
  - type: candle
    x: 1.0
    y: 1.0
    radius: 8
    color: "#c0a0ff"
    intensity: 0.5
---
# Hitbox — shaft cross-section blocks light
hitbox rect 0.45,0.45 1.1,1.1 z 0-2.5
# Violet apex halo
circle 1.0,1.0 0.80 gradient-radial #c0a0ff #1a0828 0.30
# Stepped stone pedestal
rect 0.22,0.22 1.56,1.56 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.80
rect 0.22,0.22 1.56,1.56 stroke #2a2038 width 2
# Pedestal bevel highlights (NW catches light)
line 0.22,0.22 1.78,0.22 stroke #6a5098 width 1
line 0.22,0.22 0.22,1.78 stroke #6a5098 width 1
# Inner pedestal step
rect 0.36,0.36 1.28,1.28 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.70
rect 0.36,0.36 1.28,1.28 stroke #4a3a80 width 1
# Shaft cross-section — obsidian column (square)
rect 0.45,0.45 1.10,1.10 fill #1a0828 0.92
rect 0.45,0.45 1.10,1.10 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
# Silver rune marks on each face of the shaft
line 1.0,0.52 1.0,0.62 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.96,0.56 1.04,0.56 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 1.48,1.0 1.38,1.0 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 1.44,0.96 1.44,1.04 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 1.0,1.48 1.0,1.38 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.96,1.44 1.04,1.44 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.52,1.0 0.62,1.0 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.56,0.96 0.56,1.04 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
# === Pyramidion — four triangular facets meeting at the apex ===
# North facet (toward viewer, brightest)
poly 0.45,0.45 1.55,0.45 1.0,1.0 fill #4a3a80 0.85
# East facet
poly 1.55,0.45 1.55,1.55 1.0,1.0 fill #3a2a68 0.80
# South facet (darkest)
poly 1.55,1.55 0.45,1.55 1.0,1.0 fill #2a1a50 0.75
# West facet
poly 0.45,1.55 0.45,0.45 1.0,1.0 fill #3a2a68 0.80
# Pyramidion outline
poly 0.45,0.45 1.55,0.45 1.55,1.55 0.45,1.55 stroke #4a3a80 width 1
# Edge ridges from each corner to the apex
line 0.45,0.45 1.0,1.0 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 1.55,0.45 1.0,1.0 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 1.55,1.55 1.0,1.0 stroke #8060d0 width 1
line 0.45,1.55 1.0,1.0 stroke #8060d0 width 1
# Apex glow — captured starlight
circle 1.0,1.0 0.10 fill #e0e0ff 0.95
circle 1.0,1.0 0.10 stroke #c0a0ff
circle 1.0,1.0 0.06 fill #ffffff 1.0
# Tiny silver rune sparks around the apex
circle 0.82,0.82 0.018 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 1.18,0.82 0.018 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 1.18,1.18 0.018 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 0.82,1.18 0.018 fill #c0a0ff 0.85

line 1.42,1.32 1.48,1.38 stroke #444444 width 1

# === Pyramidion — four triangular facets meeting at center ===

# East facet — medium-light
poly 1.60,0.40 1.60,1.60 1.0,1.0 fill #3a3a3a 0.65
# South facet — darkest (shadow side)

# West facet — medium

line 1.60,0.40 1.0,1.0 stroke #4a4a4a width 1
line 0.40,1.60 1.0,1.0 stroke #3a3a3a width 1
line 1.60,1.60 1.0,1.0 stroke #333333 width 1

props.obelisk-stone-raw:

category: Structure
footprint: 2x2

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2

line 0.65,0.75 0.58,0.90 stroke #555555 width 1
line 1.35,0.55 1.40,0.80 stroke #555555 width 1
line 0.60,1.30 0.55,1.48 stroke #555555 width 1
line 1.38,1.25 1.42,1.45 stroke #555555 width 1
line 0.80,0.50 0.95,0.55 stroke #555555 width 1
line 1.05,1.50 1.20,1.45 stroke #555555 width 1

props.obsidian-shard:
name: Obsidian Shard
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.2
placement: floor
room_types: elemental-fire-node, elemental-shrine, volcanic-cavern, cabin-witch, demiplane-laboratory, underdark-outpost
typical_count: few
clusters_with: crystal-shard, ash-pile, obsidian-shard, altar-stone-flat, crystal-formation, bone-marker
notes: Sharp-edged shard of black volcanic glass with razor edges and faint iridescent sheen along the fractures
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox poly 0.22,0.52 0.42,0.22 0.68,0.34 0.78,0.62 0.56,0.78 0.34,0.70 z 0-0.2

# Ground contact shadow (dark, close to prop — glass is flat)
ellipse 0.52,0.74 0.22,0.05 fill #050508 0.5
# Main shard body — elongated angular polygon, diamond-ish with uneven fracture edges
poly 0.22,0.52 0.32,0.32 0.42,0.22 0.58,0.22 0.68,0.34 0.78,0.52 0.72,0.66 0.56,0.78 0.38,0.76 0.28,0.64 fill #0a0a18 0.95

# Conchoidal fracture plane — inner facet catching light (upper facet)
poly 0.32,0.32 0.42,0.22 0.58,0.22 0.56,0.42 0.44,0.48 0.34,0.44 fill #3a3a58 0.75
poly 0.32,0.32 0.42,0.22 0.58,0.22 0.56,0.42 0.44,0.48 0.34,0.44 stroke #1a1a28 width 1

props.pearl-obelisk:
name: Pearl Obelisk
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.2
placement: corner
room_types: elemental-water-node, aquatic-shrine, sunken-temple, merfolk-grotto
typical_count: few
clusters_with: marid-pavilion, pearl-cluster, water-node-core, coral-pillar
notes: Translucent pearl obelisk — top-down view shows the pedestal base plus the four-sided pyramidion meeting at the glowing apex
lights:
  - type: candle
    x: 1.0
    y: 1.0
    radius: 10
    color: "#e0f0ff"
    intensity: 0.8
---
# Hitbox: shaft cross-section blocks light
hitbox rect 0.45,0.45 1.1,1.1 z 0-2.2
# Halo around the apex (slightly larger than the pedestal)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.85 gradient-radial #e0f0ff #103060 0.35
# Base pedestal — pearl marble square platform
rect 0.25,0.25 1.5,1.5 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.80
rect 0.25,0.25 1.5,1.5 stroke #6090b0 width 2
# Pedestal edge highlights (northwest quadrant catches light)
line 0.25,0.25 1.75,0.25 stroke #f8fcff width 1
line 0.25,0.25 0.25,1.75 stroke #f8fcff width 1
# Inner pedestal trim
rect 0.38,0.38 1.24,1.24 fill #d0e0f0 0.45
rect 0.38,0.38 1.24,1.24 stroke #80a0c0 width 1
# Shaft cross-section — main obelisk column (square)
rect 0.45,0.45 1.10,1.10 fill #e8f4ff 0.85
rect 0.45,0.45 1.10,1.10 stroke #6090b0 width 2
# Embedded pearl studs on the shaft faces (one per side)
circle 1.0,0.52 0.05 fill #ffffff 0.95
circle 1.0,0.52 0.05 stroke #a0c0e0
circle 1.48,1.0 0.05 fill #ffffff 0.95
circle 1.48,1.0 0.05 stroke #a0c0e0
circle 1.0,1.48 0.05 fill #ffffff 0.95
circle 1.0,1.48 0.05 stroke #a0c0e0
circle 0.52,1.0 0.05 fill #ffffff 0.95
circle 0.52,1.0 0.05 stroke #a0c0e0
# === Pyramidion (tip) — four triangular facets meeting at the apex center ===
# North facet — brightest (sun-facing)
poly 0.45,0.45 1.55,0.45 1.0,1.0 fill #f8fcff 0.8
# East facet — medium-light
poly 1.55,0.45 1.55,1.55 1.0,1.0 fill #d8eaf8 0.7
# South facet — medium (shadow side)
poly 1.55,1.55 0.45,1.55 1.0,1.0 fill #b0c8e0 0.6
# West facet — medium-light
poly 0.45,1.55 0.45,0.45 1.0,1.0 fill #d8eaf8 0.7
# Pyramidion outline
poly 0.45,0.45 1.55,0.45 1.55,1.55 0.45,1.55 stroke #6090b0 width 1
# Edge ridges from each corner to the apex
line 0.45,0.45 1.0,1.0 stroke #ffffff width 1
line 1.55,0.45 1.0,1.0 stroke #e0f0ff width 1
line 0.45,1.55 1.0,1.0 stroke #a0c0e0 width 1
line 1.55,1.55 1.0,1.0 stroke #a0c0e0 width 1
# Apex glow core (captive starlight at the point)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.10 fill #ffffff 0.95
circle 1.0,1.0 0.10 stroke #c0d8f0
circle 1.0,1.0 0.06 fill #e0f8ff 1.0
circle 1.0,1.0 0.03 fill #ffffff 1.0
# Tiny sparkle points around the apex
circle 0.80,0.80 0.018 fill #ffffff 0.85
circle 1.20,0.80 0.018 fill #ffffff 0.85
circle 1.20,1.20 0.018 fill #ffffff 0.85
circle 0.80,1.20 0.018 fill #ffffff 0.85

line 0.50,0.28 0.50,0.68 stroke #888888 0.7
line 0.56,0.28 0.56,0.68 stroke #888888 0.7
line 0.62,0.30 0.62,0.66 stroke #888888 0.7
line 0.68,0.34 0.68,0.64 stroke #888888 0.7

circle 0.5,0.30 0.16 stroke #666666

arc 0.5,0.30 0.24 100 170 stroke #666666 0.7 width 1
arc 0.5,0.30 0.24 200 260 stroke #666666 0.7 width 1
arc 0.5,0.30 0.24 280 340 stroke #666666 0.7 width 1
# Carved floral motifs on column (very subtle)

poly 0.48,0.58 0.50,0.54 0.52,0.58 0.50,0.62 fill #aaaaaa 0.4
# Marble sheen

arc 0.5,0.30 0.22 210 250 stroke #ffffff 0.8 width 1
# Age cracks
line 0.36,0.54 0.42,0.70 stroke #555555 0.5

# Plinth corners worn/chipped
poly 0.16,0.84 0.22,0.82 0.20,0.84 fill #555555 0.7

props.pen-and-inkwell:
name: Pen and Inkwell
category: Prison
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: interrogation-room, office, study, scriptorium-dark
typical_count: single
clusters_with: desk, confession-paper, book-open, book-pile
notes: Metal-nibbed pen laid next to a squat inkwell; place on desk surfaces
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: pen lying at an angle, inkwell nearby

# Small ink spatter on surface
circle 0.56,0.44 0.01 fill #0a0a1a 0.4
circle 0.60,0.42 0.008 fill #0a0a1a 0.35

# === Inkwell (squat glass container) ===
circle 0.58,0.50 0.08 fill #1a1a2a 0.75
circle 0.58,0.50 0.08 stroke #333344
# Glass highlight
arc 0.58,0.50 0.06 220 280 stroke #667788 0.4 width 1
# Ink surface (dark, nearly black)
circle 0.58,0.50 0.055 fill #0a0a14 0.8
# Tiny reflection on ink surface
circle 0.56,0.48 0.015 fill #667788 0.35

# === Pen (metal nib + wooden shaft lying at angle) ===
# Shaft (long thin rod)
line 0.26,0.58 0.52,0.42 stroke #5c3a1e width 2
# Wooden shaft fill
line 0.30,0.57 0.50,0.43 stroke #8b6b4a 0.6 width 2

# Metal nib (pointed end near inkwell)
poly 0.52,0.42 0.55,0.40 0.54,0.43 fill #8899aa 0.8
# Nib split line
line 0.52,0.42 0.545,0.415 stroke #444444 0.5 width 1

# Pen end (blunt end)
circle 0.27,0.58 0.02 fill #5c3a1e 0.7

line 0.12,0.36 0.20,0.38 stroke #666666
line 0.26,0.16 0.31,0.23 stroke #666666
line 0.69,0.23 0.64,0.28 stroke #666666
line 0.31,0.23 0.36,0.28 stroke #666666

props.pillar-floating:

category: Structure
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.0
placement: corner
room_types: astral-anchor, astral-sea, planar-nexus, ruined-temple
typical_count: few
clusters_with: drifting-stone, dead-god-fragment, astral-anchor-stone
notes: Broken marble pillar hanging in the void — top-down view shows the cracked circular cross-section with mist drifting beneath
---
# Hitbox — circular shaft blocks light
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.36 z 0-2.0
# Drifting mist halo beneath the hovering pillar
circle 0.5,0.5 0.46 gradient-radial #c0a0ff #1a1028 0.25

circle 0.5,0.5 0.40 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.75

# Decorative inner ring (shaft edge)
ring 0.5,0.5 0.32 0.28 fill #8070a0 0.5
ring 0.5,0.5 0.32 0.28 stroke #4a3a60 width 1
# Main shaft cross-section
circle 0.5,0.5 0.28 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.85
circle 0.5,0.5 0.28 stroke #6a5a80 width 1
# Fluting marks (6 radial grooves)
line 0.50,0.22 0.50,0.32 stroke #6a5a80 width 1
line 0.50,0.68 0.50,0.78 stroke #6a5a80 width 1
line 0.72,0.38 0.64,0.42 stroke #6a5a80 width 1
line 0.28,0.38 0.36,0.42 stroke #6a5a80 width 1
line 0.72,0.62 0.64,0.58 stroke #6a5a80 width 1
line 0.28,0.62 0.36,0.58 stroke #6a5a80 width 1
# Jagged crack — the pillar is broken across its length
bezier 0.28,0.52 0.38,0.46 0.58,0.54 0.72,0.48 stroke #2a2038 width 2
line 0.44,0.50 0.46,0.54 stroke #2a2038 width 1
line 0.56,0.51 0.54,0.47 stroke #2a2038 width 1
# Small chunks orbiting the pillar (floating debris)
circle 0.14,0.28 0.04 fill #8070a0 0.75
circle 0.14,0.28 0.04 stroke #4a3a60
circle 0.86,0.74 0.03 fill #8070a0 0.75
circle 0.86,0.74 0.03 stroke #4a3a60
circle 0.86,0.22 0.025 fill #8070a0 0.70
# Dust motes
circle 0.20,0.72 0.012 fill #e0e0ff 0.7
circle 0.78,0.30 0.012 fill #e0e0ff 0.7
# Center highlight (polished marble)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.08 fill #f8f0ff 0.5

line 0.31,0.23 0.36,0.28 stroke #daa520

circle 0.5,0.5 0.06 stroke #8b6914

props.planar-sigil-shard:
name: Planar Sigil Shard
category: Magical
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: astral-anchor, astral-sea, planar-nexus, githyanki-citadel
typical_count: few
clusters_with: astral-anchor-stone, silver-cord-stub, star-dust-pile
notes: Fragment of a shattered arcane seal — a broken engraved disc, split in half. A residual mana trail spirals from its fractured edge.
lights:
  - type: candle
    x: 0.5
    y: 0.5
    radius: 6
    color: "#a080ff"
    intensity: 0.5
---
# Faint violet residue glow
circle 0.5,0.5 0.42 gradient-radial #a080ff #1a0828 0.2

# Broken disc — left half (jagged break on right edge)
poly 0.12,0.5 0.14,0.32 0.22,0.2 0.36,0.14 0.48,0.14 0.44,0.24 0.48,0.32 0.4,0.42 0.46,0.5 0.42,0.58 0.5,0.66 0.46,0.76 0.48,0.86 0.36,0.86 0.22,0.8 0.14,0.68 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.85
poly 0.12,0.5 0.14,0.32 0.22,0.2 0.36,0.14 0.48,0.14 0.44,0.24 0.48,0.32 0.4,0.42 0.46,0.5 0.42,0.58 0.5,0.66 0.46,0.76 0.48,0.86 0.36,0.86 0.22,0.8 0.14,0.68 stroke #555555 width 2

# Disc inner ring (half visible)
arc 0.5,0.5 0.28 90 270 stroke #8060d0 width 1

# Engraved runes on the disc face
line 0.26,0.4 0.32,0.4 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.26,0.5 0.34,0.5 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.26,0.6 0.32,0.6 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
circle 0.28,0.3 0.025 stroke #e0e0ff width 1
circle 0.28,0.7 0.025 stroke #e0e0ff width 1

# Small detached fragment (the other broken piece)
poly 0.66,0.3 0.74,0.28 0.8,0.36 0.78,0.44 0.7,0.44 0.64,0.38 fill #8a8a8a 0.85
poly 0.66,0.3 0.74,0.28 0.8,0.36 0.78,0.44 0.7,0.44 0.64,0.38 stroke #555555 width 1
line 0.7,0.34 0.74,0.38 stroke #c0a0ff width 1

# Mana trail spiraling from the fracture (violet residue)
bezier 0.48,0.3 0.58,0.36 0.66,0.38 0.68,0.34 stroke #a080ff width 2
bezier 0.48,0.7 0.58,0.72 0.64,0.66 0.7,0.58 stroke #a080ff width 2
bezier 0.5,0.5 0.62,0.52 0.72,0.5 0.82,0.56 stroke #c0a0ff width 1

# Sparkling residue motes along the trail
circle 0.6,0.42 0.018 fill #e0e0ff 0.9
circle 0.68,0.52 0.016 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 0.76,0.62 0.014 fill #e0e0ff 0.8
circle 0.84,0.5 0.012 fill #c0a0ff 0.7

props.portal-stela:
name: Portal Stela
category: Magical
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.4
placement: center
room_types: astral-anchor, astral-sea, planar-nexus, arcane
typical_count: single
clusters_with: obelisk-astral, silver-cord-pylon, astral-anchor-stone
notes: Silver-framed portal stela — top-down view of the arched stone frame with the swirling violet portal visible through the opening on the floor
lights:
  - type: torch
    x: 1.0
    y: 1.0
    radius: 14
    color: "#b080ff"
    intensity: 1.0
---
# Hitbox — the stone frame blocks light (not the open portal in the center)
hitbox rect 0.30,0.22 1.40,0.35 z 0-2.4
hitbox rect 0.30,1.42 1.40,0.35 z 0-2.4
hitbox rect 0.22,0.30 0.35,1.40 z 0-2.4
hitbox rect 1.42,0.30 0.35,1.40 z 0-2.4
# Violet portal glow bleeding past the frame
circle 1.0,1.0 0.90 gradient-radial #b080ff #1a0828 0.35
# === Stone frame (arched doorway top-down) ===
# North face of the frame
rect 0.22,0.22 1.56,0.35 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85
rect 0.22,0.22 1.56,0.35 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
# South face
rect 0.22,1.42 1.56,0.35 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85
rect 0.22,1.42 1.56,0.35 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
# West jamb
rect 0.22,0.22 0.35,1.56 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85
rect 0.22,0.22 0.35,1.56 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
# East jamb
rect 1.42,0.22 0.35,1.56 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85
rect 1.42,0.22 0.35,1.56 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
# Arched corners (curved inner edges)
arc 0.58,0.58 0.18 180 270 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
arc 1.42,0.58 0.18 270 360 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
arc 1.42,1.42 0.18 0 90 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
arc 0.58,1.42 0.18 90 180 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
# Silver rune engravings on the frame faces
line 0.60,0.38 0.90,0.38 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 1.10,0.38 1.40,0.38 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.60,1.62 0.90,1.62 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 1.10,1.62 1.40,1.62 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.38,0.60 0.38,0.90 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.38,1.10 0.38,1.40 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 1.62,0.60 1.62,0.90 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 1.62,1.10 1.62,1.40 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
# === Portal surface (swirling violet plane visible through the opening) ===
circle 1.0,1.0 0.42 fill #4a2080 0.9
circle 1.0,1.0 0.42 stroke #c0a0ff width 2
# Swirl spiral
bezier 1.0,0.62 1.30,0.70 1.35,1.10 1.12,1.30 stroke #a080ff width 2
bezier 1.12,1.30 0.88,1.35 0.68,1.10 0.78,0.82 stroke #a080ff width 2
bezier 0.78,0.82 0.95,0.72 1.10,0.82 1.05,0.98 stroke #c0a0ff width 2
# Bright inner core of the vortex
circle 1.0,1.0 0.16 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 1.0,1.0 0.08 fill #ffffff 0.95
# Small orbiting sparks around the portal
circle 0.70,0.66 0.022 fill #e0e0ff 0.9
circle 1.32,0.74 0.020 fill #e0e0ff 0.85
circle 1.30,1.28 0.022 fill #e0e0ff 0.9
circle 0.68,1.30 0.020 fill #e0e0ff 0.85
# Finial caps at each outer corner of the frame
circle 0.30,0.30 0.08 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 0.30,0.30 0.08 stroke #4a3a80
circle 1.70,0.30 0.08 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 1.70,0.30 0.08 stroke #4a3a80
circle 1.70,1.70 0.08 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 1.70,1.70 0.08 stroke #4a3a80
circle 0.30,1.70 0.08 fill #c0a0ff 0.85
circle 0.30,1.70 0.08 stroke #4a3a80

category: Structure
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: yes
height: 8
placement: wall

notes: Heavy gate; place spanning doorways or corridor entrances
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.0,0.0 0.20,1.0 z 0-8
hitbox rect 1.80,0.0 0.20,1.0 z 0-8

# West stone guide channel
rect 0.0,0.0 0.20,1.0 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85
rect 0.0,0.0 0.20,1.0 stroke #555555
# West channel groove (dark slot where gate slides)

# East stone guide channel
rect 1.80,0.0 0.20,1.0 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85
rect 1.80,0.0 0.20,1.0 stroke #555555

bezier 0.54,0.44 0.80,0.34 0.94,0.30 0.98,0.26 stroke #4a7a3a width 3

bezier 0.60,0.50 0.86,0.56 0.96,0.62 0.98,0.66 stroke #2a5a28 width 3

# Southeast frond

# Southwest frond

# West frond
bezier 0.40,0.50 0.18,0.50 0.06,0.52 0.02,0.54 stroke #4a7a3a width 4
bezier 0.40,0.50 0.14,0.56 0.04,0.62 0.02,0.66 stroke #2a5a28 width 3

# Northwest frond

bezier 0.46,0.44 0.20,0.34 0.06,0.30 0.02,0.26 stroke #2a5a28 width 3

circle 0.96,0.20 0.025 fill #a89838 0.8
circle 0.96,0.56 0.025 fill #a89838 0.8
circle 0.04,0.20 0.025 fill #a89838 0.8
circle 0.04,0.56 0.025 fill #a89838 0.8

circle 0.50,0.48 0.10 stroke #1a3010

props.rail-track:
name: Mine Rail Track
category: Structure
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: mine-shaft-entrance, mining-camp, deep-mine, tunnel
typical_count: many
clusters_with: cart-track, cart-track-short, cart-track-turn, cart-track-t, cart-track-x
notes: Single-cell iron mine rail section — matches cart-track-short edge geometry exactly (north rail y=0.34, south rail y=0.60) so it tiles seamlessly with all cart-track-* variants. Use for fine-grained track layouts where you want a slightly different visual (fewer ties, more rust) from cart-track-short.
---
# Wooden ties (2 ties instead of 3 — sparser, older mine feel)
rect 0.15,0.18 0.10,0.64 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.15,0.18 0.10,0.64 stroke #3a1f00
rect 0.65,0.18 0.10,0.64 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.65,0.18 0.10,0.64 stroke #3a1f00

# North iron rail (edge-to-edge, matching cart-track-short: y=0.34, h=0.06)
rect 0.00,0.34 1.00,0.06 texfill polyhaven/rusty_metal 0.9
rect 0.00,0.34 1.00,0.06 stroke #333333
# Rail highlight (polished top edge at y=0.36)
line 0.00,0.36 1.00,0.36 stroke #8899aa 0.7 width 1

# South iron rail (edge-to-edge, matching cart-track-short: y=0.60, h=0.06)
rect 0.00,0.60 1.00,0.06 texfill polyhaven/rusty_metal 0.9
rect 0.00,0.60 1.00,0.06 stroke #333333
line 0.00,0.62 1.00,0.62 stroke #8899aa 0.7 width 1

# Rail spikes at each tie
circle 0.20,0.37 0.018 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.20,0.63 0.018 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.70,0.37 0.018 fill #333333 0.95
circle 0.70,0.63 0.018 fill #333333 0.95

# Heavier rust patches (older mine look)
circle 0.35,0.37 0.025 fill #8b4000 0.7
circle 0.50,0.63 0.022 fill #8b4000 0.65
circle 0.80,0.36 0.020 fill #8b4000 0.6
circle 0.10,0.62 0.018 fill #8b4000 0.55

# Dirt between ties
circle 0.42,0.50 0.03 fill #4a3a28 0.25
circle 0.55,0.48 0.025 fill #3a2a1a 0.2

hitbox rect 0.22,0.40 0.56,0.20 z 0-0.1

# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1

qbezier 0.435,0.50 0.50,0.47 0.565,0.50 stroke #8b6914 width 1

bezier 0.245,0.49 0.18,0.46 0.14,0.50 0.12,0.56 stroke #5a3a00 width 1

props.residual-torch-from-victims:
name: Dropped Burning Torch
category: Effects
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.1
placement: floor
room_types: monster-lair-small, cave, dungeon, crypt, ruin
typical_count: single
clusters_with: blood-smear, blood-stain, half-eaten-carcass, torn-cloak, bone-pile
notes: Still-burning torch dropped by a fleeing or killed victim. Lies at an angle on the floor with flame seen from above as concentric rings.
lights:
  - type: torch
    x: 0.5
    y: 0.5
    radius: 6
    color: "#ff9944"
    intensity: 0.5
    falloff: linear
---
# Wooden handle (cylindrical shaft lying at an angle — NW to SE)
# Handle rotated via rect rotate
rect 0.10,0.64 0.52,0.12 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9 rotate -25
rect 0.10,0.64 0.52,0.12 stroke #2a1400 rotate -25

# Handle grip binding (rope wrap near the butt end)
line 0.18,0.80 0.26,0.74 stroke #5a3a1e width 2
line 0.20,0.82 0.28,0.76 stroke #5a3a1e width 2

# Butt end circle (tip of handle at SW)
circle 0.14,0.82 0.045 fill #3a1f00 0.9
circle 0.14,0.82 0.045 stroke #1a0a00

# Pitch/oil-wrapped head (darker burning end, NE side)
circle 0.58,0.50 0.11 fill #2a1810 0.95
circle 0.58,0.50 0.11 stroke #1a0a00

# Pitch wrap binding (visible twine around the burning head base)
arc 0.58,0.50 0.11 60 180 stroke #5a3a1e 0.8 width 1
arc 0.58,0.50 0.11 200 320 stroke #5a3a1e 0.8 width 1

# Heat halo (widest, faint orange)
circle 0.58,0.50 0.38 fill #ff6600 0.08
circle 0.58,0.50 0.30 fill #ff6600 0.14

# Outer flame ring (bright orange, slightly ragged)
circle 0.58,0.50 0.22 fill #ff8800 0.25
# Ragged flame tongues radiating outward
poly 0.58,0.26 0.56,0.20 0.62,0.24 0.60,0.26 fill #ff8800 0.6
poly 0.80,0.46 0.86,0.42 0.84,0.50 0.80,0.50 fill #ff8800 0.55
poly 0.60,0.72 0.58,0.78 0.64,0.76 0.62,0.72 fill #ff8800 0.55
poly 0.38,0.54 0.32,0.52 0.36,0.58 0.40,0.56 fill #ff8800 0.5

# Mid flame ring (yellow-orange)
circle 0.58,0.50 0.15 fill #ffaa00 0.45

# Inner core (yellow-white)
circle 0.58,0.50 0.09 fill #ffcc00 0.7

# Hottest center (near-white)
circle 0.58,0.50 0.05 fill #ffee88 0.9
circle 0.58,0.50 0.025 fill #ffffff 0.95

# Tiny spark embers flying off
circle 0.74,0.34 0.012 fill #ffaa00 0.8
circle 0.46,0.30 0.01 fill #ff8800 0.7
circle 0.78,0.62 0.01 fill #ffaa00 0.75
circle 0.44,0.68 0.008 fill #ff8800 0.6

ellipse 0.58,0.52 0.20,0.16 fill #1a0800 0.25

rect 0.40,0.60 1.20,0.90 stroke #2a1400

rect 0.48,0.68 1.04,0.78 stroke #3a1808

# Backrest (tall north section, stretching toward y=0)

rect 0.46,0.20 1.08,0.44 stroke #2a1400

line 0.80,0.22 0.80,0.62 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 1.00,0.22 1.00,0.62 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 1.20,0.22 1.20,0.62 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 1.40,0.22 1.40,0.62 stroke #3a1f00 width 2

rect 0.44,0.16 1.12,0.08 stroke #2a1400

rect 0.38,0.56 0.10,0.18 stroke #2a1400
rect 1.52,0.56 0.10,0.18 fill #4a2800 0.85
rect 1.52,0.56 0.10,0.18 stroke #2a1400

ellipse 1.57,0.58 0.08,0.05 fill #5c3a1e 0.9

line 0.50,1.20 1.50,1.22 stroke #3a1f00 0.3
props.rocking-horse:
name: Rocking Horse
category: Furniture
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.8
placement: floor
room_types: nursery, mansion-bedroom-master
typical_count: single
clusters_with: wooden-toy, dollhouse, blocks-pile, cradle, child-bed
notes: Carved wooden rocking horse viewed from above; curved rockers extend east and west beneath the body
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.20,0.10 1.60,0.80 z 0-0.8

# Curved rocker rails (visible as arcs extending beyond body on east/west sides)
bezier 0.14,0.28 0.08,0.50 0.08,0.50 0.14,0.72 stroke #3a1f00 width 4
bezier 1.86,0.28 1.92,0.50 1.92,0.50 1.86,0.72 stroke #3a1f00 width 4
bezier 0.14,0.28 0.08,0.50 0.08,0.50 0.14,0.72 stroke #6b4e2e 0.5 width 2
bezier 1.86,0.28 1.92,0.50 1.92,0.50 1.86,0.72 stroke #6b4e2e 0.5 width 2
# Horse body — elongated oval spanning east-west
ellipse 1.00,0.50 0.64,0.22 texfill polyhaven/brown_planks_09 0.85
ellipse 1.00,0.50 0.64,0.22 fill #a08058 0.45
ellipse 1.00,0.50 0.64,0.22 stroke #3a1f00
# Horse head — rounded ellipse at west (head faces west; rotation will place north as front)
# Actually per spec: head at north with pointy ears, tail at south. But this is 1x2 (wide). Head at WEST end (low x), tail at EAST.
# Re-reading: "head with pointy ears at north, a tail at south" — with facing:yes at 0° front=south.
# For 1x2 (wide horse), head goes at one end. Place head at WEST for now (consistent with rocker direction).
# Head oval at west end
ellipse 0.28,0.50 0.16,0.14 texfill polyhaven/brown_planks_09 0.85
ellipse 0.28,0.50 0.16,0.14 fill #a08058 0.55
ellipse 0.28,0.50 0.16,0.14 stroke #3a1f00
# Pointy ears (two small triangles at head)
poly 0.22,0.36 0.28,0.30 0.30,0.40 fill #8a6838 0.9
poly 0.22,0.36 0.28,0.30 0.30,0.40 stroke #3a1f00
poly 0.22,0.64 0.28,0.70 0.30,0.60 fill #8a6838 0.9
poly 0.22,0.64 0.28,0.70 0.30,0.60 stroke #3a1f00
# Muzzle — white painted spot at very west
ellipse 0.18,0.50 0.06,0.05 fill #e8dcc0 0.9
ellipse 0.18,0.50 0.06,0.05 stroke #5c3a1e
# Painted eye
circle 0.24,0.44 0.02 fill #1a0a04 0.95
# Painted red bridle strap across muzzle
line 0.16,0.46 0.28,0.44 stroke #8a2020 width 2
line 0.16,0.54 0.28,0.56 stroke #8a2020 width 2
# Neck connecting head to body
poly 0.36,0.40 0.48,0.38 0.48,0.62 0.36,0.60 fill #a08058 0.88
poly 0.36,0.40 0.48,0.38 0.48,0.62 0.36,0.60 stroke #3a1f00
# Painted dark mane stripe running along neck and back
bezier 0.32,0.36 0.60,0.32 1.20,0.32 1.50,0.38 stroke #4a2810 width 3
# Mane tuft detail strokes
line 0.40,0.34 0.42,0.30 stroke #4a2810 width 1
line 0.60,0.32 0.62,0.28 stroke #4a2810 width 1
line 0.90,0.32 0.92,0.28 stroke #4a2810 width 1
# Front legs (attached under body, west side)
rect 0.44,0.22 0.10,0.14 fill #8a6838 0.88
rect 0.44,0.22 0.10,0.14 stroke #3a1f00
rect 0.44,0.64 0.10,0.14 fill #8a6838 0.88
rect 0.44,0.64 0.10,0.14 stroke #3a1f00
# Rear legs (east side)
rect 1.46,0.22 0.10,0.14 fill #8a6838 0.88
rect 1.46,0.22 0.10,0.14 stroke #3a1f00
rect 1.46,0.64 0.10,0.14 fill #8a6838 0.88
rect 1.46,0.64 0.10,0.14 stroke #3a1f00
# Tail — flowing dark strokes at east end
bezier 1.64,0.44 1.78,0.42 1.84,0.40 1.88,0.34 stroke #4a2810 width 2
bezier 1.64,0.50 1.80,0.50 1.86,0.50 1.90,0.48 stroke #4a2810 width 2
bezier 1.64,0.56 1.78,0.58 1.84,0.60 1.88,0.66 stroke #4a2810 width 2
# Saddle — small red painted saddle on back
ellipse 1.00,0.50 0.18,0.10 fill #8a2020 0.85
ellipse 1.00,0.50 0.18,0.10 stroke #4a1010

line 0.88,0.88 0.92,0.80 stroke #4a2800 width 2

line 0.50,0.95 0.58,0.99 stroke #3a1f00 width 2

props.rope-coil:
name: Rope Coil
category: Nautical
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: dock, ship, warehouse
typical_count: few
clusters_with: dock-cleat, anchor
notes: Place near dock cleats or on ship decks
---
# Ground shadow
circle 0.50,0.50 0.42 fill #3a2a1a 0.12

# Coil loops — each ring is one wrap of rope with visible thickness
# Outermost coil
ring 0.50,0.50 0.42 0.36 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.6
ring 0.50,0.50 0.42 0.36 stroke #5c4a32
# Second coil
ring 0.50,0.50 0.34 0.28 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.6
ring 0.50,0.50 0.34 0.28 stroke #5c4a32
# Third coil
ring 0.50,0.50 0.26 0.20 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.6
ring 0.50,0.50 0.26 0.20 stroke #5c4a32
# Inner coil
ring 0.50,0.50 0.18 0.12 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.6
ring 0.50,0.50 0.18 0.12 stroke #5c4a32

# Center hole
circle 0.50,0.50 0.10 fill #2a2a2a 0.25

# Highlight along top of each coil (rope catching light)
arc 0.50,0.50 0.39 200 320 stroke #9a8868 width 2
arc 0.50,0.50 0.31 210 310 stroke #9a8868 width 2
arc 0.50,0.50 0.23 220 300 stroke #9a8868 width 2

# Shadow between coils (depth)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.36 stroke #3a2a1a 0.3
circle 0.50,0.50 0.28 stroke #3a2a1a 0.3
circle 0.50,0.50 0.20 stroke #3a2a1a 0.3

# Trailing rope end
line 0.86,0.55 0.90,0.64 stroke #7a6a4a width 5
line 0.90,0.64 0.87,0.74 stroke #7a6a4a width 4
line 0.87,0.74 0.82,0.80 stroke #7a6a4a width 3
# Rope end outline
line 0.86,0.55 0.90,0.64 stroke #5c4a32 width 2
line 0.90,0.64 0.87,0.74 stroke #5c4a32 width 2

props.round-dining-table:
name: Round Dining Table
category: Furniture
footprint: 3x3
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 2.5
placement: center
room_types: mansion-dining, dining-hall, supper-room, noble-solar
typical_count: single
clusters_with: chair, silver-candlestick, napkin-pile, tureen, place-card, serving-trolley
notes: Large round formal dining table with a centerpiece bowl and four suggested place settings evenly spaced.
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 1.5,1.5 1.38 z 2-2.5

# Footprint 3x3: x 0-3, y 0-3. Round formal table.

# Table top (rich wood)
circle 1.5,1.5 1.38 texfill polyhaven/wood_table 0.88
circle 1.5,1.5 1.38 stroke #3a1f00 width 2

# Table edge bevel (inner ring)
circle 1.5,1.5 1.32 stroke #5c3a1e 0.6

# Wood grain suggestion (subtle radial)
circle 1.5,1.5 1.00 stroke #5c3a1e 0.25
circle 1.5,1.5 0.70 stroke #5c3a1e 0.25

# Velvet table runner across center (east-west)
rect 0.18,1.30 2.64,0.40 texfill polyhaven/velour_velvet 0.8
rect 0.18,1.30 2.64,0.40 fill #5a1a1a 0.35
rect 0.18,1.30 2.64,0.40 stroke #2a0a0a 0.6

# Centerpiece bowl (ornate porcelain)
circle 1.5,1.5 0.22 fill #f0e8d8 0.95
circle 1.5,1.5 0.22 stroke #8b7355
circle 1.5,1.5 0.18 fill #f8f0e0 0.9
# Centerpiece contents — fruit
circle 1.42,1.44 0.05 fill #c83820 0.95
circle 1.42,1.44 0.05 stroke #4a0a00
circle 1.58,1.46 0.05 fill #80a040 0.95
circle 1.58,1.46 0.05 stroke #2a3a10
circle 1.50,1.56 0.05 fill #d0a020 0.95
circle 1.50,1.56 0.05 stroke #5a3a00

# === FOUR PLACE SETTINGS (N, S, E, W) ===
# North setting (around y=0.35)

circle 1.5,0.40 0.18 stroke #8b7355
circle 1.5,0.40 0.13 stroke #daa520 0.6 width 1
# North fork & knife
rect 1.20,0.34 0.08,0.16 fill #c0c0c0 0.9
rect 1.20,0.34 0.08,0.16 stroke #555555
rect 1.74,0.34 0.08,0.16 fill #c0c0c0 0.9
rect 1.74,0.34 0.08,0.16 stroke #555555

# South setting
circle 1.5,2.60 0.18 fill #f0e8d8 0.95
circle 1.5,2.60 0.18 stroke #8b7355
circle 1.5,2.60 0.13 stroke #daa520 0.6 width 1
rect 1.20,2.50 0.08,0.16 fill #c0c0c0 0.9
rect 1.20,2.50 0.08,0.16 stroke #555555
rect 1.74,2.50 0.08,0.16 fill #c0c0c0 0.9
rect 1.74,2.50 0.08,0.16 stroke #555555

# West setting
circle 0.40,1.5 0.18 fill #f0e8d8 0.95
circle 0.40,1.5 0.18 stroke #8b7355
circle 0.40,1.5 0.13 stroke #daa520 0.6 width 1
rect 0.32,1.20 0.16,0.08 fill #c0c0c0 0.9
rect 0.32,1.20 0.16,0.08 stroke #555555
rect 0.32,1.74 0.16,0.08 fill #c0c0c0 0.9
rect 0.32,1.74 0.16,0.08 stroke #555555

# East setting
circle 2.60,1.5 0.18 fill #f0e8d8 0.95
circle 2.60,1.5 0.18 stroke #8b7355
circle 2.60,1.5 0.13 stroke #daa520 0.6 width 1

rect 2.52,1.20 0.16,0.08 stroke #555555
rect 2.52,1.74 0.16,0.08 fill #c0c0c0 0.9
rect 2.52,1.74 0.16,0.08 stroke #555555
props.rowboat:
name: Rowboat
category: Nautical
footprint: 8x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2
placement: center
room_types: dock, harbor, underground-lake
typical_count: single
notes: Small vessel; place at water's edge or on dock. 20ft long × 5ft wide
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox poly 1.0,0.1 0.2,1.0 0.1,2.5 0.1,5.5 0.2,7.0 1.0,7.9 1.8,7.0 1.9,5.5 1.9,2.5 1.8,1.0 z 0-2

# Outer hull — tapered bow/stern shape
poly 1.0,0.1 0.2,1.0 0.1,2.5 0.1,5.5 0.2,7.0 1.0,7.9 1.8,7.0 1.9,5.5 1.9,2.5 1.8,1.0 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85

# Interior floor
poly 1.0,0.4 0.35,1.2 0.25,2.5 0.25,5.5 0.35,6.8 1.0,7.6 1.65,6.8 1.75,5.5 1.75,2.5 1.65,1.2 texfill polyhaven/worn_planks 0.75
poly 1.0,0.4 0.35,1.2 0.25,2.5 0.25,5.5 0.35,6.8 1.0,7.6 1.65,6.8 1.75,5.5 1.75,2.5 1.65,1.2 stroke #5c3a1e
# Thwart 1 (bow seat)
rect 0.4,2.0 1.2,0.15 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 0.4,2.0 1.2,0.15 stroke #3a1f00
# Thwart 2 (rowing seat, center)
rect 0.38,4.0 1.24,0.15 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 0.38,4.0 1.24,0.15 stroke #3a1f00
# Thwart 3 (stern seat)
rect 0.4,6.0 1.2,0.15 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.85
rect 0.4,6.0 1.2,0.15 stroke #3a1f00
# Thole pins (oarlock pegs at center thwart)
circle 0.22,4.08 0.06 fill #4a2800 0.9
circle 1.78,4.08 0.06 fill #4a2800 0.9
# Gunwale lines (inner hull edge shadow)
line 0.22,1.5 0.22,6.5 stroke #2a1400
line 1.78,1.5 1.78,6.5 stroke #2a1400
# Bow tip accent
circle 1.0,7.8 0.06 fill #3a1f00 0.8
# Plank seam lines (hull detail)
line 0.15,2.0 0.15,6.0 stroke #5c3a1e 0.3
line 1.85,2.0 1.85,6.0 stroke #5c3a1e 0.3

poly 0.42,0.12 0.55,0.08 0.58,0.22 0.45,0.25 stroke #666666

---

poly 0.30,0.12 0.70,0.12 0.76,0.22 0.82,0.50 0.84,1.00 0.82,1.50 0.76,1.78 0.70,1.88 0.30,1.88 0.24,1.78 0.18,1.50 0.16,1.00 0.18,0.50 0.24,0.22 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.8

# Canvas fold shadow lines running along the length (rolls of fabric visible)

bezier 0.74,0.30 0.72,0.70 0.72,1.30 0.74,1.70 stroke #8a7858 0.55 width 1
bezier 0.38,0.22 0.40,0.70 0.40,1.30 0.38,1.78 stroke #8a7858 0.35 width 1
bezier 0.62,0.22 0.60,0.70 0.60,1.30 0.62,1.78 stroke #8a7858 0.35 width 1

# Canvas highlight down the crest of the bundle (top catching light)
line 0.50,0.14 0.50,1.86 stroke #f0e8d0 0.5 width 2

# === Rope lashings cinching the bundle at intervals ===
# Lashing 1 (near north end)
rect 0.14,0.34 0.72,0.08 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
rect 0.14,0.34 0.72,0.08 stroke #2a1400
# Knot lump
circle 0.52,0.38 0.035 fill #6b4e2e 0.9
circle 0.52,0.38 0.035 stroke #2a1400

# Lashing 2 (mid-bundle, slightly tighter)

rect 0.14,0.74 0.72,0.08 stroke #2a1400
circle 0.52,0.78 0.035 fill #6b4e2e 0.9
circle 0.52,0.78 0.035 stroke #2a1400

# Lashing 3

rect 0.14,1.14 0.72,0.08 stroke #2a1400
circle 0.52,1.18 0.035 fill #6b4e2e 0.9
circle 0.52,1.18 0.035 stroke #2a1400

# Lashing 4 (near south end)

rect 0.14,1.54 0.72,0.08 stroke #2a1400
circle 0.52,1.58 0.035 fill #6b4e2e 0.9
circle 0.52,1.58 0.035 stroke #2a1400

# === HITBOX ===

line 0.16,2.84 0.28,2.72 stroke #777777

line 0.38,0.38 0.38,2.62 stroke #aaaaaa width 2

line 1.62,0.38 1.62,2.62 stroke #555555 width 2

# === Decorative trim on lid ===
rect 0.46,0.46 1.08,2.08 stroke #666666

# === Carved cross (centered on lid) ===

rect 0.88,0.65 0.24,1.70 fill #555555 0.2

# Horizontal beam

circle 0.46,0.46 0.03 fill #777777 0.5

circle 1.54,0.46 0.03 fill #777777 0.5

circle 1.54,2.54 0.06 stroke #666666
circle 1.54,2.54 0.03 fill #777777 0.5

    x: 1.0
    y: 1.0
    radius: 8
    color: "#a060ff"
    intensity: 0.6
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 1.0,1.0 0.92 z 0-0.6

# Outer basin stone rim
circle 1.0,1.0 0.94 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.8
circle 1.0,1.0 0.94 stroke #1a1020 width 2
# Inner rim step (polished obsidian)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.82 fill #1a1020 0.95
circle 1.0,1.0 0.82 stroke #0a0820
# Silver etchings around the rim (radial ticks)
line 1.0,0.12 1.0,0.22 stroke #c0c0c0 width 2
line 1.0,1.78 1.0,1.88 stroke #c0c0c0 width 2
line 0.12,1.0 0.22,1.0 stroke #c0c0c0 width 2
line 1.78,1.0 1.88,1.0 stroke #c0c0c0 width 2
line 0.34,0.34 0.42,0.42 stroke #c0c0c0 width 2
line 1.58,0.34 1.66,0.42 stroke #c0c0c0 width 2
line 0.34,1.66 0.42,1.58 stroke #c0c0c0 width 2
line 1.58,1.66 1.66,1.58 stroke #c0c0c0 width 2
# Silver sigil ring (circular band of runes)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.76 stroke #c0c0c0 0.85 width 1
circle 1.0,1.0 0.70 stroke #8040c0 0.55 width 1
# Mirror-still violet water surface
circle 1.0,1.0 0.66 gradient-radial #a060ff #2a1040 0.85
# Inner faint reflection ring
circle 1.0,1.0 0.50 fill #6040a0 0.35
# Vision-glow at center (active scrying)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.30 fill #a060ff 0.55
circle 1.0,1.0 0.18 fill #c080ff 0.65
circle 1.0,1.0 0.08 fill #e0c0ff 0.8
# Highlight sliver (mirror sheen)
arc 1.0,1.0 0.60 210 260 stroke #e0c0ff 0.5 width 1
# Silver sparkle motes on water
circle 0.70,0.80 0.02 fill #e0c0ff 0.85
circle 1.32,1.24 0.018 fill #e0c0ff 0.80
circle 1.20,0.70 0.016 fill #e0c0ff 0.75
props.scummy-water-pool:
name: Scummy Water Pool
category: Terrain
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: center
room_types: sewer-junction, sewer, undercity, cave, swamp
typical_count: few
clusters_with: oil-slick, floating-debris, sewage-channel
notes: Stagnant greenish-brown water with algae scum, bubbles, and floating film. Place in depressions or as room centerpiece.
---
# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2

# Stagnant water base — irregular pool
poly 0.20,0.40 0.50,0.18 1.10,0.12 1.60,0.22 1.88,0.50 1.82,1.20 1.62,1.70 1.10,1.88 0.55,1.82 0.22,1.50 0.12,1.00 fill #3a2a18 0.9
poly 0.20,0.40 0.50,0.18 1.10,0.12 1.60,0.22 1.88,0.50 1.82,1.20 1.62,1.70 1.10,1.88 0.55,1.82 0.22,1.50 0.12,1.00 stroke #1a1208

# Greenish scum overlay
poly 0.30,0.50 0.60,0.28 1.00,0.24 1.50,0.34 1.72,0.62 1.68,1.10 1.50,1.56 1.10,1.72 0.60,1.66 0.32,1.38 0.24,0.90 fill #4a6040 0.55

# Algae clumps
ellipse 0.45,0.55 0.12,0.08 fill #6a8060 0.8
ellipse 0.45,0.55 0.12,0.08 stroke #2a4020
ellipse 1.40,0.70 0.14,0.09 fill #6a8060 0.75
ellipse 1.40,0.70 0.14,0.09 stroke #2a4020
ellipse 0.80,1.30 0.16,0.10 fill #6a8060 0.8
ellipse 0.80,1.30 0.16,0.10 stroke #2a4020
ellipse 1.30,1.40 0.10,0.07 fill #5a7050 0.75

# Floating film streaks
bezier 0.30,0.80 0.60,0.60 1.20,1.00 1.60,0.85 stroke #6a8060 0.4 width 2
bezier 0.40,1.50 0.80,1.30 1.20,1.40 1.60,1.20 stroke #6a8060 0.35 width 2

# Bubbles
circle 0.70,0.45 0.04 stroke #8aa070 width 1
circle 0.75,0.43 0.015 fill #ffffff 0.4
circle 1.20,0.95 0.035 stroke #8aa070 width 1
circle 1.22,0.93 0.012 fill #ffffff 0.35
circle 0.95,1.60 0.04 stroke #8aa070 width 1
circle 0.97,1.58 0.015 fill #ffffff 0.4
circle 1.55,1.25 0.025 stroke #8aa070 width 1

# Dark depths (center hint)
ellipse 1.00,1.00 0.28,0.22 fill #0a0804 0.3
