props.serving-trolley:
name: Serving Trolley
category: Furniture
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 1.0
placement: wall
room_types: mansion-dining, dining-hall, supper-room, kitchen, noble-solar
typical_count: single
clusters_with: round-dining-table, china-cabinet, silver-candlestick, tureen
notes: Wheeled cart with silver tray, covered dishes, and a crystal decanter. Approaches from south.
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,0.72 z 0-1.0

# Footprint 1x2: x 0-2, y 0-1. Wall/corner placement; service side at south (high Y).

# Trolley top — wooden cart surface
rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,0.72 texfill polyhaven/wood_table 0.9
rect 0.08,0.08 1.84,0.72 stroke #2a1400

# Wood grain
line 0.10,0.30 1.90,0.30 stroke #3a1f00 0.35
line 0.10,0.58 1.90,0.58 stroke #3a1f00 0.35

# Wheels visible at corners (four circles, small, peeking under cart)
circle 0.14,0.14 0.07 fill #222222 0.95
circle 0.14,0.14 0.07 stroke #000000
circle 0.14,0.04 0.02 fill #666666 0.9
circle 1.86,0.14 0.07 fill #222222 0.95
circle 1.86,0.14 0.07 stroke #000000
circle 0.14,0.82 0.07 fill #222222 0.95
circle 0.14,0.82 0.07 stroke #000000
circle 1.86,0.82 0.07 fill #222222 0.95
circle 1.86,0.82 0.07 stroke #000000

# Silver tray on top (large rectangular)
rect 0.22,0.22 1.08,0.46 fill #c0c0c0 0.92
rect 0.22,0.22 1.08,0.46 stroke #555555
# Tray inner edge
rect 0.26,0.26 1.00,0.38 stroke #8899aa width 1

# Covered silver dish (large dome — left)
circle 0.46,0.45 0.14 fill #c0c0c0 0.95
circle 0.46,0.45 0.14 stroke #555555
circle 0.46,0.45 0.10 stroke #8899aa 0.6
# Dome handle knob
circle 0.46,0.45 0.035 fill #daa520 0.95
circle 0.46,0.45 0.035 stroke #5a3a00

# Smaller covered dish (right on tray)
circle 0.96,0.45 0.11 fill #c0c0c0 0.95
circle 0.96,0.45 0.11 stroke #555555
circle 0.96,0.45 0.03 fill #daa520 0.95

# Crystal decanter (right side — outside tray, on wood)
# Base
ellipse 1.60,0.55 0.11,0.08 fill #c8d8e8 0.7
ellipse 1.60,0.55 0.11,0.08 stroke #8899aa
# Wine filling (dark red showing through)
ellipse 1.60,0.55 0.08,0.055 fill #5a1a1a 0.8
# Neck
circle 1.60,0.38 0.05 fill #c8d8e8 0.75
circle 1.60,0.38 0.05 stroke #8899aa
# Stopper
circle 1.60,0.32 0.035 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 1.60,0.32 0.035 stroke #5a3a00

# Decanter crystal facet highlights
line 1.54,0.50 1.56,0.60 stroke #f0f8ff 0.5 width 1
line 1.66,0.50 1.64,0.60 stroke #f0f8ff 0.5 width 1

# Trolley handle bar (south edge — pushed by servants)
rect 0.30,0.80 1.40,0.04 fill #daa520 0.85
rect 0.30,0.80 1.40,0.04 stroke #5a3a00
props.severed-limb:
name: Severed Limb
category: Misc
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.15
placement: floor
room_types: battlefield-recent, battlefield, war-camp, crypt, ritual-chamber-dark, orc-war-camp
typical_count: few
clusters_with: corpse-soldier, blood-pool, weapon-stuck, crow-picking
notes: Detached arm or leg with torn fabric and blood trail; grim battlefield debris
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1
# Top-down: severed arm with hand — fabric scraps at stump, blood pool/trail

# Blood pool under stump
ellipse 0.22,0.36 0.14,0.10 fill #4a0000 0.8
ellipse 0.22,0.36 0.14,0.10 stroke #2a0000 0.6
# Central wet spot
ellipse 0.22,0.36 0.08,0.05 fill #8b0000 0.75

# Blood trail trailing from limb toward edge
poly 0.26,0.44 0.40,0.62 0.52,0.78 0.62,0.90 0.56,0.92 0.44,0.80 0.32,0.64 0.22,0.48 fill #4a0000 0.65
# Trail drops scattered
circle 0.68,0.88 0.025 fill #4a0000 0.75
circle 0.76,0.82 0.02 fill #2a0000 0.7
circle 0.82,0.70 0.018 fill #4a0000 0.65

# === The arm itself (lying diagonally from NW to SE) ===
# Shoulder/stump end (NW) - torn flesh, bone visible
poly 0.16,0.30 0.30,0.24 0.36,0.38 0.22,0.46 fill #c4a882 0.85
poly 0.16,0.30 0.30,0.24 0.36,0.38 0.22,0.46 stroke #3a2018
# Bone fragment sticking from stump
poly 0.18,0.30 0.22,0.28 0.24,0.36 0.20,0.38 fill #e8dcc8 0.95
poly 0.18,0.30 0.22,0.28 0.24,0.36 0.20,0.38 stroke #8b7d6b
# Torn red meat at stump
ellipse 0.24,0.38 0.06,0.04 fill #8b0000 0.85

# Upper arm (fabric sleeve - dark cloth remnant)
poly 0.22,0.40 0.38,0.32 0.50,0.48 0.36,0.56 fill #3a3020 0.9
poly 0.22,0.40 0.38,0.32 0.50,0.48 0.36,0.56 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.4
poly 0.22,0.40 0.38,0.32 0.50,0.48 0.36,0.56 stroke #1a1008
# Torn fabric edges (fraying)
line 0.18,0.32 0.14,0.28 stroke #1a1008 width 1
line 0.20,0.44 0.16,0.48 stroke #1a1008 width 1
line 0.32,0.28 0.30,0.22 stroke #1a1008 width 1

# Elbow (slight bend)
circle 0.44,0.52 0.06 fill #c4a882 0.85
circle 0.44,0.52 0.06 stroke #3a2018

# Forearm (skin tone, past sleeve)
poly 0.40,0.50 0.52,0.46 0.68,0.62 0.56,0.66 fill #c4a882 0.85
poly 0.40,0.50 0.52,0.46 0.68,0.62 0.56,0.66 stroke #3a2018

# Wrist
circle 0.64,0.60 0.05 fill #c4a882 0.85
circle 0.64,0.60 0.05 stroke #3a2018

# Hand (clenched / partially open)
poly 0.60,0.58 0.76,0.56 0.82,0.68 0.74,0.74 0.64,0.70 fill #c4a882 0.9
poly 0.60,0.58 0.76,0.56 0.82,0.68 0.74,0.74 0.64,0.70 stroke #3a2018
# Finger details
line 0.72,0.58 0.78,0.54 stroke #3a2018 width 1
line 0.76,0.64 0.82,0.62 stroke #3a2018 width 1
line 0.78,0.68 0.84,0.70 stroke #3a2018 width 1
line 0.72,0.72 0.76,0.78 stroke #3a2018 width 1

# Fingernails
circle 0.80,0.56 0.012 fill #8b7d6b 0.8

# Blood smears on arm
line 0.32,0.44 0.38,0.46 stroke #4a0000 width 1
ellipse 0.48,0.54 0.04,0.02 fill #4a0000 0.7
props.sewage-channel:
name: Sewage Channel
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x3
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: wall
room_types: sewer-junction, sewer, undercity
typical_count: few
clusters_with: bridge-wood, grate-floor, scummy-water-pool
notes: Straight concrete channel of flowing brown sewage; streaks suggest current. Run along walls or through rooms.
---
# footprint 1x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-1
# Channel runs east-west; flow direction south (high y)

# Stone channel edges (north and south lips)
rect 0.00,0.08 3.00,0.12 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.00,0.08 3.00,0.12 stroke #2a2820
rect 0.00,0.80 3.00,0.12 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.00,0.80 3.00,0.12 stroke #2a2820

# Channel interior (brown sewage)
rect 0.00,0.20 3.00,0.60 fill #3a2a18 0.95
rect 0.00,0.20 3.00,0.60 stroke #1a1208

# Flow streaks (east-west direction)
bezier 0.05,0.32 0.75,0.28 1.50,0.36 2.95,0.30 stroke #5a4028 0.6 width 2
bezier 0.05,0.45 0.80,0.50 1.60,0.42 2.95,0.48 stroke #5a4028 0.55 width 2
bezier 0.05,0.58 0.70,0.55 1.40,0.62 2.95,0.58 stroke #5a4028 0.6 width 2
bezier 0.05,0.70 0.85,0.68 1.70,0.72 2.95,0.68 stroke #4a3020 0.5 width 2

# Scum patches floating
ellipse 0.45,0.38 0.15,0.05 fill #4a6040 0.5
ellipse 1.20,0.62 0.18,0.06 fill #4a6040 0.55
ellipse 2.20,0.42 0.16,0.05 fill #4a6040 0.5
ellipse 2.70,0.66 0.12,0.04 fill #4a6040 0.5

# Bubbles (suggesting current)
circle 0.80,0.50 0.02 fill #8aa070 0.7
circle 1.60,0.48 0.02 fill #8aa070 0.7
circle 2.40,0.52 0.02 fill #8aa070 0.7

# Lip highlight (moisture on stone)
line 0.00,0.20 3.00,0.20 stroke #6a8060 0.3 width 1
line 0.00,0.80 3.00,0.80 stroke #6a8060 0.3 width 1
props.sewage-channel-short:
name: Sewage Channel (Short)
category: Terrain
facing: yes
footprint: 1x1
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: sewer-junction, sewer, undercity
typical_count: many
clusters_with: sewage-channel, sewage-channel-turn, sewage-channel-t, sewage-channel-x, grate-floor
notes: Single-cell straight section of sewage channel — use for fine-grained layouts between turns and junctions. Tiles seamlessly with sewage-channel (1x3) and all sewage-channel-* variants.
---
# North stone lip
rect 0.00,0.08 1.00,0.12 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.00,0.08 1.00,0.12 stroke #2a2820
# South stone lip
rect 0.00,0.80 1.00,0.12 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.00,0.80 1.00,0.12 stroke #2a2820
# Channel fluid (matching the 1x3 piece's channel width)
rect 0.00,0.20 1.00,0.60 fill #3a2a18 0.95
rect 0.00,0.20 1.00,0.60 stroke #1a1208
# Flow streaks
bezier 0.02,0.32 0.25,0.30 0.75,0.36 0.98,0.32 stroke #5a4028 0.55 width 2
bezier 0.02,0.50 0.30,0.52 0.70,0.48 0.98,0.50 stroke #5a4028 0.5 width 2
bezier 0.02,0.68 0.25,0.70 0.75,0.64 0.98,0.68 stroke #4a3020 0.45 width 2
# Scum patches
ellipse 0.30,0.38 0.10,0.05 fill #4a6040 0.55
ellipse 0.70,0.62 0.10,0.05 fill #4a6040 0.5
# Bubbles
circle 0.45,0.48 0.02 fill #8aa070 0.7
circle 0.65,0.52 0.018 fill #8aa070 0.6
props.sewage-channel-t:
name: Sewage Channel T-Junction
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: sewer-junction, sewer, undercity
typical_count: many
clusters_with: sewage-channel, sewage-channel-turn, sewage-channel-x, grate-floor
notes: T-junction for the sewage channel network — at facing 0 the straight run connects W↔E and a branch drops south. Lips 0.12 thick so sections tile flush with the straight piece.
---
# === Stone lips around the fluid T-shape ===
# North lip — runs the full width above the horizontal fluid
rect 0.00,0.08 1.00,0.12 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.00,0.08 1.00,0.12 stroke #2a2820
# South lip, western segment (west of the south branch)
rect 0.00,0.80 0.20,0.12 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.00,0.80 0.20,0.12 stroke #2a2820
# South lip, eastern segment (east of the south branch)
rect 0.80,0.80 0.20,0.12 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.80,0.80 0.20,0.12 stroke #2a2820
# South branch — W-side lip (running from the south lip down to the cell edge)
rect 0.08,0.80 0.12,0.20 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.08,0.80 0.12,0.20 stroke #2a2820
# South branch — E-side lip
rect 0.80,0.80 0.12,0.20 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.80,0.80 0.12,0.20 stroke #2a2820
# === Fluid T-shape as a single polygon ===
poly 0.00,0.20 1.00,0.20 1.00,0.80 0.80,0.80 0.80,1.00 0.20,1.00 0.20,0.80 0.00,0.80 fill #3a2a18 0.95
poly 0.00,0.20 1.00,0.20 1.00,0.80 0.80,0.80 0.80,1.00 0.20,1.00 0.20,0.80 0.00,0.80 stroke #1a1208 width 1
# Flow streaks on the horizontal run

# Horizontal arm — N lip pieces (flanking the vertical arm)

rect 0.80,0.80 0.20,0.12 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85

rect 0.08,0.00 0.12,0.20 stroke #2a2820
rect 0.08,0.80 0.12,0.20 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.08,0.80 0.12,0.20 stroke #2a2820

rect 0.80,0.80 0.12,0.20 texfill polyhaven/stone_floor 0.85
rect 0.80,0.80 0.12,0.20 stroke #2a2820

# Flow streaks on horizontal and vertical arms (outside the central junction)
bezier 0.05,0.34 0.22,0.36 0.35,0.38 0.44,0.42 stroke #5a4028 0.5 width 2
bezier 0.56,0.42 0.65,0.38 0.78,0.36 0.95,0.34 stroke #5a4028 0.5 width 2
bezier 0.05,0.68 0.22,0.66 0.35,0.64 0.44,0.60 stroke #4a3020 0.45 width 2
bezier 0.56,0.60 0.65,0.64 0.78,0.66 0.95,0.68 stroke #4a3020 0.45 width 2
bezier 0.34,0.05 0.36,0.22 0.38,0.35 0.42,0.44 stroke #5a4028 0.5 width 2
bezier 0.42,0.56 0.38,0.65 0.36,0.78 0.34,0.95 stroke #5a4028 0.5 width 2
bezier 0.68,0.05 0.66,0.22 0.64,0.35 0.60,0.44 stroke #4a3020 0.45 width 2
bezier 0.60,0.56 0.64,0.65 0.66,0.78 0.68,0.95 stroke #4a3020 0.45 width 2
# Scum patches on each arm

ellipse 0.45,0.12 0.04,0.05 fill #4a6040 0.5

circle 0.50,0.62 0.06 stroke #5a0808
# Pin heads on cushion
circle 0.48,0.60 0.01 fill #daa520 0.95
circle 0.52,0.60 0.01 fill #daa520 0.95
circle 0.50,0.64 0.01 fill #daa520 0.95
# White fabric scrap edge

props.sewing-bench:

footprint: 2x1

clusters_with: cutting-table, mannequin, buttons-jar, thread-spool
notes: Work bench with treadle base and hand-cranked sewing mechanism; place along wall or near cutting table
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.12,0.12 0.76,1.76 z 0-2.5

# Bench top surface (tall narrow, 1 col x 2 rows)
rect 0.12,0.12 0.76,1.76 texfill polyhaven/wood_table 0.85
rect 0.12,0.12 0.76,1.76 stroke #5c3a1e
# Leg shadows in corners
circle 0.22,0.22 0.06 fill #3a1f00 0.5
circle 0.78,0.22 0.06 fill #3a1f00 0.5
circle 0.22,1.78 0.06 fill #3a1f00 0.5

# Treadle base visible at south end (two parallel rectangles of pedal boards)

rect 0.20,1.40 0.28,0.32 stroke #3a1f00
rect 0.52,1.40 0.28,0.32 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.75
rect 0.52,1.40 0.28,0.32 stroke #3a1f00

circle 0.50,0.50 0.22 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.85
circle 0.50,0.50 0.22 stroke #333333
# Crank handle arm
line 0.50,0.50 0.72,0.38 stroke #444444 width 3
circle 0.72,0.38 0.05 fill #6b4e2e 0.9
circle 0.72,0.38 0.05 stroke #3a1f00
# Central axle/needle housing
circle 0.50,0.50 0.06 fill #222222 0.9
circle 0.50,0.50 0.06 stroke #111111
# Needle pointing south from mechanism
line 0.50,0.56 0.50,0.78 stroke #8899aa width 2
# Spool of thread on top (small circle, upper-right)
circle 0.34,0.24 0.09 fill #c82828 0.9
circle 0.34,0.24 0.09 stroke #5a0808
circle 0.34,0.24 0.03 fill #c8b898 0.9
# Thread trailing from spool toward needle
bezier 0.34,0.33 0.40,0.40 0.45,0.46 0.50,0.50 stroke #c82828 width 1

props.shaft-light-from-above:
name: Shaft Light From Above
category: Lighting
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
lights: [{"preset":"candle","x":1.0,"y":1.0,"radius":5,"color":"#eef4ff","intensity":0.4}]
placement: center
room_types: oubliette, dungeon, cave, prison-block
typical_count: single
clusters_with: grate-ceiling, rubble, puddle
notes: Conical pool of pale light on the floor from an overhead shaft or grate; the primary (often only) light source in an oubliette. Place at room center.
---
# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: a soft gradient glow — light pool on the floor under an overhead shaft
# NOT a 3D cone, just a top-down pool of light with darker edges

# Outermost soft halo (barely visible)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.95 gradient-radial #eef4ff #000000 0.12

# Mid glow ring
circle 1.0,1.0 0.72 gradient-radial #dde8f4 #000000 0.22

# Main light pool
circle 1.0,1.0 0.50 gradient-radial #eef4ff #556677 0.4

# Bright inner core
circle 1.0,1.0 0.28 fill #eef4ff 0.5

# Hot center
circle 1.0,1.0 0.12 fill #ffffff 0.55

# Faint dust mote specks floating in the light beam
circle 0.85,0.80 0.02 fill #ffffff 0.3
circle 1.15,0.90 0.015 fill #ffffff 0.25
circle 1.05,1.20 0.018 fill #ffffff 0.28
circle 0.92,1.10 0.012 fill #ffffff 0.22
circle 1.20,1.15 0.015 fill #ffffff 0.2
circle 0.78,1.05 0.012 fill #ffffff 0.18
circle 1.10,0.75 0.015 fill #ffffff 0.22

# Very faint shadow of shaft edges (subtle square implied by overhead opening)

line 1.45,0.55 1.45,1.45 stroke #000000 0.06 width 1
line 0.55,0.55 1.45,0.55 stroke #000000 0.06 width 1
line 0.55,1.45 1.45,1.45 stroke #000000 0.06 width 1
props.shed-skin:
name: Shed Skin
category: Effects
footprint: 2x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.02
placement: floor
room_types: monster-lair-small, cave, underdark-outpost, sewer, basilisk-lair
typical_count: single
clusters_with: carcass-fresh, claw-marks-wall, egg-sac, bone-pile
notes: Translucent snake-like shed skin in a curved crumpled trail — ghostly pale parchment-yellow with diamond-scale texture.
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.08,0.12 0.84,1.76 z 0-0.02

# Faint ground discoloration where skin lies
poly 0.10,0.40 0.24,0.22 0.46,0.20 0.70,0.42 0.82,0.80 0.78,1.26 0.58,1.62 0.34,1.78 0.14,1.62 0.06,1.30 0.10,0.96 0.18,0.66 fill #2a2418 0.2

# Main shed skin body (curved S-trail — translucent parchment yellow)
poly 0.20,0.34 0.32,0.22 0.48,0.20 0.64,0.30 0.72,0.48 0.74,0.78 0.64,1.10 0.48,1.40 0.38,1.66 0.28,1.74 0.20,1.66 0.22,1.46 0.34,1.20 0.46,0.94 0.52,0.66 0.48,0.50 0.36,0.44 0.26,0.52 fill #e8dcb0 0.75
poly 0.20,0.34 0.32,0.22 0.48,0.20 0.64,0.30 0.72,0.48 0.74,0.78 0.64,1.10 0.48,1.40 0.38,1.66 0.28,1.74 0.20,1.66 0.22,1.46 0.34,1.20 0.46,0.94 0.52,0.66 0.48,0.50 0.36,0.44 0.26,0.52 stroke #8a7848 0.8

# Inner shadow channel (where skin is doubled over)
bezier 0.32,0.28 0.42,0.22 0.56,0.28 0.64,0.42 stroke #8a7848 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.64,0.42 0.70,0.62 0.66,0.88 0.56,1.14 stroke #8a7848 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.56,1.14 0.42,1.40 0.34,1.58 0.28,1.68 stroke #8a7848 0.5 width 1

# Diamond scale texture pattern (tiny repeated curves along the body)
# Upper segment scales
bezier 0.26,0.28 0.30,0.26 0.32,0.30 0.28,0.32 stroke #a89868 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.34,0.26 0.38,0.24 0.40,0.28 0.36,0.30 stroke #a89868 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.42,0.26 0.46,0.24 0.48,0.28 0.44,0.30 stroke #a89868 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.50,0.28 0.54,0.26 0.56,0.30 0.52,0.32 stroke #a89868 0.5 width 1
# Middle curl scales
bezier 0.60,0.44 0.64,0.44 0.64,0.48 0.60,0.48 stroke #a89868 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.64,0.58 0.68,0.58 0.68,0.62 0.64,0.62 stroke #a89868 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.60,0.74 0.64,0.74 0.64,0.78 0.60,0.78 stroke #a89868 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.56,0.90 0.60,0.90 0.60,0.94 0.56,0.94 stroke #a89868 0.5 width 1
# Lower segment scales
bezier 0.48,1.08 0.52,1.08 0.52,1.12 0.48,1.12 stroke #a89868 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.42,1.24 0.46,1.24 0.46,1.28 0.42,1.28 stroke #a89868 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.36,1.42 0.40,1.42 0.40,1.46 0.36,1.46 stroke #a89868 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.32,1.58 0.36,1.58 0.36,1.62 0.32,1.62 stroke #a89868 0.5 width 1

# Translucent highlight sheen (shows it's empty / hollow)
poly 0.32,0.28 0.44,0.26 0.56,0.34 0.58,0.50 0.48,0.52 0.40,0.44 0.32,0.40 fill #ffffff 0.25

# Tattered / torn edges along the trail

# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.0,0.10 2.0,0.80 z 0-3.5

# footprint 1x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-1
# Top-down: heavy wooden counter surface with iron bands. Flush left/right for tiling.

line 0.0,0.68 2.0,0.68 stroke #3a1f00 0.3

# NE bracket

# SW bracket
line 0.0,0.88 0.10,0.88 stroke #555555 width 2
line 0.0,0.78 0.0,0.88 stroke #555555 width 2
# SE bracket
line 1.90,0.88 2.0,0.88 stroke #555555 width 2
line 2.0,0.78 2.0,0.88 stroke #555555 width 2

props.silver-candlestick:
name: Silver Candlestick
category: Decorative
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 1.0
placement: any
lights: [{"type":"candle","x":0.5,"y":0.5,"radius":6,"color":"#ffcc80","intensity":0.7}]

notes: Tall ornate silver candlestick with one lit candle. Emits soft warm candlelight.
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.18 z 0-1.0

# Footprint 1x1: x 0-1, y 0-1. Top-down: round base, fluted stem disc, candle cup, flame.

# Base (wide silver foot)

circle 0.5,0.5 0.28 stroke #555555
# Base inner disc (slightly raised)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.24 fill #c0c0c0 0.95
circle 0.5,0.5 0.24 stroke #555555

# Base fluted decoration (radial spokes)

line 0.5,0.66 0.5,0.74 stroke #555555 0.6 width 1
line 0.26,0.5 0.34,0.5 stroke #555555 0.6 width 1
line 0.66,0.5 0.74,0.5 stroke #555555 0.6 width 1
line 0.34,0.34 0.40,0.40 stroke #555555 0.5 width 1
line 0.66,0.34 0.60,0.40 stroke #555555 0.5 width 1
line 0.34,0.66 0.40,0.60 stroke #555555 0.5 width 1
line 0.66,0.66 0.60,0.60 stroke #555555 0.5 width 1

# Fluted stem disc (middle swell, viewed from top as a ring)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.15 fill #c0c0c0 0.95
circle 0.5,0.5 0.15 stroke #555555
circle 0.5,0.5 0.12 stroke #8899aa 0.7

# Candle cup (drip pan — small dish above stem)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.10 fill #8899aa 0.9
circle 0.5,0.5 0.10 stroke #444444

# Candle (white wax — circular cross-section)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.065 fill #f0e8d8 0.95
circle 0.5,0.5 0.065 stroke #8b7355

# Wax drips on cup (small blobs)
circle 0.44,0.52 0.018 fill #f0e8d8 0.85
circle 0.56,0.48 0.015 fill #f0e8d8 0.8

# Flame (small glow + tear shape)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.055 fill #ffcc80 0.45
circle 0.5,0.5 0.035 fill #ffaa00 0.65
poly 0.49,0.50 0.50,0.46 0.51,0.50 fill #ffcc00 0.85
circle 0.5,0.49 0.012 fill #ffffff 0.9

# Base rim highlight (silver glint)
arc 0.5,0.5 0.27 210 340 stroke #f0f0f0 0.5 width 1
props.silver-cord-pylon:
name: Silver Cord Pylon
category: Magical
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.2
placement: corner
room_types: astral-anchor, astral-sea, planar-nexus
typical_count: few
clusters_with: astral-anchor-stone, silver-cord-stub, portal-stela
notes: Top-down view of a rune-etched pylon — octagonal plinth with a glowing central cap and silver cords radiating outward into the void
lights:
  - type: candle
    x: 1.0
    y: 1.0
    radius: 10
    color: "#e0e0ff"
    intensity: 0.7
---
# Hitbox: pylon shaft blocks light
hitbox circle 1.0,1.0 0.38 z 0-2.2
# Violet halo around the pylon
circle 1.0,1.0 0.90 gradient-radial #c0a0ff #1a0828 0.30
# Octagonal stone plinth (base, visible from above)
poly 0.40,0.22 1.60,0.22 1.78,0.40 1.78,1.60 1.60,1.78 0.40,1.78 0.22,1.60 0.22,0.40 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.80
poly 0.40,0.22 1.60,0.22 1.78,0.40 1.78,1.60 1.60,1.78 0.40,1.78 0.22,1.60 0.22,0.40 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
# Plinth inner trim (rune band)
poly 0.52,0.36 1.48,0.36 1.64,0.52 1.64,1.48 1.48,1.64 0.52,1.64 0.36,1.48 0.36,0.52 fill #8060c0 0.35
poly 0.52,0.36 1.48,0.36 1.64,0.52 1.64,1.48 1.48,1.64 0.52,1.64 0.36,1.48 0.36,0.52 stroke #8060d0 width 1
# Runes on the band (small cross-marks at each corner)
line 1.0,0.36 1.0,0.44 stroke #e0e0ff width 1
line 1.0,1.56 1.0,1.64 stroke #e0e0ff width 1
line 0.36,1.0 0.44,1.0 stroke #e0e0ff width 1
line 1.56,1.0 1.64,1.0 stroke #e0e0ff width 1
line 0.42,0.42 0.48,0.48 stroke #e0e0ff width 1
line 1.58,0.42 1.52,0.48 stroke #e0e0ff width 1
line 1.58,1.58 1.52,1.52 stroke #e0e0ff width 1
line 0.42,1.58 0.48,1.52 stroke #e0e0ff width 1
# Shaft cross-section (octagonal inner column)
poly 0.70,0.58 1.30,0.58 1.42,0.70 1.42,1.30 1.30,1.42 0.70,1.42 0.58,1.30 0.58,0.70 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.75
poly 0.70,0.58 1.30,0.58 1.42,0.70 1.42,1.30 1.30,1.42 0.70,1.42 0.58,1.30 0.58,0.70 stroke #4a3a80 width 2
# Central rune disc
circle 1.0,1.0 0.22 fill #c0c0c0 0.75
circle 1.0,1.0 0.22 stroke #8060d0 width 2
circle 1.0,1.0 0.14 fill #e0e0ff 0.8
circle 1.0,1.0 0.14 stroke #8060d0 width 1
# Apex glowing core (captive starlight)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.08 fill #ffffff 0.95
circle 1.0,1.0 0.04 fill #e0e0ff 1.0
# === Silver cord tethers — radiating out into the void from the apex ===
# N
bezier 1.0,0.80 1.0,0.50 0.95,0.25 1.05,0.05 stroke #e0e0ff width 2
circle 1.05,0.05 0.028 fill #e0e0ff 0.9
# NE
bezier 1.14,0.86 1.40,0.62 1.65,0.40 1.90,0.20 stroke #c0a0ff width 2
circle 1.90,0.20 0.025 fill #e0e0ff 0.9
# E
bezier 1.20,1.0 1.50,1.0 1.75,1.05 1.95,0.95 stroke #e0e0ff width 2
circle 1.95,0.95 0.028 fill #e0e0ff 0.9
# SE
bezier 1.14,1.14 1.40,1.38 1.65,1.60 1.88,1.82 stroke #c0a0ff width 2
circle 1.88,1.82 0.025 fill #e0e0ff 0.9
# S
bezier 1.0,1.20 1.05,1.50 0.95,1.75 1.02,1.95 stroke #e0e0ff width 2
circle 1.02,1.95 0.028 fill #e0e0ff 0.9
# SW
bezier 0.86,1.14 0.60,1.38 0.35,1.60 0.10,1.82 stroke #c0a0ff width 2
circle 0.10,1.82 0.025 fill #e0e0ff 0.9
# W
bezier 0.80,1.0 0.50,1.0 0.22,0.95 0.05,1.05 stroke #e0e0ff width 2
circle 0.05,1.05 0.028 fill #e0e0ff 0.9
# NW
bezier 0.86,0.86 0.60,0.60 0.35,0.38 0.12,0.18 stroke #c0a0ff width 2
circle 0.12,0.18 0.025 fill #e0e0ff 0.9
props.silver-cord-stub:
name: Silver Cord Stub
category: Magical
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: astral-anchor, astral-sea, planar-nexus
typical_count: few
clusters_with: silver-cord-pylon, planar-sigil-shard, star-dust-pile
notes: Severed end of a silver cord, still twitching slightly. Its dangling filament sparks and frays — a grim sign of a traveler who will not return to their body.
lights:
  - type: candle
    x: 0.5
    y: 0.5
    radius: 5
    color: "#e0e0ff"
    intensity: 0.5
---
# Faint silver residue glow
circle 0.5,0.5 0.38 gradient-radial #e0e0ff #4a3a80 0.22

# Main cord body — serpentine twisted silver thread
bezier 0.12,0.3 0.3,0.38 0.45,0.55 0.5,0.6 stroke #e0e0ff width 3
bezier 0.5,0.6 0.62,0.68 0.74,0.6 0.85,0.5 stroke #c0c0c0 width 3

# Cord inner bright highlight
bezier 0.12,0.3 0.3,0.38 0.45,0.55 0.5,0.6 stroke #ffffff width 1
bezier 0.5,0.6 0.62,0.68 0.74,0.6 0.85,0.5 stroke #ffffff width 1

# Severed end — frayed split (at 0.85,0.5)
line 0.85,0.5 0.92,0.44 stroke #e0e0ff width 1
line 0.85,0.5 0.92,0.5 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.85,0.5 0.92,0.56 stroke #e0e0ff width 1
line 0.85,0.5 0.88,0.42 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.85,0.5 0.88,0.58 stroke #c0a0ff width 1

# Severed end — bright burst
circle 0.88,0.5 0.05 fill #e0e0ff 0.55
circle 0.88,0.5 0.025 fill #ffffff 0.9

# Sparks / dangling motes near fray
circle 0.94,0.44 0.014 fill #e0e0ff 0.85
circle 0.96,0.52 0.012 fill #ffffff 0.8
circle 0.92,0.6 0.012 fill #c0a0ff 0.75

# Violet backdrop taint at severance
circle 0.88,0.5 0.12 fill #a080ff 0.15

# Twisted cord strands (detail)
line 0.25,0.32 0.3,0.4 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.42,0.5 0.48,0.58 stroke #c0a0ff width 1
line 0.65,0.66 0.72,0.62 stroke #c0a0ff width 1

props.skeleton-charred:
name: Charred Skeleton
category: Misc
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: elemental-fire-node, volcano-caldera, elemental-node, crypt

---
# footprint 1x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-1
# Top-down: skeleton curled on side, head east, feet west

# Ash aureole beneath body

ellipse 1.0,0.55 0.7,0.28 fill #1a0800 0.4

# Vertebrae bumps

circle 1.5,0.46 0.035 stroke #2a1500 width 1
circle 1.35,0.48 0.035 fill #d4c4a8 0.7
circle 1.35,0.48 0.035 stroke #2a1500 width 1

circle 1.15,0.52 0.035 stroke #2a1500 width 1
circle 0.95,0.55 0.035 fill #a89878 0.7
circle 0.95,0.55 0.035 stroke #2a1500 width 1
circle 0.78,0.58 0.035 fill #8a7858 0.7
circle 0.78,0.58 0.035 stroke #2a1500 width 1

# Skull (east end)

ellipse 1.7,0.5 0.12,0.1 stroke #2a1500 width 1
# Eye sockets
circle 1.7,0.47 0.025 fill #1a0800 0.95
circle 1.76,0.51 0.02 fill #1a0800 0.95
# Jaw line
line 1.62,0.53 1.78,0.55 stroke #2a1500 width 1
# Scorch on skull
poly 1.68,0.43 1.74,0.43 1.72,0.48 fill #1a0800 0.6

# Ribcage arc (north side — body on its left)
arc 1.3,0.4 0.12 180 360 stroke #c8b898 width 2
arc 1.2,0.4 0.1 180 360 stroke #a89878 width 2
arc 1.1,0.42 0.09 180 360 stroke #8a7858 width 2
# Rib ends protrude
line 1.3,0.4 1.3,0.35 stroke #c8b898 width 1
line 1.2,0.4 1.2,0.35 stroke #a89878 width 1

# Pelvis (west of spine)
ellipse 0.72,0.62 0.1,0.08 fill #a89878 0.7
ellipse 0.72,0.62 0.1,0.08 stroke #2a1500 width 1

# Leg bones (curled, femur + tibia, to the west)
line 0.65,0.62 0.45,0.55 stroke #c8b898 width 3
line 0.45,0.55 0.28,0.7 stroke #a89878 width 3
line 0.7,0.68 0.5,0.75 stroke #c8b898 width 3
line 0.5,0.75 0.35,0.68 stroke #a89878 width 3

# Arm bone (thrown up, north)
line 1.35,0.45 1.2,0.3 stroke #c8b898 width 2
line 1.2,0.3 1.1,0.22 stroke #a89878 width 2
# Hand bones
circle 1.08,0.2 0.025 fill #8a7858 0.75

# Charred scorch cracks on the skull/ribs
line 1.65,0.46 1.73,0.52 stroke #1a0800 width 1
line 1.25,0.48 1.32,0.42 stroke #1a0800 width 1
props.skeleton-slumped:
name: Slumped Skeleton
category: Misc
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.2
placement: wall
room_types: ruined-watchtower, crypt, dungeon-cell, orc-war-camp
typical_count: few

notes: Skeletal figure collapsed against a wall — skull fallen to one side, rib cage partly intact, limbs splayed. Wall side = north (low Y). Vary rotation per placement.
---
# footprint 1x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-1
# Top-down: skeleton slumped with skull at west end (x~0.35), ribs central, legs sprawled east.
# Back/wall side = north (low Y). Body lying on floor along wall.

# Dust/grime shadow under bones (very faint, not a drop shadow — it's dirt)
ellipse 1.00,0.60 0.85,0.28 fill #1a1208 0.25

# === SKULL (west end) ===
# Cranium — tilted, viewed from above/slightly side
poly 0.18,0.44 0.22,0.34 0.30,0.28 0.42,0.28 0.52,0.34 0.54,0.44 0.50,0.54 0.40,0.58 0.28,0.58 0.20,0.52 fill #d4c4a8 0.9

# Eye sockets (dark hollows)
circle 0.30,0.40 0.05 fill #1a1010 0.9
circle 0.44,0.40 0.05 fill #1a1010 0.9
# Nasal cavity
poly 0.36,0.46 0.40,0.46 0.38,0.52 fill #1a1010 0.75
# Cracked skull line
line 0.28,0.30 0.34,0.36 stroke #6a5848 0.7 width 1
# Jaw detached slightly southeast
poly 0.38,0.58 0.52,0.56 0.56,0.62 0.50,0.66 0.40,0.66 fill #c8b898 0.85
poly 0.38,0.58 0.52,0.56 0.56,0.62 0.50,0.66 0.40,0.66 stroke #8a7a6a

# === SPINE (fractured, leading east from skull) ===
# Vertebrae as small ellipses
ellipse 0.64,0.56 0.04,0.05 fill #d4c4a8 0.8
ellipse 0.64,0.56 0.04,0.05 stroke #8a7a6a
ellipse 0.74,0.56 0.04,0.05 fill #d4c4a8 0.8
ellipse 0.74,0.56 0.04,0.05 stroke #8a7a6a
ellipse 0.84,0.58 0.04,0.05 fill #c8b898 0.8
ellipse 0.84,0.58 0.04,0.05 stroke #8a7a6a
ellipse 0.94,0.58 0.04,0.05 fill #d4c4a8 0.8
ellipse 0.94,0.58 0.04,0.05 stroke #8a7a6a
ellipse 1.04,0.60 0.04,0.05 fill #c8b898 0.8

# === RIBCAGE (collapsed, curved ribs) ===
# Upper rib curves (thin bezier lines representing ribs from above)
bezier 0.66,0.52 0.72,0.42 0.82,0.40 0.90,0.44 stroke #c8b898 width 2
bezier 0.66,0.60 0.72,0.70 0.82,0.72 0.90,0.68 stroke #c8b898 width 2
bezier 0.76,0.50 0.82,0.40 0.92,0.38 1.00,0.44 stroke #d4c4a8 width 2
bezier 0.76,0.62 0.82,0.72 0.92,0.74 1.00,0.68 stroke #d4c4a8 width 2
bezier 0.86,0.50 0.92,0.40 1.02,0.40 1.10,0.46 stroke #c8b898 width 2
bezier 0.86,0.64 0.92,0.74 1.02,0.74 1.10,0.68 stroke #c8b898 width 2

# === PELVIS ===
poly 1.14,0.48 1.22,0.42 1.30,0.42 1.36,0.48 1.36,0.64 1.30,0.72 1.22,0.72 1.14,0.66 fill #d4c4a8 0.85
poly 1.14,0.48 1.22,0.42 1.30,0.42 1.36,0.48 1.36,0.64 1.30,0.72 1.22,0.72 1.14,0.66 stroke #8a7a6a
# Hip sockets
circle 1.20,0.52 0.03 fill #1a1010 0.5
circle 1.20,0.64 0.03 fill #1a1010 0.5

# === LEFT ARM (splayed north) ===
# Humerus
rect 0.66,0.30 0.24,0.05 fill #c8b898 0.8
rect 0.66,0.30 0.24,0.05 stroke #8a7a6a
# Forearm (bent)

rect 0.86,0.16 0.05,0.20 stroke #8a7a6a
# Hand bones

line 0.90,0.16 0.90,0.06 stroke #b0a090 width 1
line 0.92,0.16 0.96,0.08 stroke #b0a090 width 1

# === RIGHT ARM (resting across body south) ===

rect 0.80,0.78 0.26,0.05 stroke #8a7a6a

# Hand

line 1.20,0.82 1.28,0.78 stroke #b0a090 width 1

rect 1.68,0.28 0.05,0.22 stroke #8a7a6a
# Left foot bones

line 1.70,0.28 1.80,0.24 stroke #b0a090 width 1
line 1.70,0.28 1.82,0.30 stroke #b0a090 width 1

# Right tibia

props.skinning-knife:
name: Skinning Knife
category: Tools
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.1
placement: floor
room_types: cabin-hunters, cabin-trapper, hunting-lodge-large, butcher-shop, tannery
typical_count: few
clusters_with: skinning-table, stretched-hide, cleaver, whetstone, trap-rack
notes: Curved blade skinning knife with bone handle — trapper's tool
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.22,0.20 0.56,0.66 z 0-0.1

# Bone/antler handle (south end)
rect 0.40,0.60 0.20,0.24 fill #e0d4b8 0.95
rect 0.40,0.60 0.20,0.24 stroke #8a7858
# Handle grip texture (carved grooves)

line 0.40,0.72 0.60,0.72 stroke #8a7858 0.7
line 0.40,0.78 0.60,0.78 stroke #8a7858 0.7
# Handle cap (butt end)

ellipse 0.50,0.84 0.10,0.03 stroke #6a5040
# Handle rivet
circle 0.50,0.74 0.015 fill #5a3a00 0.9
circle 0.50,0.74 0.015 stroke #3a2000
# Bolster/guard (small metal band between handle and blade)
rect 0.38,0.56 0.24,0.06 fill #666666 0.95
rect 0.38,0.56 0.24,0.06 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.5
rect 0.38,0.56 0.24,0.06 stroke #222222

props.skull-on-stick:
name: Skull on Stick
category: Decor
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 1.5
placement: corner
room_types: goblin-warren-entrance, orc-war-camp, monster-lair-small
typical_count: few
clusters_with: bone-totem-small, torch-totem, skull-small, animal-skull, bone-marker
notes: Wooden stake impaling a skull — crude warning marker. Skull faces south (snout points at approaching intruder).
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.18 z 0-1.5

# Dried blood stain at base of stake (ground pooling)
ellipse 0.50,0.88 0.18,0.06 fill #3a1008 0.7
ellipse 0.50,0.88 0.18,0.06 stroke #1a0404 0.6
# Splatter dots around base
circle 0.32,0.84 0.022 fill #3a1008 0.8
circle 0.68,0.90 0.020 fill #3a1008 0.8
circle 0.40,0.94 0.018 fill #3a1008 0.75

# Stake extending slightly below skull (visible rim at bottom of footprint)
rect 0.46,0.76 0.08,0.14 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.46,0.76 0.08,0.14 stroke #1a0a00
# Stake grain
line 0.50,0.76 0.50,0.90 stroke #2a1400 0.6 width 1

# Stake cross-section under the skull (top of stake visible where skull sits)
circle 0.50,0.58 0.08 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.92
circle 0.50,0.58 0.08 stroke #1a0a00
circle 0.50,0.58 0.04 fill #1a0a00 0.8

# Cranium (rounded dome — back of skull to the north)
ellipse 0.50,0.40 0.24,0.22 fill #e8dcc8 0.95
ellipse 0.50,0.40 0.24,0.22 stroke #4a3828
# Aged bone wash (subtle yellowing)
ellipse 0.50,0.40 0.24,0.22 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.22

# Cranial suture (zig-zag across top of skull)
line 0.40,0.30 0.45,0.34 stroke #4a3828 0.7 width 1
line 0.45,0.34 0.50,0.30 stroke #4a3828 0.7 width 1
line 0.50,0.30 0.55,0.34 stroke #4a3828 0.7 width 1
line 0.55,0.34 0.60,0.30 stroke #4a3828 0.7 width 1

# Hairline crack down the side of the cranium
bezier 0.34,0.40 0.36,0.46 0.32,0.52 0.30,0.58 stroke #3a2820 0.7 width 1
# Second crack
line 0.62,0.28 0.66,0.38 stroke #3a2820 0.6 width 1

# Eye sockets (deep, very dark hollows)
ellipse 0.40,0.44 0.06,0.075 fill #0a0604 0.98
ellipse 0.40,0.44 0.06,0.075 stroke #2a1810
ellipse 0.60,0.44 0.06,0.075 fill #0a0604 0.98
ellipse 0.60,0.44 0.06,0.075 stroke #2a1810
# Eye-socket rim shadow
arc 0.40,0.44 0.06 200 340 stroke #4a3828 0.6 width 1
arc 0.60,0.44 0.06 200 340 stroke #4a3828 0.6 width 1

# Snout/muzzle projecting south (pointed, narrower than cranium)
poly 0.40,0.56 0.60,0.56 0.58,0.66 0.50,0.72 0.42,0.66 fill #e8dcc8 0.95
poly 0.40,0.56 0.60,0.56 0.58,0.66 0.50,0.72 0.42,0.66 stroke #4a3828
# Snout central seam
line 0.50,0.56 0.50,0.70 stroke #4a3828 0.6 width 1
# Nasal cavity (dark triangular opening at snout tip)
poly 0.48,0.60 0.52,0.60 0.50,0.68 fill #0a0604 0.95
poly 0.48,0.60 0.52,0.60 0.50,0.68 stroke #2a1810
# Teeth ridge along lower snout
line 0.44,0.70 0.46,0.72 stroke #4a3828 width 1
line 0.48,0.71 0.50,0.73 stroke #4a3828 width 1
line 0.52,0.71 0.54,0.73 stroke #4a3828 width 1

# Highlight on crown of skull (soft pale glint)
ellipse 0.48,0.34 0.06,0.03 fill #f4e8d4 0.45

props.soul-crucible:

---

# Outer rusted iron bowl

poly 0.50,0.06 0.46,0.18 0.54,0.18 stroke #050505
poly 0.79,0.14 0.72,0.22 0.80,0.26 fill #1a1010 0.95
poly 0.79,0.14 0.72,0.22 0.80,0.26 stroke #050505
poly 0.94,0.50 0.82,0.46 0.82,0.54 fill #1a1010 0.95
poly 0.94,0.50 0.82,0.46 0.82,0.54 stroke #050505
poly 0.79,0.86 0.80,0.74 0.72,0.78 fill #1a1010 0.95
poly 0.79,0.86 0.80,0.74 0.72,0.78 stroke #050505
poly 0.50,0.94 0.46,0.82 0.54,0.82 fill #1a1010 0.95
poly 0.50,0.94 0.46,0.82 0.54,0.82 stroke #050505
poly 0.21,0.86 0.28,0.78 0.20,0.74 fill #1a1010 0.95
poly 0.21,0.86 0.28,0.78 0.20,0.74 stroke #050505
poly 0.06,0.50 0.18,0.46 0.18,0.54 fill #1a1010 0.95
poly 0.06,0.50 0.18,0.46 0.18,0.54 stroke #050505
poly 0.21,0.14 0.28,0.22 0.20,0.26 fill #1a1010 0.95
poly 0.21,0.14 0.28,0.22 0.20,0.26 stroke #050505

# Inner rim (darker interior lip)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.34 fill #0a0604 0.9
circle 0.50,0.50 0.34 stroke #050505

# Soul-flame layers — outermost purple
circle 0.50,0.50 0.30 fill #5a2a8a 0.7
circle 0.50,0.50 0.26 fill #7a40a0 0.75
circle 0.50,0.50 0.20 fill #a060c0 0.8
circle 0.50,0.50 0.14 fill #c880e0 0.85
circle 0.50,0.50 0.08 fill #e8d0f8 0.9

# Green sickly wisps threading through the purple
bezier 0.28,0.45 0.35,0.30 0.55,0.30 0.60,0.50 stroke #5aa060 0.65 width 2
bezier 0.70,0.48 0.65,0.64 0.45,0.70 0.38,0.56 stroke #5aa060 0.6 width 2

# Tormented face hint — eye hollows and open-mouth shadow
ellipse 0.44,0.46 0.022,0.028 fill #1a0a2a 0.85
ellipse 0.56,0.46 0.022,0.028 fill #1a0a2a 0.85

bezier 0.50,0.26 0.50,0.12 0.48,0.06 0.52,-0.02 stroke #c880e0 0.6 width 2
bezier 0.60,0.30 0.68,0.18 0.72,0.08 0.78,0.00 stroke #a060c0 0.55 width 2

# Iron bowl band detail (outer ring stroke for depth)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.36 stroke #2a2020 0.8 width 1

footprint: 1x1

notes: Heavy stone bollard with a silver cleat — top-down view of the square plinth, round bollard, and rope coil looped around it
---
# Hitbox — bollard blocks light
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.32 z 0-1.0
# Square stone plinth (broader anchoring slab the bollard sits on)

rect 0.30,0.46 0.40,0.08 stroke #555555 width 1

circle 0.70,0.50 0.07 stroke #555555
# Cleat center rivet

circle 0.50,0.50 0.04 stroke #555555
# Rope tail trailing off south (out of the coil, toward a ship)

bezier 0.62,0.68 0.72,0.80 0.80,0.90 0.88,0.96 stroke #e0e0ff width 1

props.spinning-wheel:
name: Spinning Wheel
category: Furniture
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2
placement: floor
room_types: cabin-witch, farmhouse-common, general-workshop, house-medium-family, noble-solar, textile-loomhouse
typical_count: single
clusters_with: yarn-basket, rocking-chair, sewing-basket, thread-spool
notes: Classic wooden spinning wheel viewed top-down — drive wheel on east, spindle on west, treadle along south
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.15,0.40 1.90,1.20 z 0-2

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: long base plank east-west. Drive wheel is VERTICAL so from above
# appears as a thin edge-on disc. Spindle/bobbin at opposite end.

# === Base plank (the long board the wheel is mounted on) ===
rect 0.20,0.88 1.60,0.22 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.88
rect 0.20,0.88 1.60,0.22 stroke #2a1400
# Wood grain
line 0.20,0.96 1.80,0.96 stroke #5c3a1e 0.4
line 0.20,1.04 1.80,1.04 stroke #5c3a1e 0.4

# === Treadle (foot pedal hanging south of base) ===
rect 0.36,1.12 1.00,0.30 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.85
rect 0.36,1.12 1.00,0.30 stroke #2a1400
# Treadle grain
line 0.36,1.24 1.36,1.24 stroke #3a1f00 0.4
line 0.36,1.34 1.36,1.34 stroke #3a1f00 0.4
# Treadle pivot rod (south edge hinge)
line 0.36,1.42 1.36,1.42 stroke #444444 width 2
# Pitman rod (linking treadle to wheel crank)
line 1.30,1.14 1.54,0.60 stroke #3a2010 width 2
line 1.30,1.14 1.54,0.60 stroke #5c3a1e 0.6 width 1

# === Drive wheel (EAST end, vertical orientation — seen edge-on from above) ===
# Shadow of wheel on base
ellipse 1.60,0.98 0.34,0.05 fill #000000 0.25
# Wheel rim (thin horizontal ellipse — long in x = diameter, narrow in y = thickness)
ellipse 1.60,0.58 0.38,0.04 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
ellipse 1.60,0.58 0.38,0.04 stroke #2a1400
# Wheel rim subtle inner ring (outer band of rim)
ellipse 1.60,0.58 0.35,0.025 stroke #3a1f00 0.7
# Wheel top highlight (polish/wear)
line 1.30,0.57 1.90,0.57 stroke #8b6914 0.4 width 1
# Hub (seen dead-center — small dark circle, axle end)
circle 1.60,0.58 0.04 fill #3a1f00 0.95
circle 1.60,0.58 0.04 stroke #1a0f00
# Spoke stubs peeking near rim ends (just the tops visible)
line 1.24,0.58 1.22,0.62 stroke #2a1400 width 2
line 1.96,0.58 1.98,0.62 stroke #2a1400 width 2

# === Upright posts holding wheel axle (two small posts flanking wheel) ===
rect 1.16,0.54 0.10,0.38 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 1.16,0.54 0.10,0.38 stroke #2a1400
rect 1.90,0.54 0.10,0.38 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 1.90,0.54 0.10,0.38 stroke #2a1400
# Post caps
ellipse 1.21,0.54 0.05,0.02 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
ellipse 1.95,0.54 0.05,0.02 fill #5c3a1e 0.9

# === Spindle assembly (WEST end — mother-of-all with bobbin) ===
# Mother-of-all base (small wooden block mounted on the plank)
rect 0.18,0.74 0.34,0.20 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.18,0.74 0.34,0.20 stroke #2a1400
# Maiden posts (two tiny uprights)
rect 0.22,0.58 0.05,0.20 fill #3a1f00 0.9
rect 0.46,0.58 0.05,0.20 fill #3a1f00 0.9
# Post tops
circle 0.245,0.58 0.025 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
circle 0.485,0.58 0.025 fill #5c3a1e 0.9
# Bobbin (horizontal between the maidens — ellipse running east-west)
ellipse 0.36,0.68 0.14,0.05 fill #daa858 0.92
ellipse 0.36,0.68 0.14,0.05 stroke #6a4810
# Bobbin thread wraps (horizontal bands)
line 0.24,0.66 0.48,0.66 stroke #6a4810 0.6
line 0.24,0.68 0.48,0.68 stroke #6a4810 0.6
line 0.24,0.70 0.48,0.70 stroke #6a4810 0.6
# Flyer arms (U-shape around bobbin, just the top visible — two small arcs)
bezier 0.24,0.62 0.20,0.64 0.20,0.72 0.24,0.74 stroke #3a1f00 width 1
bezier 0.48,0.62 0.52,0.64 0.52,0.72 0.48,0.74 stroke #3a1f00 width 1

# === Drive band (thin cord linking wheel to bobbin across plank) ===
bezier 0.48,0.66 0.90,0.62 1.30,0.60 1.26,0.58 stroke #6b4e2e 0.85 width 1
bezier 0.48,0.72 0.90,0.68 1.30,0.64 1.26,0.60 stroke #6b4e2e 0.7 width 1

# === Wool fiber tuft staged by spindle ===
ellipse 0.32,0.40 0.10,0.06 fill #e8e0d0 0.9
ellipse 0.32,0.40 0.10,0.06 stroke #8b7355
circle 0.28,0.38 0.02 fill #f0e8d8 0.7
circle 0.36,0.42 0.02 fill #f0e8d8 0.7
# Fiber wisp drifting to bobbin
bezier 0.32,0.44 0.34,0.52 0.38,0.60 0.36,0.66 stroke #e8e0d0 0.6 width 1

props.stage-performance:
name: Performance Stage
category: Structure
footprint: 3x3
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 0.8
placement: wall
room_types: fairground-seasonal, festival-grounds, village-green, tavern, throne-room

---
# footprint 3x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-3
# Top-down: stage platform occupies most footprint; backdrop curtain at north (wall side)

# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.15,0.10 2.70,2.70 z 0-0.8

# === Stage platform (raised wooden boards) ===
rect 0.15,0.10 2.70,2.70 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.9
rect 0.15,0.10 2.70,2.70 stroke #2a1400 width 2

# Plank seam lines (running east-west)

line 0.15,1.20 2.85,1.20 stroke #3a1f00 width 1
line 0.15,1.55 2.85,1.55 stroke #3a1f00 width 1
line 0.15,1.90 2.85,1.90 stroke #3a1f00 width 1
line 0.15,2.25 2.85,2.25 stroke #3a1f00 width 1
line 0.15,2.60 2.85,2.60 stroke #3a1f00 width 1

# Plank end-caps (shaded perimeter)
rect 0.15,0.10 2.70,0.08 fill #2a1400 0.35
rect 0.15,2.72 2.70,0.08 fill #2a1400 0.35

# === Curtain backdrop (north wall, draped) ===
# Curtain rod
rect 0.25,0.10 2.50,0.06 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 0.25,0.10 2.50,0.06 stroke #1a0a04
# Rod finials
circle 0.25,0.13 0.06 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 0.25,0.13 0.06 stroke #5a3a00
circle 2.75,0.13 0.06 fill #daa520 0.9
circle 2.75,0.13 0.06 stroke #5a3a00

# Curtain top (rich red velvet, visible as band with folds)
rect 0.30,0.16 2.40,0.26 fill #8b2020 0.9
rect 0.30,0.16 2.40,0.26 texfill polyhaven/velour_velvet 0.5
rect 0.30,0.16 2.40,0.26 stroke #3a0404

# Curtain vertical folds (pleats)
line 0.50,0.16 0.50,0.42 stroke #3a0404 width 2
line 0.80,0.16 0.80,0.42 stroke #3a0404 width 2
line 1.10,0.16 1.10,0.42 stroke #3a0404 width 2
line 1.40,0.16 1.40,0.42 stroke #3a0404 width 2
line 1.70,0.16 1.70,0.42 stroke #3a0404 width 2
line 2.00,0.16 2.00,0.42 stroke #3a0404 width 2
line 2.30,0.16 2.30,0.42 stroke #3a0404 width 2
line 2.50,0.16 2.50,0.42 stroke #3a0404 width 2

# Gold trim at curtain bottom
rect 0.30,0.40 2.40,0.04 fill #daa520 0.9
rect 0.30,0.40 2.40,0.04 stroke #5a3a00

# === Sun motif painted on curtain (center, radiating gold) ===
# Sun disc
circle 1.50,0.30 0.10 fill #daa520 0.95
circle 1.50,0.30 0.10 stroke #5a3a00
# Sun face details
circle 1.46,0.28 0.012 fill #1a1408
circle 1.54,0.28 0.012 fill #1a1408
arc 1.50,0.32 0.03 0 180 stroke #1a1408 width 1
# Sun rays
line 1.50,0.16 1.50,0.20 stroke #daa520 width 3
line 1.50,0.40 1.50,0.44 stroke #daa520 width 3
line 1.36,0.30 1.40,0.30 stroke #daa520 width 3
line 1.60,0.30 1.64,0.30 stroke #daa520 width 3
line 1.40,0.20 1.44,0.24 stroke #daa520 width 2
line 1.60,0.20 1.56,0.24 stroke #daa520 width 2
line 1.40,0.40 1.44,0.36 stroke #daa520 width 2
line 1.60,0.40 1.56,0.36 stroke #daa520 width 2

# === Ornamental poles flanking stage front ===
# Left pole (SW corner of stage)
circle 0.35,2.60 0.10 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
circle 0.35,2.60 0.10 stroke #1a0a04
# Pole cap (gold ball)
circle 0.35,2.60 0.05 fill #daa520 0.95
circle 0.35,2.60 0.05 stroke #5a3a00
# Ribbon trailing from pole
bezier 0.35,2.60 0.28,2.68 0.22,2.76 0.12,2.80 stroke #c82020 width 3

# Right pole (SE corner)
circle 2.65,2.60 0.10 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
circle 2.65,2.60 0.10 stroke #1a0a04
circle 2.65,2.60 0.05 fill #daa520 0.95
circle 2.65,2.60 0.05 stroke #5a3a00
bezier 2.65,2.60 2.72,2.68 2.78,2.76 2.88,2.80 stroke #c82020 width 3

# === Small stage steps visible at front-center (south) ===
rect 1.20,2.72 0.60,0.14 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.9
rect 1.20,2.72 0.60,0.14 stroke #1a0a04
line 1.20,2.79 1.80,2.79 stroke #1a0a04 width 1

# Painted decorative trim around stage edge
line 0.18,0.52 2.82,0.52 stroke #daa520 0.7 width 2
line 0.18,2.58 2.82,2.58 stroke #daa520 0.7 width 2

props.stalactite-hanging:
name: Hanging Stalactite
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 2.5
placement: any
room_types: cave-living, cave-bear-lair, crystal-grotto, mushroom-cavern
typical_count: few
clusters_with: stalagmite, crystal-shard, mineral-vein, drip-stain
notes: Top-down view of a stalactite hanging from cave ceiling — concentric rings showing the cone tapering down to a point
---
# Outermost ring — base of the stalactite where it meets ceiling (widest)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.36 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.8
circle 0.5,0.5 0.36 stroke #2a2420 width 2
# First taper ring
circle 0.5,0.5 0.28 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.75
circle 0.5,0.5 0.28 stroke #3a3430 width 1
# Second taper ring (shows the cone getting narrower as it descends)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.20 fill #5a5048 0.85
circle 0.5,0.5 0.20 stroke #3a3430 width 1
# Third taper ring
circle 0.5,0.5 0.13 fill #6a6058 0.85
circle 0.5,0.5 0.13 stroke #4a4440 width 1
# Near-tip ring
circle 0.5,0.5 0.07 fill #7a7068 0.9
circle 0.5,0.5 0.07 stroke #5a5048 width 1
# Tip highlight (slight offset suggests natural asymmetry)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.032 fill #9a8e84 0.9
circle 0.50,0.50 0.032 stroke #5a5048
# Radial striations suggesting flowstone texture running down the cone
line 0.5,0.14 0.5,0.36 stroke #2a2420 0.4 width 1
line 0.5,0.64 0.5,0.86 stroke #2a2420 0.4 width 1
line 0.14,0.5 0.36,0.5 stroke #2a2420 0.4 width 1
line 0.64,0.5 0.86,0.5 stroke #2a2420 0.4 width 1
line 0.24,0.24 0.38,0.38 stroke #2a2420 0.35 width 1
line 0.62,0.62 0.76,0.76 stroke #2a2420 0.35 width 1
# Small water drip forming at tip (wet highlight bead)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.015 fill #b0c0c8 0.85
circle 0.50,0.50 0.015 stroke #6a8088 0.7
# Tiny glint on drip
circle 0.495,0.495 0.006 fill #ffffff 0.9

props.standing-stone:
name: Standing Stone
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 4
placement: floor
room_types: burial-mound, druid-grove, standing-stones-circle, wilderness, moor
typical_count: few
clusters_with: standing-stone, cairn-sacred, carved-rune-stone, bone-marker, standing-stone-fallen
notes: Single upright menhir, rougher and more organic than an obelisk
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox ellipse 0.5,0.5 0.26,0.34 z 0-4

# Shadow pool cast by tall stone
ellipse 0.5,0.82 0.30,0.08 fill #1a1008 0.5
# Stone body (tall menhir — top-down shows elongated irregular shape)
poly 0.30,0.20 0.38,0.14 0.56,0.12 0.68,0.18 0.74,0.30 0.76,0.50 0.72,0.68 0.64,0.78 0.46,0.80 0.32,0.72 0.26,0.56 0.24,0.38 fill #5a5048 0.95

poly 0.30,0.20 0.38,0.14 0.56,0.12 0.68,0.18 0.74,0.30 0.76,0.50 0.72,0.68 0.64,0.78 0.46,0.80 0.32,0.72 0.26,0.56 0.24,0.38 stroke #2a2420
# Weathered erosion cracks (vertical lines of age)
bezier 0.34,0.22 0.32,0.40 0.34,0.60 0.36,0.76 stroke #1a1410 0.7 width 1
bezier 0.64,0.18 0.68,0.40 0.66,0.58 0.64,0.76 stroke #1a1410 0.7 width 1
bezier 0.48,0.16 0.46,0.40 0.50,0.60 0.48,0.78 stroke #1a1410 0.6 width 1
# Ancient carved runes (primitive spirals/lines)
circle 0.42,0.40 0.04 stroke #1a0800 width 1
arc 0.42,0.40 0.03 0 270 stroke #1a0800 0.85 width 1
line 0.56,0.36 0.62,0.44 stroke #1a0800 0.85 width 1
line 0.56,0.44 0.62,0.36 stroke #1a0800 0.85 width 1
# Secondary runes
line 0.48,0.54 0.52,0.62 stroke #1a0800 0.7 width 1
line 0.40,0.62 0.46,0.62 stroke #1a0800 0.6 width 1
line 0.56,0.62 0.62,0.62 stroke #1a0800 0.6 width 1
# Ochre pigment staining (ancient ritual markings)
ellipse 0.50,0.40 0.14,0.04 fill #8a3010 0.35
# Moss covering (lichen on north/shaded side)
poly 0.24,0.48 0.28,0.42 0.32,0.50 0.28,0.58 fill #3a5028 0.75
poly 0.26,0.60 0.30,0.54 0.32,0.62 0.28,0.66 fill #3a5028 0.7
# Yellow lichen blotch
ellipse 0.68,0.56 0.05,0.04 fill #8a9020 0.6
# Light side highlight (catches sun)
arc 0.50,0.50 0.28 210 270 stroke #8a8078 0.5 width 1
# Tiny fallen chip at base
poly 0.22,0.80 0.26,0.78 0.28,0.82 0.24,0.84 fill #6a6058 0.85
poly 0.22,0.80 0.26,0.78 0.28,0.82 0.24,0.84 stroke #2a2420
# Small cluster of grass at base
line 0.18,0.82 0.20,0.76 stroke #4a6028 0.7
line 0.22,0.84 0.24,0.78 stroke #4a6028 0.7
line 0.78,0.80 0.80,0.74 stroke #4a6028 0.7
props.standing-stone-fallen:
name: Fallen Standing Stone
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x3
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 0.8
placement: floor
room_types: burial-mound, standing-stones-circle, ancient-ruin-overgrown
typical_count: single

notes: Toppled menhir lying on its side — ancient fallen marker
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.20,0.22 2.60,0.56 z 0-0.8

# Main stone body (elongated horizontal, irregular menhir shape)
poly 0.24,0.32 0.48,0.24 0.90,0.22 1.50,0.20 2.10,0.24 2.60,0.28 2.80,0.38 2.82,0.58 2.74,0.68 2.20,0.74 1.60,0.78 1.00,0.76 0.50,0.72 0.24,0.62 0.18,0.46 fill #6a6058 0.95
poly 0.24,0.32 0.48,0.24 0.90,0.22 1.50,0.20 2.10,0.24 2.60,0.28 2.80,0.38 2.82,0.58 2.74,0.68 2.20,0.74 1.60,0.78 1.00,0.76 0.50,0.72 0.24,0.62 0.18,0.46 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.65
poly 0.24,0.32 0.48,0.24 0.90,0.22 1.50,0.20 2.10,0.24 2.60,0.28 2.80,0.38 2.82,0.58 2.74,0.68 2.20,0.74 1.60,0.78 1.00,0.76 0.50,0.72 0.24,0.62 0.18,0.46 stroke #2a2420
# Broken base end (west — where stone snapped from pedestal)
poly 0.24,0.32 0.14,0.36 0.10,0.48 0.12,0.58 0.18,0.64 0.24,0.62 fill #5a5048 0.95
poly 0.24,0.32 0.14,0.36 0.10,0.48 0.12,0.58 0.18,0.64 0.24,0.62 stroke #2a2420
# Jagged break detail
line 0.24,0.34 0.16,0.40 stroke #2a2420 0.8 width 1
line 0.20,0.44 0.12,0.48 stroke #2a2420 0.8 width 1
line 0.18,0.54 0.12,0.56 stroke #2a2420 0.8 width 1
# Weathering cracks (longitudinal)
bezier 0.40,0.34 0.80,0.38 1.40,0.34 2.00,0.40 stroke #2a2420 0.7 width 1
bezier 0.50,0.62 0.90,0.58 1.50,0.64 2.10,0.60 stroke #2a2420 0.7 width 1
# Cross cracks (age)
line 0.80,0.26 0.86,0.74 stroke #2a2420 0.5
line 1.60,0.28 1.66,0.76 stroke #2a2420 0.5
line 2.20,0.26 2.26,0.74 stroke #2a2420 0.5
# === Worn carved runes (faded with time) ===
line 0.60,0.40 0.60,0.52 stroke #1a0800 0.85 width 1
line 0.56,0.46 0.64,0.46 stroke #1a0800 0.85 width 1
circle 1.00,0.48 0.04 stroke #1a0800 0.8 width 1
line 1.30,0.40 1.36,0.52 stroke #1a0800 0.75 width 1
poly 1.70,0.40 1.76,0.48 1.70,0.56 stroke #1a0800 0.75 width 1
line 2.10,0.42 2.16,0.50 stroke #1a0800 0.7 width 1
# Moss/lichen overgrowth (indicates age lying here)
ellipse 0.70,0.60 0.16,0.08 fill #3a5028 0.75
ellipse 0.70,0.60 0.16,0.08 stroke #1a3010
ellipse 1.40,0.40 0.20,0.10 fill #3a5028 0.75
ellipse 1.40,0.40 0.20,0.10 stroke #1a3010
ellipse 2.20,0.62 0.18,0.08 fill #3a5028 0.75
ellipse 2.20,0.62 0.18,0.08 stroke #1a3010
# Yellow lichen patches
ellipse 0.90,0.40 0.08,0.05 fill #8a9020 0.6
ellipse 1.90,0.58 0.10,0.06 fill #8a9020 0.6
ellipse 2.50,0.44 0.08,0.05 fill #8a9020 0.6
# Small plants sprouting in cracks
line 1.20,0.22 1.22,0.14 stroke #4a6028 0.8
line 1.22,0.24 1.26,0.16 stroke #4a6028 0.8
line 1.80,0.80 1.82,0.86 stroke #4a6028 0.8
# Grass tufts around base
line 0.30,0.78 0.32,0.72 stroke #4a6028 0.7
line 2.70,0.78 2.72,0.72 stroke #4a6028 0.7
# Dry leaves on top
poly 1.12,0.40 1.20,0.36 1.22,0.42 1.16,0.46 fill #a03020 0.7
poly 1.12,0.40 1.20,0.36 1.22,0.42 1.16,0.46 stroke #5a1808
# Pebbles around broken end
circle 0.12,0.72 0.02 fill #5a5048 0.8
circle 0.08,0.66 0.018 fill #5a5048 0.8
# East end highlight
arc 2.50,0.50 0.30 210 260 stroke #a0988c 0.4 width 1

  - type: candle
    x: 0.5
    y: 0.5
    radius: 5
    color: "#e0e0ff"
    intensity: 0.4
---

circle 0.5,0.5 0.42 gradient-radial #e0e0ff #1a0828 0.2

# Brightest core

# Scattered bright grains

circle 0.66,0.38 0.016 fill #ffffff 0.85

circle 0.42,0.72 0.016 fill #ffffff 0.8
circle 0.58,0.74 0.014 fill #e0e0ff 0.8
circle 0.22,0.6 0.014 fill #e0e0ff 0.8

circle 0.85,0.32 0.01 fill #e0e0ff 0.7
circle 0.88,0.72 0.012 fill #c0a0ff 0.65

circle 0.5,0.22 0.012 fill #ffffff 0.75
circle 0.5,0.88 0.01 fill #e0e0ff 0.7

# Streaks of drifting dust

line 0.68,0.32 0.62,0.36 stroke #e0e0ff width 1
props.statue:
name: Statue
category: Features
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
placement: floor
room_types: temple, throne-room, garden, gallery, memorial
typical_count: few
notes: Decorative sculpture; place symmetrically flanking doors, thrones, or along halls
---
# Footprint 2x2: x 0-2, y 0-2. No facing.

# === PEDESTAL — Stone base with beveled edges ===

# Outermost base slab
rect 0.18,0.18 1.64,1.64 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.7
rect 0.18,0.18 1.64,1.64 stroke #555555

# Bevel lines — base to step 1 (depth illusion)
line 0.18,0.18 0.30,0.30 stroke #666666
line 1.82,0.18 1.70,0.30 stroke #666666
line 0.18,1.82 0.30,1.70 stroke #666666
line 1.82,1.82 1.70,1.70 stroke #666666

# Step 1 — raised pedestal surface
rect 0.30,0.30 1.40,1.40 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.78
rect 0.30,0.30 1.40,1.40 stroke #666666

# Bevel lines — step 1 to top platform
line 0.30,0.30 0.40,0.40 stroke #888888
line 1.70,0.30 1.60,0.40 stroke #888888
line 0.30,1.70 0.40,1.60 stroke #888888
line 1.70,1.70 1.60,1.60 stroke #888888

# Top platform surface
rect 0.40,0.40 1.20,1.20 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.85
rect 0.40,0.40 1.20,1.20 stroke #777777

# Pedestal edge highlights (light top-left, shadow bottom-right)
line 0.30,0.30 1.70,0.30 stroke #999999 width 1.5
line 0.30,0.30 0.30,1.70 stroke #999999 width 1.5
line 0.30,1.70 1.70,1.70 stroke #444444 width 1.5
line 1.70,0.30 1.70,1.70 stroke #444444 width 1.5

# Decorative trim line around pedestal edge
rect 0.24,0.24 1.52,1.52 stroke #555555

# === SHADOW — statue shadow on pedestal (southeast cast) ===
ellipse 1.12,1.12 0.42,0.36 fill #000000 0.08
ellipse 1.10,1.10 0.36,0.30 fill #000000 0.06

# === FIGURE — Robed figure seen from above ===

# Robe draping — subtle radiating lines suggesting flowing fabric from above
# Front drape lines
line 1.00,0.62 0.94,0.50 stroke #888888 0.5
line 1.00,0.62 1.06,0.50 stroke #888888 0.5
# Back drape lines (longer, trailing robes)
line 1.00,1.18 0.88,1.42 stroke #888888 0.45
line 1.00,1.18 1.00,1.44 stroke #888888 0.45
line 1.00,1.18 1.12,1.42 stroke #888888 0.45
# Side drape — left
line 0.72,0.96 0.56,1.06 stroke #888888 0.4
line 0.72,1.00 0.54,1.14 stroke #888888 0.4
# Side drape — right
line 1.28,0.96 1.44,1.06 stroke #888888 0.4
line 1.28,1.00 1.46,1.14 stroke #888888 0.4

# Torso/shoulders — wide oval (marble texture, seen from above)
ellipse 1.00,0.98 0.30,0.22 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.85
ellipse 1.00,0.98 0.30,0.22 stroke #666666

# Shoulder highlight (light catches the top)
ellipse 1.00,0.94 0.24,0.10 fill #ffffff 0.08

# Left arm — extends from torso, resting at side
rect 0.62,0.88 0.12,0.32 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.8
rect 0.62,0.88 0.12,0.32 stroke #777777
# Left hand
ellipse 0.68,1.20 0.06,0.05 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.85
ellipse 0.68,1.20 0.06,0.05 stroke #777777

# Right arm — raised, holding a staff
rect 1.26,0.78 0.12,0.28 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.8
rect 1.26,0.78 0.12,0.28 stroke #777777
# Right hand (gripping staff)
ellipse 1.32,0.76 0.06,0.05 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.85
ellipse 1.32,0.76 0.06,0.05 stroke #777777

# === HELD OBJECT — Staff (thin line with orb on top) ===
line 1.32,0.76 1.32,0.48 stroke #666666 width 2
# Staff orb
circle 1.32,0.46 0.05 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.9
circle 1.32,0.46 0.05 stroke #666666
# Orb gleam highlight
circle 1.31,0.45 0.02 fill #ffffff 0.25

# === HEAD — circle above the torso ===
circle 1.00,0.78 0.13 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.9
circle 1.00,0.78 0.13 stroke #666666
# Face shadow (subtle depth)
ellipse 1.00,0.80 0.08,0.06 fill #000000 0.06
# Hair/crown detail — small arc lines on top of head
line 0.92,0.70 0.96,0.66 stroke #888888 0.5
line 0.96,0.66 1.04,0.66 stroke #888888 0.5
line 1.04,0.66 1.08,0.70 stroke #888888 0.5

# === HITBOX ZONES — z-height shadow projection ===
# Pedestal base (wide stepped stone, 0-3ft)
hitbox rect 0.18,0.18 1.64,1.64 z 0-3
# Figure body — polygon tracing torso, arms, and robe (3-5ft)
#   left arm top → left shoulder → right shoulder → right arm top →
#   right arm bottom → right hip → left hip → left hand bottom
hitbox poly 0.62,0.88 0.70,0.76 1.30,0.76 1.38,0.78 1.38,1.06 1.30,1.20 0.70,1.20 0.62,1.25 z 3-5
# Head (5-6ft)
hitbox circle 1.00,0.78 0.13 z 5-6
props.statue-classical:
name: Classical Statue
category: Features
footprint: 1x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2.5
placement: corner
room_types: mansion-ballroom, mansion-grand-hall, noble-estate, temple-nave
typical_count: few
clusters_with: statue, pillar, pedestal-stone, potted-palm
notes: Pale marble figure on a round plinth. From above only the head, shoulders, and suggestion of drapery are visible. Place as a flanking pair or at the end of a sight line.
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1

# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.36 z 0-0.8
hitbox circle 0.5,0.55 0.20 z 0.8-2.0
hitbox circle 0.5,0.42 0.10 z 2.0-2.5

# === Plinth base (round marble) ===
circle 0.5,0.55 0.36 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.75
circle 0.5,0.55 0.36 stroke #666666 width 2
# Plinth top ring (stepped)
circle 0.5,0.55 0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.85
circle 0.5,0.55 0.30 stroke #777777
# Plinth edge highlight
arc 0.5,0.55 0.36 180 360 stroke #aaaaaa 0.5 width 1
arc 0.5,0.55 0.36 0 180 stroke #444444 0.6 width 1

# === Drapery (curving lines radiating from shoulders around figure) ===
bezier 0.32,0.50 0.30,0.60 0.36,0.70 0.40,0.76 stroke #888888 width 2
bezier 0.68,0.50 0.70,0.60 0.64,0.70 0.60,0.76 stroke #888888 width 2
bezier 0.38,0.46 0.34,0.55 0.34,0.64 0.38,0.72 stroke #999999 0.7
bezier 0.62,0.46 0.66,0.55 0.66,0.64 0.62,0.72 stroke #999999 0.7
# Front drape fold

props.statue-deity:

height: 3.0

---
# footprint 2x2: x 0-2, y 0-2

# === HITBOX — layered z-column ===

line 0.26,1.74 1.74,1.74 stroke #444444 width 1

# === Outspread arms (wide robed span) ===
# Left arm extending west

rect 0.38,0.94 0.40,0.16 stroke #666666 width 1

ellipse 0.38,1.02 0.07,0.08 stroke #666666
# Right arm extending east

rect 1.22,0.94 0.40,0.16 stroke #666666 width 1
# Right hand (open palm)
ellipse 1.62,1.02 0.07,0.08 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.9
ellipse 1.62,1.02 0.07,0.08 stroke #666666

# === Robed torso (wide oval) ===
ellipse 1.0,1.10 0.34,0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.9
ellipse 1.0,1.10 0.34,0.30 stroke #666666 width 2

# Shoulder highlight

line 1.0,1.28 1.06,1.62 stroke #888888 0.6 width 1

bezier 1.32,1.10 1.42,1.30 1.38,1.50 1.26,1.62 stroke #888888 0.55 width 1

# Front sash/belt detail

# === Head (slightly north of shoulders) ===

circle 1.0,0.78 0.14 stroke #666666 width 2

# Face shadow
ellipse 1.0,0.80 0.08,0.05 fill #000000 0.08

# Hair / head top

props.statue-devil:
name: Statue (Devil)
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
placement: center
room_types: infernal-court, temple, fiend-lair, throne-room, hell-gate
typical_count: few
clusters_with: brazier, banner-infernal, pillar, soul-coin-pile
notes: Stone statue of a horned infernal figure with folded wings; top-down shows broad shoulder/wing silhouette with head disc at apex
---
# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: statue from directly above — broad shoulders + folded wings as silhouette,
# head disc at the apex (north). NOT a side profile.

# === Base pedestal ===
rect 0.20,0.25 1.60,1.55 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.65
rect 0.20,0.25 1.60,1.55 stroke #444444

# Pedestal edge highlights
line 0.20,0.25 1.80,0.25 stroke #555555 width 1
line 0.20,0.25 0.20,1.80 stroke #555555 width 1

# === Wing + shoulder silhouette (broad shape seen from above) ===
# Main body mass — torso and folded wings as one large shape
poly 0.70,0.40 1.30,0.40 1.65,0.65 1.80,1.10 1.75,1.60 1.55,1.75 0.45,1.75 0.25,1.60 0.20,1.10 0.35,0.65 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.75
poly 0.70,0.40 1.30,0.40 1.65,0.65 1.80,1.10 1.75,1.60 1.55,1.75 0.45,1.75 0.25,1.60 0.20,1.10 0.35,0.65 stroke #333333

# === Wing fold lines (sculpted detail on top surface) ===
# Left wing fold
qbezier 0.35,0.68 0.32,1.10 0.45,1.65 stroke #444444 0.5 width 2
qbezier 0.42,0.75 0.40,1.15 0.50,1.55 stroke #555555 0.35 width 1
# Right wing fold
qbezier 1.65,0.68 1.68,1.10 1.55,1.65 stroke #444444 0.5 width 2
qbezier 1.58,0.75 1.60,1.15 1.50,1.55 stroke #555555 0.35 width 1

# === Shoulder ridge ===
qbezier 0.40,0.60 1.00,0.50 1.60,0.60 stroke #555555 0.4 width 2

# === Head disc at the apex (looking straight down on the top of the head) ===
circle 1.00,0.50 0.18 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.8
circle 1.00,0.50 0.18 stroke #333333

# === Horn stubs (projecting outward from head, foreshortened from above) ===
# Left horn — short wedge
poly 0.78,0.42 0.72,0.32 0.76,0.30 0.84,0.40 fill #444444 0.8
poly 0.78,0.42 0.72,0.32 0.76,0.30 0.84,0.40 stroke #333333
# Right horn — short wedge
poly 1.22,0.42 1.28,0.32 1.24,0.30 1.16,0.40 fill #444444 0.8
poly 1.22,0.42 1.28,0.32 1.24,0.30 1.16,0.40 stroke #333333

# === Subtle face features (carved into top of head, barely visible from above) ===
circle 0.96,0.48 0.02 fill #222222 0.4
circle 1.04,0.48 0.02 fill #222222 0.4

# === Weathering/erosion details ===
line 0.55,1.20 0.62,1.28 stroke #222222 0.25 width 1
line 1.40,0.90 1.48,0.98 stroke #222222 0.25 width 1
line 0.80,1.50 0.88,1.55 stroke #222222 0.2 width 1

line 0.42,0.32 0.42,0.28 stroke #2a6a20 width 2
line 0.50,0.28 0.50,0.26 stroke #2a6a20 width 2
line 0.58,0.32 0.58,0.28 stroke #2a6a20 width 2
line 0.63,0.38 0.65,0.34 stroke #2a6a20 width 2

line 0.50,0.42 0.50,0.46 stroke #888888 0.6

# Head highlight
circle 0.46,0.38 0.03 fill #ffffff 0.3

line 0.45,0.92 0.22,0.90 stroke #cccccc 0.35
line 0.42,1.00 0.28,1.02 stroke #cccccc 0.3

# Right wing

poly 1.30,0.88 1.45,0.80 1.70,0.65 1.85,0.58 1.90,0.70 1.82,0.88 1.70,1.05 1.50,1.15 1.30,1.10 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.4
poly 1.30,0.88 1.45,0.80 1.70,0.65 1.85,0.58 1.90,0.70 1.82,0.88 1.70,1.05 1.50,1.15 1.30,1.10 stroke #aaaaaa
# Wing feather lines

line 1.55,0.92 1.78,0.90 stroke #cccccc 0.35
line 1.58,1.00 1.72,1.02 stroke #cccccc 0.3

# === Torso/shoulders ===

ellipse 1.0,0.95 0.28,0.20 stroke #aaaaaa

# === Head ===

circle 1.0,0.72 0.10 stroke #aaaaaa

line 1.0,1.15 1.10,1.40 stroke #bbbbbb 0.35

props.stave-horse:
name: Stave Horse
category: Workshop
footprint: 2x1
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: cooperage, carpenter, workshop
typical_count: single
clusters_with: adze, cooper-mallet, stave-pile, iron-hoop
notes: Cooper's workhorse bench with foot-lever hold-down at south end and shaving clamp at north; for shaping barrel staves. Front (south) faces the cooper.
---
# footprint 2x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-2
# Top-down: long plank + foot-lever bump at south (high Y) + shaving clamp at north (low Y)

# Four legs (visible as small dark squares at corners)
circle 0.22,0.20 0.05 fill #3a1f00 0.45
circle 0.78,0.20 0.05 fill #3a1f00 0.45
circle 0.22,1.80 0.05 fill #3a1f00 0.45
circle 0.78,1.80 0.05 fill #3a1f00 0.45

# Main bench plank (long narrow board running north-south)
rect 0.25,0.14 0.50,1.72 texfill polyhaven/wood_table 0.85
rect 0.25,0.14 0.50,1.72 stroke #3a1f00

# Plank grain lines (running along the length)
line 0.38,0.18 0.38,1.82 stroke #5c3a1e 0.2
line 0.50,0.16 0.50,1.84 stroke #5c3a1e 0.2
line 0.62,0.18 0.62,1.82 stroke #5c3a1e 0.2

# Shaving clamp at north end (two small jaw blocks)
rect 0.30,0.16 0.16,0.14 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.8
rect 0.30,0.16 0.16,0.14 stroke #2a1400
rect 0.54,0.16 0.16,0.14 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.8
rect 0.54,0.16 0.16,0.14 stroke #2a1400
# Clamp bolt/pin
circle 0.50,0.22 0.025 fill #666666 0.8
circle 0.50,0.22 0.025 stroke #444444
# Jaw opening (dark gap between blocks)
rect 0.46,0.16 0.08,0.12 fill #1a1208 0.4

# Cross-brace support (mid bench)
rect 0.20,0.90 0.60,0.08 fill #5c3a1e 0.5
rect 0.20,0.90 0.60,0.08 stroke #3a1f00 0.5

# Foot-lever mechanism at south end
# Lever pivot bar (runs east-west under south end)
rect 0.18,1.68 0.64,0.06 fill #555555 0.6
rect 0.18,1.68 0.64,0.06 stroke #333333
# Foot pedal (small rectangle extending south from bench)
rect 0.36,1.76 0.28,0.18 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.75
rect 0.36,1.76 0.28,0.18 stroke #2a1400
# Pivot pin
circle 0.50,1.70 0.025 fill #666666 0.7
circle 0.50,1.70 0.025 stroke #444444

# Hold-down arm (connects foot lever to clamp — thin iron rod along bench)
line 0.50,0.30 0.50,1.68 stroke #555555 0.3 width 1

# Wood shavings on the bench surface
line 0.35,0.50 0.45,0.55 stroke #c8b898 0.3
line 0.55,0.65 0.65,0.60 stroke #c8b898 0.25
line 0.40,1.10 0.52,1.08 stroke #c8b898 0.25
props.stave-pile:
name: Stave Pile
category: Workshop
footprint: 1x2
facing: no

placement: floor

typical_count: few

notes: Neat stack of long curved barrel staves arranged flat; raw material for cooperage
---
# footprint 1x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-1
# Top-down: elongated cluster of parallel thin curved-plank shapes (stave cross-sections)

# Bottom layer staves (slightly wider spacing)
# Stave 1

poly 0.08,0.42 0.10,0.38 1.90,0.34 1.92,0.38 1.90,0.42 0.10,0.46 stroke #3a1f00 0.5
# Stave 3
poly 0.10,0.56 0.12,0.52 1.88,0.48 1.90,0.52 1.88,0.56 0.12,0.60 fill #8b6914 0.6
poly 0.10,0.56 0.12,0.52 1.88,0.48 1.90,0.52 1.88,0.56 0.12,0.60 stroke #3a1f00 0.5
# Stave 4
poly 0.08,0.70 0.10,0.66 1.90,0.62 1.92,0.66 1.90,0.70 0.10,0.74 fill #7a5a12 0.6
poly 0.08,0.70 0.10,0.66 1.90,0.62 1.92,0.66 1.90,0.70 0.10,0.74 stroke #3a1f00 0.5

# Top layer staves (overlapping, slightly offset, brighter wood)
# Stave 5
poly 0.16,0.32 0.18,0.28 1.84,0.26 1.86,0.30 1.84,0.34 0.18,0.36 texfill polyhaven/wood_table 0.7
poly 0.16,0.32 0.18,0.28 1.84,0.26 1.86,0.30 1.84,0.34 0.18,0.36 stroke #3a1f00 0.6
# Stave 6
poly 0.14,0.48 0.16,0.44 1.86,0.42 1.88,0.46 1.86,0.50 0.16,0.52 texfill polyhaven/wood_table 0.7
poly 0.14,0.48 0.16,0.44 1.86,0.42 1.88,0.46 1.86,0.50 0.16,0.52 stroke #3a1f00 0.6
# Stave 7
poly 0.16,0.62 0.18,0.58 1.84,0.56 1.86,0.60 1.84,0.64 0.18,0.66 texfill polyhaven/wood_table 0.7
poly 0.16,0.62 0.18,0.58 1.84,0.56 1.86,0.60 1.84,0.64 0.18,0.66 stroke #3a1f00 0.6

# Curved profile visible on stave edges (slight arc — staves are naturally curved)
qbezier 0.10,0.28 1.0,0.22 1.90,0.28 stroke #5c3a1e 0.2
qbezier 0.08,0.56 1.0,0.50 1.90,0.56 stroke #5c3a1e 0.2

# End-grain visible at the east ends (small lines)
line 1.88,0.22 1.88,0.26 stroke #4a2800 0.4
line 1.90,0.36 1.90,0.40 stroke #4a2800 0.4
line 1.88,0.50 1.88,0.54 stroke #4a2800 0.4
line 1.90,0.64 1.90,0.68 stroke #4a2800 0.4

# Wood shavings on the floor nearby
circle 0.50,0.85 0.02 fill #c8b898 0.3
circle 1.30,0.88 0.015 fill #c8b898 0.25
props.steam-cloud:
name: Steam Cloud
category: Effects
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.8
placement: floor
room_types: bath-house, mansion-bathroom, forge, cave-living
typical_count: few
clusters_with: smoke-cloud, dust-cloud, bath-pool, plunge-basin
notes: Billowing warm pale steam — overlay on bath pools, forges, or hot springs to suggest rising vapor. Can be stacked for denser haze.
---
# Soft overlapping ellipses — NO strokes, pure pale steam
# Outer wisps (largest, palest white-blue)
ellipse 0.6,0.7 0.55,0.40 fill #f0f4f6 0.15
ellipse 1.4,0.8 0.60,0.42 fill #f0f4f6 0.15
ellipse 0.8,1.3 0.58,0.38 fill #e0e8ec 0.20
ellipse 1.5,1.4 0.52,0.44 fill #e0e8ec 0.20
# Mid layer (cooler pale blue)
ellipse 1.0,0.9 0.50,0.36 fill #c0d0d8 0.20
ellipse 1.3,1.1 0.46,0.32 fill #c0d0d8 0.22
ellipse 0.75,1.15 0.42,0.30 fill #e0e8ec 0.25
ellipse 1.55,0.75 0.38,0.28 fill #c0d0d8 0.20
# Denser warm core
ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.40,0.28 fill #e0e8ec 0.25

---
# footprint 1x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-1

rect 0.0,0.0 3.0,0.15 stroke #3a1f00

rect 0.08,0.12 2.84,0.72 stroke #3a1f00

rect 0.16,0.18 2.68,0.58 fill #8899aa 0.3

line 0.14,0.56 2.86,0.56 stroke #3a1f00 width 2

# Vertical mullion bars (dividing into columns)

line 1.50,0.16 1.50,0.78 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 2.00,0.16 2.00,0.78 stroke #3a1f00 width 2
line 2.50,0.16 2.50,0.78 stroke #3a1f00 width 2

rect 0.54,0.20 0.42,0.16 fill #99bbdd 0.10
rect 1.04,0.20 0.42,0.16 fill #aaccee 0.12
rect 1.54,0.20 0.42,0.16 fill #99bbdd 0.10
rect 2.04,0.20 0.42,0.16 fill #aaccee 0.12
rect 2.54,0.20 0.26,0.16 fill #99bbdd 0.10

# Light spill on floor (south of window)
rect 0.30,0.80 2.40,0.14 fill #aaccee 0.06

# Window sill (bottom frame bar)
rect 0.08,0.76 2.84,0.08 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.8
rect 0.08,0.76 2.84,0.08 stroke #3a1f00

props.stone-arch-natural:

footprint: 2x2

blocks_light: no
placement: center
room_types: chasm, cave, canyon, underground-river, wilderness
typical_count: single
clusters_with: boulder, anchor-post, stalagmite
notes: Natural stone arch bridging a chasm. Top-down shows the arch's keystone top — a solid oval of stone with cracks. blocks_light:no because it's an arch over a gap.
---
# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: the arch top is a solid oval/circle of stone with cracked texture

# === Outer rim of the arch (where it meets the chasm walls) ===

ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.92,0.82 stroke #333333 0.3

ellipse 1.0,1.0 0.78,0.68 texfill polyhaven/rock_boulder_cracked 0.85

line 0.85,1.10 1.30,0.80 stroke #333333 0.40
line 1.20,1.20 1.60,1.45 stroke #333333 0.40
line 0.55,1.30 0.90,1.50 stroke #333333 0.35
line 1.10,0.55 1.50,0.70 stroke #333333 0.35

line 1.30,1.00 1.50,1.15 stroke #444444 0.30
line 0.80,1.30 1.00,1.20 stroke #444444 0.25

circle 0.52,0.82 0.04 stroke #3a3228
circle 1.55,1.28 0.035 fill #5a5248 0.55
circle 1.55,1.28 0.035 stroke #3a3228
circle 1.10,0.65 0.03 fill #4a4238 0.5
props.stone-column:
name: Column (Stone)
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 10
placement: corner
room_types: any
typical_count: few
notes: Heavier structural pillar; place at room corners or symmetrically
---
# Hitbox: shaft blocks light (not the ground-level base)
hitbox circle 1,1 0.62 z 0-10

# Large circular base (wider than the shaft)
circle 1,1 0.82 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.7
circle 1,1 0.82 stroke #666666

# Main shaft — stone_wall textured circle
circle 1,1 0.62 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85
circle 1,1 0.62 stroke #666666

# Capital (top piece) — slightly wider than shaft, granite_tile textured
ring 1,1 0.50 0.36 texfill polyhaven/granite_tile 0.80
ring 1,1 0.50 0.36 stroke #666666

# Fluting marks (12 radial lines at 30-degree intervals, from outer shaft to capital ring)
# 0°
line 1.0,0.18 1.0,0.32 stroke #666666
# 30°
line 1.31,0.24 1.25,0.36 stroke #666666
# 60°
line 1.54,0.49 1.44,0.52 stroke #666666
# 90°
line 1.62,0.82 1.50,0.82 stroke #666666
# 120° (using symmetry: mirror of 60°)
line 1.54,1.51 1.44,1.48 stroke #666666
# 150°
line 1.31,1.76 1.25,1.64 stroke #666666
# 180°
line 1.0,1.82 1.0,1.68 stroke #666666
# 210°
line 0.69,1.76 0.75,1.64 stroke #666666
# 240°
line 0.46,1.51 0.56,1.48 stroke #666666
# 270°
line 0.38,0.82 0.50,0.82 stroke #666666
# 300°
line 0.46,0.49 0.56,0.52 stroke #666666
# 330°
line 0.69,0.24 0.75,0.36 stroke #666666

# Column core (center detail)
circle 1,1 0.10 fill #888888 0.5
circle 1,1 0.10 stroke #666666

footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 3
placement: center
room_types: tenement-room, peasant-hovel, farmhouse-common, house-small, cabin-hunters
typical_count: single
clusters_with: coal-bucket, firewood-stack, kettle, pewter-mug
notes: Small pot-belly iron cooking stove — top-down shows round stove body with short stovepipe going up (visible as a smaller circle on top)
lights:
  - type: candle
    x: 0.5
    y: 0.5
    radius: 3
    color: "#ff8844"
    intensity: 0.3
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1

# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.50,0.50 0.34 z 0-3

# === Warm glow on floor around stove ===
circle 0.50,0.50 0.46 fill #ff6600 0.06

# === Stove body (cast iron, pot-belly shape — wide circle) ===
circle 0.50,0.50 0.34 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.65
circle 0.50,0.50 0.34 fill #3a3a3a 0.4
circle 0.50,0.50 0.34 stroke #222222

# Iron rivets around body rim
circle 0.26,0.34 0.015 fill #555555 0.7
circle 0.74,0.34 0.015 fill #555555 0.7
circle 0.26,0.66 0.015 fill #555555 0.7
circle 0.74,0.66 0.015 fill #555555 0.7

# Band detail (horizontal rib)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.30 stroke #444444 0.5

# === Flat top surface (slightly inset) ===
circle 0.50,0.50 0.24 fill #333333 0.6
circle 0.50,0.50 0.24 stroke #222222

# Hot plate circles (concentric rings on top)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.18 stroke #444444 0.5
circle 0.50,0.50 0.12 stroke #444444 0.4

# Heat glow through the seams (faint orange)
circle 0.50,0.50 0.20 fill #ff6600 0.08
arc 0.50,0.50 0.30 30 60 stroke #ff6600 0.2 width 1
arc 0.50,0.50 0.30 200 240 stroke #ff6600 0.15 width 1

# === Stovepipe (small circle on top, offset slightly north) ===
circle 0.50,0.36 0.08 fill #2a2a2a 0.95
circle 0.50,0.36 0.08 stroke #111111
# Pipe interior (dark void)
circle 0.50,0.36 0.05 fill #0a0a0a 0.9

# === Stubby legs (4, peeking out at edges) ===
circle 0.26,0.74 0.03 fill #333333 0.7
circle 0.26,0.74 0.03 stroke #222222
circle 0.74,0.74 0.03 fill #333333 0.7
circle 0.74,0.74 0.03 stroke #222222
circle 0.26,0.26 0.03 fill #333333 0.6
circle 0.74,0.26 0.03 fill #333333 0.6

# Small door latch (south, where front loading door is — barely visible from above)
rect 0.46,0.82 0.08,0.03 fill #555555 0.6
rect 0.46,0.82 0.08,0.03 stroke #333333

props.summoning-pool:
name: Summoning Pool
category: Magical
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no
height: 0.3
placement: center
room_types: boss-chamber, dark-temple, ritual-chamber-dark, summoning-circle
typical_count: single
clusters_with: magic-circle, altar-sacrificial, candle-dipped, ritual-knife, bloodstain, brazier
lights:
  - type: candle
    x: 1.0
    y: 1.0
    radius: 16
    color: "#8822cc"
    intensity: 0.9
notes: Large circular ritual pool with carved stone rim, dark fluid surface, infernal glow. Place at room center.
---
# Hitbox is the stone rim
hitbox circle 1.0,1.0 0.88 z 0-0.3

# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: circular pool with rune-carved stone rim, dark glowing liquid

# === Stone rim (outer ring) ===
ring 1.0,1.0 0.92 0.72 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.88
ring 1.0,1.0 0.92 0.72 stroke #1a1a1a width 2

# Mortar/joint lines radiating across the rim
line 1.00,0.08 1.00,0.28 stroke #2a2a2a 0.5
line 1.00,1.72 1.00,1.92 stroke #2a2a2a 0.5
line 0.08,1.00 0.28,1.00 stroke #2a2a2a 0.5
line 1.72,1.00 1.92,1.00 stroke #2a2a2a 0.5
line 0.35,0.35 0.49,0.49 stroke #2a2a2a 0.4
line 1.65,0.35 1.51,0.49 stroke #2a2a2a 0.4
line 0.35,1.65 0.49,1.51 stroke #2a2a2a 0.4
line 1.65,1.65 1.51,1.51 stroke #2a2a2a 0.4

# === Carved runes around the rim (faint purple etchings) ===
arc 1.0,1.0 0.82 10 35 stroke #5a1a6a 0.75 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.82 55 80 stroke #5a1a6a 0.75 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.82 100 125 stroke #5a1a6a 0.75 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.82 145 170 stroke #5a1a6a 0.75 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.82 190 215 stroke #5a1a6a 0.75 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.82 235 260 stroke #5a1a6a 0.75 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.82 280 305 stroke #5a1a6a 0.75 width 2
arc 1.0,1.0 0.82 325 350 stroke #5a1a6a 0.75 width 2
# Rune tick marks
line 1.00,0.20 1.00,0.28 stroke #8822cc 0.6 width 2
line 1.00,1.72 1.00,1.80 stroke #8822cc 0.6 width 2
line 0.20,1.00 0.28,1.00 stroke #8822cc 0.6 width 2
line 1.72,1.00 1.80,1.00 stroke #8822cc 0.6 width 2

# === Blood/sigil stains on the rim ===
ellipse 0.30,0.60 0.08,0.05 fill #3a0808 0.65
ellipse 1.70,1.35 0.07,0.04 fill #3a0808 0.65
ellipse 0.65,1.75 0.06,0.04 fill #2a0606 0.7

# === Pool interior — dark fluid with radial glow ===
# Base fluid (blood-black purple)
circle 1.0,1.0 0.72 fill #1a0818 0.92
circle 1.0,1.0 0.72 stroke #0a0408

# Radial glow gradient from inner glow to edge darkness

poly 0.14,0.60 0.08,0.56 0.10,0.64 0.06,0.70 stroke #8b7355

line 0.44,0.39 0.52,0.49 stroke #3a2a18 width 2

line 0.24,0.60 0.80,0.52 stroke #8b7355 0.5 width 1

circle 0.68,0.52 0.02 fill #2a0000 0.7
