hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.32 z 0-0.3

# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1

# Handle arc (west side) — drawn first so body covers joins
arc 0.30,0.50 0.16 90 270 stroke #2a1408 width 6
arc 0.30,0.50 0.16 90 270 stroke #5c3a1e width 3

# Spout triangle (east side)
poly 0.68,0.42 0.92,0.38 0.92,0.48 0.68,0.56 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.6
poly 0.68,0.42 0.92,0.38 0.92,0.48 0.68,0.56 fill #3a2010 0.5
poly 0.68,0.42 0.92,0.38 0.92,0.48 0.68,0.56 stroke #1a0800

# Spout tip opening
ellipse 0.92,0.43 0.02,0.03 fill #1a0800 0.9

# Teapot body (main round)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.30 texfill polyhaven/marble_01 0.6
circle 0.5,0.5 0.30 fill #4a2818 0.55
circle 0.5,0.5 0.30 stroke #1a0800 width 2

# Body highlight (sheen)
arc 0.5,0.5 0.26 200 260 stroke #8a6848 0.5 width 2

# Lid outer circle
circle 0.5,0.5 0.16 fill #5a3020 0.9
circle 0.5,0.5 0.16 stroke #1a0800

# Lid inner rim
circle 0.5,0.5 0.13 stroke #3a1808 0.7

# Lid knob
circle 0.5,0.5 0.05 fill #8b6914 0.95
circle 0.5,0.5 0.05 stroke #5a3a00

# Knob highlight
circle 0.48,0.48 0.02 fill #daa520 0.8

# Tiny steam wisp above lid
circle 0.50,0.32 0.020 fill #e8e8e8 0.3
circle 0.54,0.28 0.016 fill #e8e8e8 0.25
props.telescope:
name: Telescope
category: Misc
footprint: 1x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 4
placement: wall
room_types: study, wizard-sanctum, observatory, captain-cabin
typical_count: single
clusters_with: desk, globe
notes: Viewing instrument; point toward window or open sky
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.86,0.10 0.28,0.78 z 0-4

# Footprint 1x2: x 0-2, y 0-1. Front south, tube points north.

# === Tripod legs (underneath the tube) ===
# Left leg
line 1.0,0.55 0.15,0.92 stroke #4a2800 width 3
# Right leg
line 1.0,0.55 1.85,0.92 stroke #4a2800 width 3
# Back leg
line 1.0,0.55 1.0,0.08 stroke #4a2800 width 3
# Leg feet
circle 0.14,0.92 0.03 fill #8b6914 0.7
circle 1.86,0.92 0.03 fill #8b6914 0.7
circle 1.0,0.07 0.03 fill #8b6914 0.7

# === Telescope tube (long, dominant element) ===
# The tube runs roughly north-south, tilted upward so foreshortened
# Main tube body — long dark wood cylinder
rect 0.90,0.14 0.20,0.72 texfill polyhaven/dark_wood 0.8
rect 0.90,0.14 0.20,0.72 stroke #3a1f00
# Tube highlight (light catching the top)
line 0.96,0.16 0.96,0.84 stroke #6b4e2e 0.25

# Brass band fittings
rect 0.88,0.28 0.24,0.04 fill #8b6914 0.7
rect 0.88,0.28 0.24,0.04 stroke #5a3a00
rect 0.88,0.54 0.24,0.04 fill #8b6914 0.7
rect 0.88,0.54 0.24,0.04 stroke #5a3a00

# === Objective lens (north end — large) ===
rect 0.86,0.10 0.28,0.06 fill #334455 0.6
rect 0.86,0.10 0.28,0.06 stroke #8b6914
# Lens glint
line 0.92,0.12 1.04,0.12 stroke #667799 0.4

# === Eyepiece (south end — small) ===
rect 0.92,0.82 0.16,0.06 fill #222222 0.7
rect 0.92,0.82 0.16,0.06 stroke #5a3a00

# === Mount pivot (where tube meets tripod) ===
circle 1.0,0.55 0.06 fill #555555 0.6
circle 1.0,0.55 0.06 stroke #444444
props.tent:
name: Tent
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 2
placement: floor
room_types: campsite-traveler, fairground-seasonal, orc-war-camp, ranger-camp, scouts-blind
typical_count: few
clusters_with: bedroll, campfire, gear-pack, rope-coil, lantern-floor
notes: Canvas tent with guy ropes — top-down shows peaked ridge and triangular panels
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.10,0.10 1.80,1.80 z 0-2

# Guy ropes extending to stakes (4 corners)
line 0.30,0.30 0.10,0.10 stroke #6b4e2e width 1
line 1.70,0.30 1.90,0.10 stroke #6b4e2e width 1
line 0.30,1.70 0.10,1.90 stroke #6b4e2e width 1
line 1.70,1.70 1.90,1.90 stroke #6b4e2e width 1
# Stakes at corners (small dark pegs)
rect 0.06,0.06 0.08,0.08 fill #2a1400 0.9
rect 0.06,0.06 0.08,0.08 stroke #0a0400
rect 1.86,0.06 0.08,0.08 fill #2a1400 0.9
rect 1.86,0.06 0.08,0.08 stroke #0a0400
rect 0.06,1.86 0.08,0.08 fill #2a1400 0.9
rect 0.06,1.86 0.08,0.08 stroke #0a0400
rect 1.86,1.86 0.08,0.08 fill #2a1400 0.9
rect 1.86,1.86 0.08,0.08 stroke #0a0400
# Tent canvas (triangular panels meeting at ridge — diamond shape from above)
# West panel
poly 0.30,0.30 1.0,0.30 1.0,1.70 0.30,1.70 fill #8a7058 0.92
poly 0.30,0.30 1.0,0.30 1.0,1.70 0.30,1.70 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.55
poly 0.30,0.30 1.0,0.30 1.0,1.70 0.30,1.70 stroke #3a2408
# East panel (slightly lighter to show peak lighting)
poly 1.0,0.30 1.70,0.30 1.70,1.70 1.0,1.70 fill #a08870 0.92
poly 1.0,0.30 1.70,0.30 1.70,1.70 1.0,1.70 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.55
poly 1.0,0.30 1.70,0.30 1.70,1.70 1.0,1.70 stroke #3a2408
# Ridge pole (center line running N-S)
line 1.0,0.30 1.0,1.70 stroke #3a1f00 width 3
line 1.0,0.30 1.0,1.70 stroke #5c3a1e width 1
# Corner reinforcement patches
rect 0.28,0.28 0.08,0.08 fill #5c3a1e 0.85
rect 0.28,0.28 0.08,0.08 stroke #2a1400
rect 1.64,0.28 0.08,0.08 fill #5c3a1e 0.85
rect 1.64,0.28 0.08,0.08 stroke #2a1400
rect 0.28,1.64 0.08,0.08 fill #5c3a1e 0.85
rect 0.28,1.64 0.08,0.08 stroke #2a1400
rect 1.64,1.64 0.08,0.08 fill #5c3a1e 0.85
rect 1.64,1.64 0.08,0.08 stroke #2a1400
# Canvas seam stitching (along ridge and sides)
line 0.30,0.30 1.70,0.30 stroke #2a1810 0.7
line 0.30,1.70 1.70,1.70 stroke #2a1810 0.7
line 0.30,0.30 0.30,1.70 stroke #2a1810 0.7
line 1.70,0.30 1.70,1.70 stroke #2a1810 0.7
# Ridge support poles (visible through canvas at peak)
rect 0.98,0.34 0.04,0.06 fill #3a1f00 0.8
rect 0.98,1.60 0.04,0.06 fill #3a1f00 0.8
# Entry flap at south (slight opening, dark interior visible)
poly 0.90,1.70 1.10,1.70 1.08,1.90 0.92,1.90 fill #1a1008 0.8
poly 0.90,1.70 1.10,1.70 1.08,1.90 0.92,1.90 stroke #2a1810
# Entry flap rolled up
rect 0.88,1.70 0.04,0.16 fill #5c3a1e 0.85
rect 1.08,1.70 0.04,0.16 fill #5c3a1e 0.85
# Canvas subtle fold lines (wind ruffles)
bezier 0.40,0.50 0.60,0.54 0.80,0.50 0.96,0.54 stroke #3a2408 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.40,1.00 0.60,1.04 0.80,1.00 0.96,1.04 stroke #3a2408 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.40,1.40 0.60,1.44 0.80,1.40 0.96,1.44 stroke #3a2408 0.5 width 1
bezier 1.04,0.50 1.20,0.54 1.40,0.50 1.60,0.54 stroke #3a2408 0.5 width 1
bezier 1.04,1.00 1.20,1.04 1.40,1.00 1.60,1.04 stroke #3a2408 0.5 width 1
bezier 1.04,1.40 1.20,1.44 1.40,1.40 1.60,1.44 stroke #3a2408 0.5 width 1
# Stains on canvas (weathering)
ellipse 0.60,0.80 0.14,0.06 fill #3a2408 0.4
ellipse 1.40,1.20 0.12,0.06 fill #3a2408 0.4
# Patched hole
rect 1.30,0.60 0.10,0.08 fill #4a2810 0.8
rect 1.30,0.60 0.10,0.08 stroke #2a1008
line 1.30,0.64 1.40,0.64 stroke #2a1008 0.6
# Ridge peak highlight (lightest part where sun hits)
line 1.0,0.50 1.0,1.50 stroke #c8a080 0.3 width 2
# Tiny flag atop
poly 1.0,0.28 1.06,0.22 1.0,0.20 fill #aa2020 0.85
poly 1.0,0.28 1.06,0.22 1.0,0.20 stroke #5a0808
props.tent-collapsed:
name: Tent Collapsed
category: Camp
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: no

notes: Partly collapsed canvas tent with pole askew — signs of abandonment or a struggle
---
# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2
# Top-down: crumpled tent, one pole still partly up, fabric mound

# Guy ropes protruding (still staked but slack)
# NW rope (taut to stake)
line 0.30,0.35 0.08,0.10 stroke #8b7355 width 1
rect 0.05,0.07 0.06,0.06 fill #2a1400 0.85
rect 0.05,0.07 0.06,0.06 stroke #0a0400
# NE rope (slack, dragging)
bezier 1.60,0.40 1.75,0.25 1.85,0.18 1.92,0.12 stroke #8b7355 0.6 width 1
rect 1.89,0.09 0.06,0.06 fill #2a1400 0.85
rect 1.89,0.09 0.06,0.06 stroke #0a0400
# SW rope (broken, trailing on ground)
bezier 0.35,1.65 0.20,1.80 0.15,1.85 0.10,1.88 stroke #8b7355 0.5 width 1
# SE rope (slack)
bezier 1.55,1.60 1.70,1.75 1.80,1.85 1.90,1.92 stroke #8b7355 0.5 width 1
rect 1.87,1.89 0.06,0.06 fill #2a1400 0.85
rect 1.87,1.89 0.06,0.06 stroke #0a0400

# Main crumpled canvas mass (irregular mound shape)
poly 0.25,0.40 0.80,0.25 1.65,0.35 1.75,0.80 1.60,1.55 1.20,1.70 0.50,1.65 0.20,1.20 0.20,0.70 fill #8a7058 0.88
poly 0.25,0.40 0.80,0.25 1.65,0.35 1.75,0.80 1.60,1.55 1.20,1.70 0.50,1.65 0.20,1.20 0.20,0.70 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.5
poly 0.25,0.40 0.80,0.25 1.65,0.35 1.75,0.80 1.60,1.55 1.20,1.70 0.50,1.65 0.20,1.20 0.20,0.70 stroke #3a2408

# Canvas fold ridges (wrinkles in the collapsed fabric)
bezier 0.35,0.60 0.70,0.55 1.10,0.65 1.50,0.55 stroke #3a2408 0.6 width 1
bezier 0.30,0.90 0.65,0.85 1.00,0.95 1.40,0.85 stroke #3a2408 0.55 width 1
bezier 0.35,1.20 0.75,1.15 1.10,1.25 1.55,1.20 stroke #3a2408 0.5 width 1
bezier 0.40,1.45 0.80,1.42 1.15,1.50 1.45,1.45 stroke #3a2408 0.45 width 1

# Lighter fabric panel (different shade showing through)
poly 0.80,0.30 1.40,0.40 1.50,0.70 0.90,0.65 fill #a08870 0.5
poly 0.80,0.30 1.40,0.40 1.50,0.70 0.90,0.65 stroke #3a2408 0.4

# Askew pole (partially standing, angled, foreshortened)
# Pole base visible where it pushes canvas up (creates a peak in the mound)
circle 0.65,0.70 0.06 fill #3a1f00 0.85
circle 0.65,0.70 0.06 stroke #2a1400
# Foreshortened pole stub angling upward
rect 0.63,0.60 0.04,0.12 fill #4a2800 0.8
rect 0.63,0.60 0.04,0.12 stroke #2a1400
# Fabric peak around pole
ellipse 0.65,0.70 0.12,0.08 fill #6a5038 0.4

# Collapsed pole lying on ground (visible through canvas)
line 1.10,0.50 1.55,1.30 stroke #3a1f00 0.7 width 2

# Dark opening where entry flap has fallen (south side gap)
poly 0.85,1.60 1.15,1.60 1.10,1.75 0.90,1.75 fill #1a1008 0.6
poly 0.85,1.60 1.15,1.60 1.10,1.75 0.90,1.75 stroke #2a1810 0.5

# Weathering stains on canvas
ellipse 0.50,1.00 0.15,0.08 fill #3a2408 0.3
ellipse 1.30,0.60 0.10,0.06 fill #3a2408 0.25

# Torn patch of canvas trailing away
poly 0.20,1.20 0.12,1.40 0.18,1.50 0.28,1.35 fill #8a7058 0.6
poly 0.20,1.20 0.12,1.40 0.18,1.50 0.28,1.35 stroke #3a2408 0.5

props.thread-spool:

footprint: 1x1
facing: no

---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 0.5,0.5 0.18 z 0-0.2

# Spool end cap (wood, widest)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.20 fill #8b6914 0.9
circle 0.5,0.5 0.20 stroke #3a2010
# Spool wood grain
arc 0.5,0.5 0.19 200 340 stroke #5c3a1e 0.5 width 1
# Central thread-wound shaft (slightly narrower)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.16 fill #c82020 0.95
circle 0.5,0.5 0.16 stroke #5a0808
# Thread wrap lines (concentric)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.15 stroke #e84848 0.7 width 1
circle 0.5,0.5 0.13 stroke #e84848 0.6 width 1
circle 0.5,0.5 0.11 stroke #e84848 0.6 width 1
circle 0.5,0.5 0.09 stroke #e84848 0.5 width 1
# Center wooden core visible (hole through spool)
circle 0.5,0.5 0.04 fill #3a2010 0.95
circle 0.5,0.5 0.04 stroke #1a0f00
# Thread strand trailing off (loose end)
bezier 0.66,0.50 0.76,0.48 0.80,0.56 0.86,0.60 stroke #c82020 width 1
# Thread loose wisp
bezier 0.86,0.60 0.88,0.68 0.82,0.72 0.78,0.76 stroke #c82020 0.7 width 1
# Thread catches highlight
line 0.36,0.42 0.42,0.40 stroke #f06060 0.6 width 1
line 0.58,0.58 0.64,0.60 stroke #f06060 0.6 width 1
# Cap edge highlight
arc 0.5,0.5 0.20 220 260 stroke #daa520 0.5 width 1
# Tiny crease in thread wrap
line 0.34,0.56 0.42,0.54 stroke #8a1818 0.4

props.vault-door:
name: Vault Door
category: Structure
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 8
placement: wall
room_types: vault, bank, treasury
typical_count: single
notes: Heavy secure door; place spanning a doorway or wall section
---
# Hitbox: entire frame + door blocks light
hitbox rect 0.0,0.0 2.0,1.0 z 0-8

# Footprint 2x2: x 0-2, y 0-2. Wall at north, room at south.

# === Stone frame walls (the doorway) ===
# Left wall

rect 0.0,0.0 0.45,1.0 stroke #444444
# Right wall
rect 1.55,0.0 0.45,1.0 texfill polyhaven/stone_wall 0.85
rect 1.55,0.0 0.45,1.0 stroke #444444

# Bolt channels in the frame walls (dark grooves)

rect 0.35,0.20 0.10,0.60 stroke #333333
rect 1.55,0.20 0.10,0.60 fill #1a1a1a 0.3
rect 1.55,0.20 0.10,0.60 stroke #333333

# === Door slab (thick metal, seen from above as its depth) ===
rect 0.45,0.30 1.10,0.40 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.85
rect 0.45,0.30 1.10,0.40 stroke #333333
# Top edge highlight (north face catches light)
line 0.45,0.30 1.55,0.30 stroke #777777 width 2
# Bottom edge shadow (south face in shadow)
line 0.45,0.70 1.55,0.70 stroke #222222 width 2

# === Hinges on left side (connecting door to left wall) ===
rect 0.40,0.32 0.12,0.08 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate_02 0.9
rect 0.40,0.32 0.12,0.08 stroke #222222
rect 0.40,0.50 0.12,0.08 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate_02 0.9
rect 0.40,0.50 0.12,0.08 stroke #222222
rect 0.40,0.62 0.12,0.08 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate_02 0.9
rect 0.40,0.62 0.12,0.08 stroke #222222
# Hinge pins
circle 0.46,0.36 0.02 fill #333333 0.8
circle 0.46,0.54 0.02 fill #333333 0.8
circle 0.46,0.66 0.02 fill #333333 0.8

# === Locking bolts (extending from door into frame channels) ===
# Left bolts
rect 0.35,0.38 0.14,0.08 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.9
rect 0.35,0.38 0.14,0.08 stroke #333333
rect 0.35,0.56 0.14,0.08 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.9

rect 1.51,0.56 0.14,0.08 texfill polyhaven/metal_plate 0.9

rect 0.96,0.70 0.08,0.25 texfill polyhaven/rusty_metal_02 0.85
rect 0.96,0.70 0.08,0.25 stroke #333333

# Wheel crossbar (the handles, perpendicular to the shaft)

rect 0.72,0.91 0.56,0.08 stroke #333333

circle 0.72,0.95 0.05 stroke #333333
circle 1.28,0.95 0.05 fill #555555 0.7
circle 1.28,0.95 0.05 stroke #333333

# Hub where shaft meets crossbar

poly 0.36,0.47 0.33,0.50 0.36,0.53 stroke #5c3a1e 0.5

category: Library & Study
footprint: 1x1
facing: no

blocks_light: no

---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.18,0.28 0.64,0.44 z 0-0.3

# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1

rect 0.18,0.28 0.64,0.44 stroke #1a0e00 width 2

circle 0.68,0.44 0.090 stroke #5a3a00 width 2

line 0.68,0.42 0.68,0.46 stroke #3a2400 width 1

circle 0.680,0.69 0.030 stroke #1a0e00

circle 0.50,0.14 0.035 stroke #333333

poly 0.14,0.30 0.22,0.28 0.24,0.36 0.20,0.42 0.14,0.38 stroke #2a1408
circle 0.19,0.35 0.02 fill #666666 0.9

poly 0.80,0.20 0.84,0.18 0.88,0.20 0.84,0.26 fill #888888 0.9

rect 1.40,0.27 0.16,0.03 stroke #5a3a00

props.web-cluster:
name: Dense Web Cluster
category: Effects
footprint: 2x2
facing: yes
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 2.5
placement: corner
room_types: monster-lair-small, spider-lair, cave-drow-outpost, cabin-abandoned, crypt, ruined-watchtower
typical_count: single
clusters_with: cobweb-cluster, web-strand, spider-egg-cluster, egg-sac
notes: Dense thick cobweb cluster filling a corner — radial web spanning two cells with wrapped prey bundles. The hub is at the NW corner (0.04, 0.04); rotate to face any corner.
---
# Faint web shading across corner (establishes presence)
poly 0.02,0.02 1.60,0.02 1.20,0.40 0.80,0.80 0.40,1.20 0.02,1.60 fill #e8e4d8 0.15

# Primary radial spokes from NW corner hub
line 0.04,0.04 1.96,0.04 stroke #e8e4d8 0.65 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 1.80,0.40 stroke #e8e4d8 0.6 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 1.60,0.80 stroke #e8e4d8 0.65 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 1.30,1.20 stroke #e8e4d8 0.6 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 0.96,1.60 stroke #e8e4d8 0.65 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 0.60,1.80 stroke #e8e4d8 0.6 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 0.04,1.96 stroke #e8e4d8 0.65 width 1

# Secondary thinner spokes (intermediate rays)
line 0.04,0.04 1.92,0.20 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 1.50,0.58 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 1.10,0.94 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 0.78,1.36 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 0.40,1.70 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1
line 0.04,0.04 0.20,1.92 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1

# Concentric arc strands (silk rings) drawn as quadratic beziers from +x axis to +y axis
# Inner ring r≈0.40
qbezier 0.44,0.04 0.44,0.44 0.04,0.44 stroke #e8e4d8 0.6 width 1
# Ring r≈0.70
qbezier 0.74,0.04 0.74,0.74 0.04,0.74 stroke #e8e4d8 0.55 width 1
# Ring r≈1.00
qbezier 1.04,0.04 1.04,1.04 0.04,1.04 stroke #e8e4d8 0.55 width 1
# Ring r≈1.30
qbezier 1.34,0.04 1.34,1.34 0.04,1.34 stroke #d8d4c8 0.5 width 1
# Ring r≈1.60
qbezier 1.64,0.04 1.64,1.64 0.04,1.64 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1
# Partial outer ring r≈1.90 (torn, only partial sweep from near +x axis to mid)
qbezier 1.90,0.20 1.60,0.80 1.00,1.30 stroke #d8d4c8 0.4 width 1

# Partial outer arc (short torn fragment)
qbezier 1.70,0.30 1.50,0.60 1.10,0.90 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1

# Sag droop between spokes (irregular curves)
bezier 0.80,0.10 0.76,0.28 0.86,0.42 0.72,0.58 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1
bezier 0.20,0.80 0.40,0.76 0.54,0.88 0.62,1.04 stroke #d8d4c8 0.45 width 1
bezier 1.20,0.30 1.26,0.52 1.14,0.70 1.06,0.90 stroke #d8d4c8 0.4 width 1

# Wrapped prey bundle 1 (small dark oval — wrapped insect/bird)
ellipse 0.54,0.42 0.07,0.04 fill #2a2418 0.9
ellipse 0.54,0.42 0.07,0.04 stroke #1a1408
# Silk wrap lines around it
line 0.48,0.42 0.60,0.42 stroke #e8e4d8 0.7 width 1
line 0.50,0.40 0.58,0.44 stroke #e8e4d8 0.6 width 1

# Wrapped prey bundle 2 (larger — wrapped rat or small bundle)
ellipse 1.10,0.72 0.09,0.06 fill #2a2418 0.92
ellipse 1.10,0.72 0.09,0.06 stroke #1a1408
line 1.02,0.72 1.18,0.72 stroke #e8e4d8 0.7 width 1
line 1.04,0.68 1.16,0.76 stroke #e8e4d8 0.6 width 1
line 1.04,0.76 1.16,0.68 stroke #e8e4d8 0.55 width 1

# Wrapped prey bundle 3 (small — further out)
ellipse 0.42,1.20 0.06,0.04 fill #2a2418 0.88
ellipse 0.42,1.20 0.06,0.04 stroke #1a1408
line 0.36,1.20 0.48,1.20 stroke #e8e4d8 0.6 width 1

# Wrapped prey bundle 4 (tiny — far edge)
ellipse 1.50,0.36 0.05,0.035 fill #2a2418 0.85
line 1.45,0.36 1.55,0.36 stroke #e8e4d8 0.6 width 1

# Sticky beads on strands
circle 0.30,0.18 0.012 fill #f0ecd8 0.85
circle 0.60,0.24 0.01 fill #f0ecd8 0.8
circle 0.18,0.60 0.012 fill #f0ecd8 0.85
circle 0.90,0.48 0.01 fill #f0ecd8 0.8
circle 0.26,1.00 0.01 fill #f0ecd8 0.75
circle 0.72,0.86 0.012 fill #f0ecd8 0.8

# Dust / trapped debris caught in web
circle 0.46,0.64 0.014 fill #6a6058 0.6
circle 0.84,0.34 0.012 fill #6a6058 0.55
circle 0.16,1.16 0.01 fill #6a6058 0.5

# Hub at corner (small thicker silk mat — use a small poly instead of arc to stay in bounds)
poly 0.04,0.04 0.18,0.04 0.14,0.10 0.10,0.14 0.04,0.18 fill #e8e4d8 0.6
poly 0.04,0.04 0.18,0.04 0.14,0.10 0.10,0.14 0.04,0.18 stroke #b0a898 0.7
props.web-floor:
name: Web Floor
category: Terrain
footprint: 2x2
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: spider-lair, monster-lair-large, cave-drow-outpost, underdark-outpost
typical_count: many
clusters_with: cobweb-heavy, egg-sac, silk-cocoon, spider-egg-cluster, web-funnel
notes: Dense matted spider-silk carpeting on the floor — opaque white threads crossing irregularly, partially obscuring whatever is below. Floor scatter for spider-infested rooms.
---
# footprint 2x2: x range 0-2, y range 0-2

# === Base silk wash (faint white covering) ===
ellipse 1.00,1.00 0.95,0.90 fill #e0d8c8 0.15

# === Dense web threads crossing irregularly ===
# Horizontal-ish strands
line 0.05,0.25 1.95,0.30 stroke #e0d8c8 0.45 width 1
line 0.08,0.55 1.92,0.50 stroke #d8d0b8 0.4 width 1
line 0.10,0.80 1.90,0.85 stroke #e0d8c8 0.45 width 1
line 0.05,1.10 1.95,1.05 stroke #d8d0b8 0.4 width 1
line 0.08,1.35 1.92,1.40 stroke #e0d8c8 0.42 width 1
line 0.10,1.60 1.90,1.65 stroke #d8d0b8 0.38 width 1
line 0.05,1.85 1.95,1.80 stroke #e0d8c8 0.4 width 1

# Vertical-ish strands
line 0.25,0.05 0.30,1.95 stroke #e0d8c8 0.42 width 1
line 0.55,0.08 0.50,1.92 stroke #d8d0b8 0.38 width 1
line 0.80,0.05 0.85,1.95 stroke #e0d8c8 0.4 width 1
line 1.10,0.08 1.05,1.92 stroke #d8d0b8 0.38 width 1
line 1.40,0.05 1.45,1.95 stroke #e0d8c8 0.42 width 1
line 1.70,0.08 1.65,1.92 stroke #d8d0b8 0.38 width 1

# Diagonal crossing threads
line 0.10,0.10 1.90,1.90 stroke #d8d0b8 0.3 width 1
line 1.90,0.10 0.10,1.90 stroke #d8d0b8 0.3 width 1
line 0.10,0.60 1.40,1.90 stroke #d0c8b0 0.28 width 1
line 0.60,0.10 1.90,1.40 stroke #d0c8b0 0.28 width 1
line 1.90,0.60 0.60,1.90 stroke #d0c8b0 0.25 width 1
line 1.40,0.10 0.10,1.40 stroke #d0c8b0 0.25 width 1

# === Denser knot areas (where strands overlap more thickly) ===
ellipse 0.50,0.50 0.20,0.18 fill #d8d0b8 0.2
ellipse 1.50,0.60 0.18,0.15 fill #d8d0b8 0.18
ellipse 0.80,1.40 0.22,0.18 fill #d8d0b8 0.2
ellipse 1.60,1.50 0.20,0.16 fill #d8d0b8 0.18

# Small caught debris
circle 0.70,0.70 0.02 fill #3a2a18 0.5
circle 1.30,1.20 0.015 fill #3a2a18 0.45
circle 0.40,1.60 0.018 fill #3a2a18 0.4
props.web-funnel:
name: Web Funnel
category: Terrain
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
placement: floor
room_types: spider-lair, monster-lair-small, cave-drow-outpost, underdark-outpost, beast-den
typical_count: few
clusters_with: cobweb-heavy, cobweb-cluster, web-floor, fang-scatter, spider-egg-cluster
notes: A conical funnel web with a dark opening at the apex — the spider retreats into this burrow. Concentric silk rings narrow to a dark center hole. Place in corners or against walls.
---
# footprint 1x1: x range 0-1, y range 0-1

# === Outermost silk ring (faint, wide) ===
circle 0.50,0.50 0.46 stroke #d8d0b0 0.3 width 1
circle 0.50,0.50 0.44 fill #d8d0b8 0.08

# === Radiating structural strands (from center outward) ===
line 0.50,0.50 0.50,0.04 stroke #d8d0b0 0.4 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.92,0.18 stroke #d8d0b0 0.38 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.96,0.50 stroke #d8d0b0 0.4 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.92,0.82 stroke #d8d0b0 0.38 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.50,0.96 stroke #d8d0b0 0.4 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.08,0.82 stroke #d8d0b0 0.38 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.04,0.50 stroke #d8d0b0 0.4 width 1
line 0.50,0.50 0.08,0.18 stroke #d8d0b0 0.38 width 1

# === Concentric silk rings (narrowing inward) ===
circle 0.50,0.50 0.38 stroke #d0c8b0 0.35 width 1
circle 0.50,0.50 0.30 stroke #c8c0a8 0.4 width 1
circle 0.50,0.50 0.22 stroke #c0b898 0.45 width 1
circle 0.50,0.50 0.15 stroke #b8b088 0.5 width 1

# === Dense silk fill between inner rings ===
circle 0.50,0.50 0.22 fill #d0c8b0 0.2
circle 0.50,0.50 0.15 fill #c8c0a8 0.25

# === Dark funnel opening at center ===
circle 0.50,0.50 0.10 fill #1a1208 0.85
circle 0.50,0.50 0.10 stroke #0a0804
# Depth gradient
circle 0.50,0.50 0.08 fill #0a0804 0.9
# Tiny highlight on rim (silk catching light)
arc 0.50,0.50 0.10 200 280 stroke #d8d0b0 0.5 width 1
props.web-strand:
name: Web Strand
category: Effects
footprint: 1x1
facing: no
shadow: no
blocks_light: no
height: 0.05
placement: floor
room_types: cave-drow-outpost, spider-lair, cave, cavern, cabin-abandoned
typical_count: many
clusters_with: web-strand, chitin-barrier, glowcap-mushroom, nest-of-rags, dust-heap
notes: Sticky spider web strands on the floor — difficult terrain hazard
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox rect 0.10,0.10 0.80,0.80 z 0-0.05

# Main web strands radiating from center (spoke pattern)
line 0.5,0.5 0.10,0.10 stroke #e8e8e8 0.85 width 1
line 0.5,0.5 0.50,0.10 stroke #e8e8e8 0.85 width 1
line 0.5,0.5 0.90,0.10 stroke #e8e8e8 0.85 width 1
line 0.5,0.5 0.90,0.50 stroke #e8e8e8 0.85 width 1
line 0.5,0.5 0.90,0.90 stroke #e8e8e8 0.85 width 1
line 0.5,0.5 0.50,0.90 stroke #e8e8e8 0.85 width 1
line 0.5,0.5 0.10,0.90 stroke #e8e8e8 0.85 width 1
line 0.5,0.5 0.10,0.50 stroke #e8e8e8 0.85 width 1
# Intermediate spokes
line 0.5,0.5 0.30,0.14 stroke #d8d8d8 0.7 width 1
line 0.5,0.5 0.70,0.14 stroke #d8d8d8 0.7 width 1
line 0.5,0.5 0.86,0.30 stroke #d8d8d8 0.7 width 1
line 0.5,0.5 0.86,0.70 stroke #d8d8d8 0.7 width 1
line 0.5,0.5 0.70,0.86 stroke #d8d8d8 0.7 width 1
line 0.5,0.5 0.30,0.86 stroke #d8d8d8 0.7 width 1
line 0.5,0.5 0.14,0.70 stroke #d8d8d8 0.7 width 1
line 0.5,0.5 0.14,0.30 stroke #d8d8d8 0.7 width 1
# Spiral web threads (curved connections)
bezier 0.32,0.32 0.5,0.20 0.68,0.32 0.80,0.50 stroke #e0e0e0 0.7 width 1
bezier 0.80,0.50 0.68,0.68 0.50,0.80 0.32,0.68 stroke #e0e0e0 0.7 width 1
bezier 0.32,0.68 0.20,0.50 0.32,0.32 0.50,0.20 stroke #e0e0e0 0.7 width 1
# Inner spiral
bezier 0.40,0.40 0.5,0.32 0.60,0.40 0.68,0.50 stroke #d8d8d8 0.6 width 1
bezier 0.68,0.50 0.60,0.60 0.50,0.68 0.40,0.60 stroke #d8d8d8 0.6 width 1
bezier 0.40,0.60 0.32,0.50 0.40,0.40 0.50,0.32 stroke #d8d8d8 0.6 width 1
# Sticky beads on strands
circle 0.30,0.30 0.008 fill #f0f0f0 0.85
circle 0.70,0.30 0.008 fill #f0f0f0 0.85
circle 0.70,0.70 0.008 fill #f0f0f0 0.85
circle 0.30,0.70 0.008 fill #f0f0f0 0.85
circle 0.20,0.50 0.01 fill #f0f0f0 0.85
circle 0.80,0.50 0.01 fill #f0f0f0 0.85
circle 0.50,0.20 0.01 fill #f0f0f0 0.85
circle 0.50,0.80 0.01 fill #f0f0f0 0.85
# Center thicker hub
circle 0.50,0.50 0.03 fill #e8e8e8 0.8
circle 0.50,0.50 0.03 stroke #aaaaaa 0.7
# Trapped insect corpse (small dark speck)

props.witch-hut:
name: Witch Hut
category: Structure
footprint: 3x3
facing: yes
shadow: yes
blocks_light: yes
height: 8
placement: center
room_types: bog-witch-hut, swamp, wilderness, graveyard, druid-grove
typical_count: single
clusters_with: cauldron-large, dead-tree, hung-herb-bundle, bone-charm, animal-skull-small
notes: A tiny round wooden hut with thatched roof at map scale. Top-down: outer round thatch-roof disc with layered arc detail, a smoke hole at center, and a small porch/deck at the south edge. 3x3 centerpiece for outdoor encounter maps.
---
# === HITBOX ===
hitbox circle 1.50,1.40 1.25 z 0-8

# footprint 3x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-3

# === Porch / deck at south edge (drawn first, roof overlaps it) ===
rect 0.80,2.30 1.40,0.55 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.8
rect 0.80,2.30 1.40,0.55 stroke #3a1f00
# Plank lines
line 0.80,2.45 2.20,2.45 stroke #2a1400 0.5 width 1
line 0.80,2.60 2.20,2.60 stroke #2a1400 0.5 width 1
line 0.80,2.75 2.20,2.75 stroke #2a1400 0.45 width 1
# Porch step (southernmost edge)
rect 0.95,2.82 1.10,0.12 texfill polyhaven/weathered_planks 0.75
rect 0.95,2.82 1.10,0.12 stroke #3a1f00

# === Outer thatch roof (large round disc) ===
circle 1.50,1.40 1.25 fill #7a6a3a 0.9
circle 1.50,1.40 1.25 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.4
circle 1.50,1.40 1.25 stroke #3a2a10

# === Concentric thatch arc layers (rings of bundled straw) ===
circle 1.50,1.40 1.10 stroke #5a4a28 0.6 width 1
circle 1.50,1.40 0.92 stroke #5a4a28 0.55 width 1
circle 1.50,1.40 0.74 stroke #5a4a28 0.5 width 1
circle 1.50,1.40 0.56 stroke #5a4a28 0.45 width 1

# === Thatch texture detail (radial straw lines between rings) ===
line 1.50,0.18 1.50,0.56 stroke #6a5a30 0.4 width 1
line 0.55,0.70 0.85,0.92 stroke #6a5a30 0.35 width 1
line 2.45,0.70 2.15,0.92 stroke #6a5a30 0.35 width 1
line 0.28,1.40 0.60,1.40 stroke #6a5a30 0.35 width 1
line 2.72,1.40 2.40,1.40 stroke #6a5a30 0.35 width 1
line 0.55,2.10 0.85,1.88 stroke #6a5a30 0.35 width 1
line 2.45,2.10 2.15,1.88 stroke #6a5a30 0.35 width 1
line 1.50,2.62 1.50,2.30 stroke #6a5a30 0.3 width 1

# === Ridge cap (top of the conical roof — a raised ring) ===
circle 1.50,1.40 0.38 fill #8a7a48 0.7
circle 1.50,1.40 0.38 stroke #4a3a18

# === Smoke hole at center (dark opening) ===
circle 1.50,1.40 0.16 fill #1a1208 0.8
circle 1.50,1.40 0.16 stroke #2a1a08
# Faint smoke wisps curling out
bezier 1.50,1.28 1.45,1.18 1.48,1.10 1.42,1.02 stroke #666666 0.25 width 1
bezier 1.50,1.28 1.55,1.20 1.52,1.12 1.58,1.04 stroke #666666 0.2 width 1

# === Thatch eave overhang shadow (darker ring at base) ===
circle 1.50,1.40 1.25 stroke #2a1a08 0.4 width 3

# === Doorway opening visible on south (dark gap under eave) ===
arc 1.50,2.30 0.18 0 180 fill #1a1208 0.7
arc 1.50,2.30 0.18 0 180 stroke #2a1a08

# === HITBOX ===

# footprint 3x3: x range 0-3, y range 0-3

ellipse 2.45,0.65 0.10,0.04 fill #1a1208 0.3

# Rails

line 1.50,2.85 1.40,2.20 stroke #5c3a1e 0.7 width 2
# Rungs
line 1.24,2.72 1.46,2.72 stroke #4a2800 0.65 width 1
line 1.26,2.58 1.44,2.58 stroke #4a2800 0.65 width 1
line 1.28,2.44 1.42,2.44 stroke #4a2800 0.6 width 1
line 1.30,2.30 1.40,2.30 stroke #4a2800 0.55 width 1

# === Outer thatch roof (large round disc — same as witch-hut) ===
circle 1.50,1.40 1.25 fill #7a6a3a 0.9
circle 1.50,1.40 1.25 texfill polyhaven/rough_linen 0.4
